Josh will win this time! And I will give you five reasons why 2024 promises to be better than 2022.

Here are five reasons why 2022 was a _seriously_ hard year to win in New York as a Democrat, and why it’s so impressive Josh came as close to winning as he did:

**1\. Redistricting.** Last cycle, the New York State Legislature drew a congressional map that the New York State Courts deemed too partisan — so they threw it out and redrew it themselves. Unfortunately, for five months Josh had been running in the wrong damn district! The only good part is that the working-class town Josh grew up in remained in the newly formed 19th District. But Josh had a whole bunch of new territory in which to make himself known.

**2\. Primaries.** Josh had to win an expensive primary challenge in late August against a strong opponent. Still, Josh won the primary by a nearly two-to-one margin. _By working his butt off, not that he had much of a butt to start with—have you seen this guy? Beanpole!_

**3\. Marc Molinaro.** Josh’s Republican opponent in the general election had already been a State Assembly Member, County Executive and GOP candidate for governor in 2018, losing to then-Governor Cuomo. Molinaro gained wide name recognition and had no challengers in _his_ 2022 primary. But now he has a record to run on–and it’s not a good one. _He’s voting 95% of the time with Marjorie Taylor-Greene!_

**4\. Crazy GOP Attack Ads.** Republicans had momentum statewide, and they ran tons of deeply dishonest dark money ads that said crap like, “Josh Riley’s allies want to defund the police.” I don’t know who Josh’s “allies” are but Josh and I funded the police—getting crisis intervention training and bullet proof vests for local police departments across the country. _It was completely false, and it was sickening._

**5\. Midterm vs. Presidential Years.** 2024 will not be a midterm! Ultimately, too many New York Democrats didn’t show up in a number of races this past cycle. But this time, not only is the presidency on the line – so is the Supreme Court. You can bet Democrats will turn out!

So now that you know how tough 2022 was — and how CLOSE Josh came to pulling it off — are you ready to join me in supporting Josh for 2024?

[**Split a contribution to support Upset the Setup and Josh’s campaign — he’s going to win one of the most important races in America for 2024 and I want you to be a part of it »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62077258/402242874/2120520668?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=UTS_20230420_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkzNmUyOTc0LWQ3ZGYtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WCjTB_wORg6iXPv6-qoVPr3C6RA0TEWu8A1_9n86EU4=)

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: I am bringing the debate to CNN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Don Lemon was WRONG on this.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=b15186da049f405b8555d478ba057d71&_t=bMoT2O_GxpKcu0XTQNeu7PfaKjfRDlY4RefuIW0IyEF0NPptB9TR9yraZ0qKznSy8SzkY2c6NzlKoveKmCpoyCt5t03MkB0_bWTrcBdZhC8%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=b15186da049f405b8555d478ba057d71&_t=bMoT2O_GxpKcu0XTQNeu7PfaKjfRDlY4RefuIW0IyEF0NPptB9TR9yraZ0qKznSy8SzkY2c6NzlKoveKmCpoyCt5t03MkB0_bWTrcBdZhC8%3D)

| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b15186da049f405b8555d478ba057d71&_e=jpLSzNmPXvA2K2a9juXZ6NBkvN852qeOKTTM32XyjiR7YzigxTFPiMCs_MoYJI2nHInkzJhKAgwd5zCyAXHS6OZ4hpyb3lztiSK85q9UKRc8iaEOJoKI8MPLmsOZEsj-_C-PDp1s-qWs-LuGJ0hDa5IVJje03faatNE4fYeIyP9k_5vd7zc73-UbgVrAMhWhdoUClgc1QD6ufCRJB1WBYaDI72upLWjgAcJCJQ0FMV12iJVCuGTYDA_reIums780vKaYeDwWNqq1ZBpJ6Zo1Q0ZPZeVGlx5gXQEmTRbYXzjOhlqEtVlxZsUPZCqDyBltY0icDayABBqd6SPFZ5AsXjvEJMDZ8fgnN_-lXj0Zi-HlalKv7CY8hzWbVHSdY1cBB6WgUVw2-ubtXsHsVKVpZw%3D%3D)
Fellow American,

Things got a little heated on CNN.

While debating post Civil War history, Don Lemon preposterously claimed that "black people still aren't allowed to enjoy their freedoms."

**That's an insult to the progress we've made over the last 160 years.** His comments embody what's wrong with the dialogue about race in America. I told him so without apology.

My exchange with Don Lemon and CNN that has sparked controversy and anger from some in the mainstream media.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=b15186da049f405b8555d478ba057d71&_e=jpLSzNmPXvA2K2a9juXZ6NBkvN852qeOKTTM32XyjiR7YzigxTFPiMCs_MoYJI2nHInkzJhKAgwd5zCyAXHS6OZ4hpyb3lztiSK85q9UKRc8iaEOJoKI8MPLmsOZEsj-_C-PDp1s-qWs-LuGJ0hDa5IVJje03faatNE4fYeIyP9k_5vd7zc73-UbgVrAMhWhdoUClgc1QD6ufCRJB1WBYaDI72upLWjgAcJCJQ0FMV0LAiomxJyt1L4i_9OqqG30RQz3XkJx-DIlprq1ad5aO3hVE4Dr3Tbemf8BVxmcAVhUrOnmt8kBfMc1R275uGCj8Sn-gSZjCLu7htDfNRxWs2RbSVfo6Ahr8jSU6pIK9Xa8jF9lAwPiUWPiSkGH4he2j3Wf9OvoL4iv1sen7B0lrA%3D%3D)
I spoke passionately about the importance of the Second Amendment and the need for civil discourse in our country. I stand by my words, but of course, some in the media have chosen to twist them and attack me.

**I refuse to back down, Fellow American.** I believe that we need to have honest, open discussions about the issues that matter most to Americans. That's why I am running for office. That's why I am working every day to make sure I have a prime spot on the debate stage in August.

In order to continue my campaign and fight for the values and principles that set this country into motion, I need your support. I can't do it alone. **[Any amount will bring us closer to our unique donor goal. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Don Lemon was WRONG on this. | | Fellow American, Things got a little heated on CNN. While debating post Civil War history, Don Lemon preposterously claimed that "black people still aren't allowed to enjoy their freedoms." That's an insult to the progress we've made over the last 160 years. His comments embody what's wrong with the dialogue about race in America. I told him so without apology. My exchange with Don Lemon and CNN that has sparked controversy and anger from some in the mainstream media. I spoke passionately about the importance of the Second Amendment and the need for civil discourse in our country. I stand by my words, but of course, some in the media have chosen to twist them and attack me. I refuse to back down, Fellow American. I believe that we need to have honest, open discussions about the issues that matter most to Americans. That's why I am running for office. subject: Help free Washington State from the control of Radical Socialists
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Join the WSRP and become a 2023 Sustaining Member ASAP

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

name: Glenn Grothman
subject: Tax Day is over... finally
body:
Next year's could be even worse| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=d819cddf393b4156abd37d52e9b56e41&_e=zOjvhvAryGOJntqFIirPGtFGFmJJXIhIOUSB15SRSkIZc5OfOkT5kPpzaz__RJm0rlyVv3F0At0nPRlaOZCg6j74MMEqkfUFtYjz5QpwgnAO8Okvjqexydb9EXftbNEDniARbpgRhQUqAnN6vmTTwy6t_d2j5W5QsuWA1OUB8vh_01VFX9jZYhGHhAWNeIU6WbvTbyZH-pcibm6hSyNoJNBOnThzGUbgMatMzmBaixI%3D)

| | Tax Day has come and gone, friend. With Joe Biden's inflation driving up the costs of food, gas, energy, housing, and everything in between, Tax Day hit American families harder than usual this year. **Now, Biden is threatening to raise taxes and make next year's Tax Day even worse than this year's.** **I know I'm not alone when I say I miss the days when presidents prioritized making our tax burden easier...__not harder.__** I'm reaching out to ask if you'd be willing to take my [__**Post-Tax Day Survey**__](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=d819cddf393b4156abd37d52e9b56e41&_e=zOjvhvAryGOJntqFIirPGtFGFmJJXIhIOUSB15SRSkIZc5OfOkT5kPpzaz__RJm0rlyVv3F0At0nPRlaOZCg6pzCFBIUQSc1xm6Ung3Rnf6iL8_-A3tcAcB7QOx306uskCOC6tYJV-YH82tA4zLmgeJ21MtR0egNb1tz7UUAeg7rpM-aX1DJpQ6EO-tNX1MAUjF72ibWE0lVM95p6rd3Gnt-rlqGY0f2Kc05pl8X9Ns%3D) to get your thoughts on your tax burden, Biden's potential tax hikes, and other critical issues:
---
[**Click Here >> _2023 Post-Tax Day Survey_**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=d819cddf393b4156abd37d52e9b56e41&_e=zOjvhvAryGOJntqFIirPGtFGFmJJXIhIOUSB15SRSkIZc5OfOkT5kPpzaz__RJm0rlyVv3F0At0nPRlaOZCg6mw4mKDeb5fmSqg4Dmcsg-YuuHa7_h2WCaEVb1QTqaMNVLWtmZAbhDg7jn6LhZ3n4eR0k5auqLyNSOPKHN4sbL2UJmEVGQOjTSb9EEVHcHBNQrGlqguyJlUVAulWEZD9jZYbSyix4nbPxdUUA2EJ2LQ%3D)
---
| | I'm committed to keeping our taxes low, and your responses help me understand what I can do to keep fighting for Wisconsin families. Thank you for your support,
**Glenn Grothman**

| | **_The Sneaky IRS Tax Law to "Opt Out" of Bank Failures_****Big Banks Don't Want You to Know About the Opportunity this IRS "Cheat Code" Unlocks... That Isn't Stopping It From Sweeping the U.S...** Big banks and the IRS want you to think, the only way to secure your savings and retirement is to keep your cash in an FDIC insured account or load up on stocks.The recent string of bank failures has millions of Americans second guessing this approach, especially for their hard-earned nest egg in an IRA or 401(k).But, **_you have options_**. Did you know that you can move your retirement savings out of cash or stocks, and KEEP your tax-advantaged status?**Have you heard about Section 408(m)(3)?** It's a little-known cousin of Section 401(k) of IRS code. I like to call it the "cheat code" that **unlocks investments** you simply can't find on Wall Street. Here's what I mean...Section 408(m)(3) lets you open a Precious Metals "Self Directed" IRA and put REAL gold and silver into a tax-advantaged account.Here are three good reasons to consider this IRS "cheat code"...**#1:** Gold protects against stock crashes.**#2:** Unlike savings in a bank account, gold is not susceptible to bank failures.**#3:** If something catastrophic happens to the dollar, gold can be used as currency around the world.**While you still can:** Get a no-cost info kit on gold, and the IRS "Cheat Code" to legally move your IRA or 401(k) to precious metals – with NO tax consequences.[**Get your no-cost info kit on gold here.**](http://trk.readactnews.) body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ To unsubscribe from Nikki Haley for President, click here Happy $5 Friday once again, Peter! It’s Michael Haley here and, if you have been keeping up with my Friday messages, you can see I really do have a story for everything. Today, I thought we would take it back to the start of Nikki’s journey. I’m not talking about the beginning of Nikki’s presidential run, I’m going back almost two decades to 2004, when we found ourselves preparing for Nikki to run her very first race. It all started when she went back to work at her family’s store after gaining some experience in the corporate world. Little did we know that career switch would change everything. One day Nikki was quite fed up when she saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for the government to take it away. After voicing those frustrations to her mom, her mom told her, “Don’t complain. Do something about it.” Nikki was barely 30 years old, and we had two little kids at home, but we ultimately made the decision to heed her mom’s advice and do something about it. When I say we had no idea what we were getting into, I mean truly no idea. To give you more context, Nikki’s first race was against a 30-year incumbent. Her opponent was the longest serving Republican in the state legislature. Not only that, but he was related to half the district! And the half that wasn’t a part of his family was a part of another old South Carolina family that traced their roots to the state back to the 1700s. When Nikki realized this, she turned to me and asked, “What have I done?” Well, what she had done was take on the political establishment so that she could make an important difference in the lives of South Carolinians. When Nikki started to tell people that she was running, many underestimated her. Some looked at her like they felt sorry for her. Others suggested she set her sights too high. Consultants told Nikki she didn’t have a chance. It wasn’t going to be easy, but Nikki knew it was worth the fight. So, Nikki did what she does best – she outworked everyone. Nikki worked around the clock talking with voters, even if that meant handing out donuts in the carpool lanes at school. Nikki and I would drive the car around from neighborhood to neighborhood with the kids and a box of Krispy Kreme’s in the back seat. She’d go up and knock on doors, introduce herself, and ask for their vote. There wasn’t a day in that campaign she wasn’t knocking on doors, talking with voters, or answering phone calls. She listened to voters, became their voice and vowed to make things better. Meanwhile, her opponent spent the majority of his time and resources running a smear campaign against Nikki. She remained unphased with her eyes on the prize. If anything, being underestimated only fueled her competitive spirit and pushed her to work that much harder. Those countless hours started to pay off and Nikki’s positive message became louder than her opponent’s attacks. Despite all odds against her, she beat the 30-year incumbent in a runoff, and life for South Carolina (and our family) was forever changed. Even the State House wasn’t prepared for Nikki and the plans she was ready to set in motion – but that’s a story for another time! Now, I’m not saying that Nikki has a secret to never losing a race or beating an incumbent. What I am saying is Nikki will always outwork everyone around her and doesn’t stop until she accomplishes what she sets out to do. Whether it’s campaigning for her place at the State House or the White House, Nikki is no stranger to the palace intrigue and ugliness that can come with elections, but I think America is ready for something different. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=feeb451b5419c6a116c01a05413fcfc990d47e452c9a92c86d31eba1f60c5ecc3ff368c6eabb85e4847b88f30635f26b83412bf12b951f912ea05481bcd0bb5a If you are ready for a NEW generation of leadership to restore the American Dream that made Nikki’s success possible and get our country back on track, join the team and give $5 on this Friday! These small dollar donations are what allows Nikki to reach voters on the ground and online. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=feeb451b5419c6a116c01a05413fcfc990d47e452c9a92c86d31eba1f60c5ecc3ff368c6eabb85e4847b88f30635f26b83412bf12b951f912ea05481bcd0bb5a Don’t discount the power of a $5 donation – when every grassroots supporter shows up, Nikki’s movement is THAT much stronger. Thank you for allowing me a space to share these stories and for coming back week after week with your support. It means the world to our family and Nikki’s entire team. Until next week! Michael Haley https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=feeb451b5419c6a162a8d36abdb87b0c31c8542815341645e0f92d76b22a87a709ed9f67839161a7a59f3ddc592b7b624112db181ae73357e2cb0efc2459894a DONATE $5 NOW GET YOUR NIKKI HALEY FOR PRESIDENT MERCH A great way to show off your support for Nikki Haley is by getting your own Nikki Haley for President gear! All of our merchandise is made in America. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=feeb451b5419c6a11dd6c8b97e3114ede2b9a5e48ef9edc7d8b68d79b452075181b8cd591a34724c618c4aebfa4cddc045aebc3e0e99e8d9aeb92028ab305fe8 >">Contribute now to support Nikki Haley and claim your Nikki Haley for President mug today. >> https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=feeb451b5419c6a11dd6c8b97e3114ede2b9a5e48ef9edc7d8b68d79b452075181b8cd591a34724c618c4aebfa4cddc045aebc3e0e99e8d9aeb92028ab305fe8 https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=feeb451b5419c6a11dd6c8b97e3114ede2b9a5e48ef9edc7d8b68d79b452075181b8cd591a34724c618c4aebfa4cddc045aebc3e0e99e8d9aeb92028ab305fe8 Claim Your Mug JOIN NIKKI’S TEAM https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=feeb451b5419c6a171840163fb56f4126925ebd39b8877e4108bc667fb7d0a2c677946daeb2aefe8d17165ef90b49ee30bbada881bb07a01e31e67c1f716ea8e Nikki Haley is the daughter of Indian immigrants, a proud military wife, and the mom of two amazing children. She’s served as governor of the great state of South Carolina and as America’s ambassador to the United Nations…and she’s a grateful citizen who knows our best days are yet to come, if we unite and fight to save our country. Nikki Haley is running for President because our country is on a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction, and we need a leader who has proven time and again that she can rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and focus on serving the people. In order to build momentum and get Nikki’s message out, we need you on her side. Will you join Nikki’s team and pitch in a donation today? Thank you in advance for your support. Thank you, Team Haley P.S. If you don’t have $1 or more to spare, all we ask is that you take one minute of your time to share this with 5 friends today. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=feeb451b5419c6a171840163fb56f4126925ebd39b8877e4108bc667fb7d0a2c677946daeb2aefe8d17165ef90b49ee30bbada881bb07a01e31e67c1f716ea8e DONATE Paid for by Nikki Haley for President. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=feeb451b5419c6a1cb218a367aa393f7a312287e0d8f6d6a78d2c82bc7eb19302267080546f954f15f2c54988173a47e2e0b2c22ad452ca2740b42aa711015e6 www.nikkihaley.com By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided from each of Nikki Haley for President, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, Team Stand For America, SFA Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley (48324) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. name: Sean Spicer
subject: I’m parting ways with Newsmax. Here’s what I’m up to now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR.

| |

---
| | | Hey - this is Sean Spicer:

With a heavy heart, I just announced I’m parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what’s _really_ happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again.

_**[But with that in the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next...](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17033%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=A5TICaxk%2bLR5MGs4IZgadA&sysid=1 "But with that in the
rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next... ")**_

---
| | | [READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17034%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vRmbUCVQCG0LTSUJ4kwhWw&sysid=1 "READ MY FULL STATEMENT")
---

The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It’s an emergency situation and we’re running dangerously short on time to change course.

We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024:

- Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency
- Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House
- Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement

**The Democrats aren’t going to give us an inch ... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. **

Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can’t outsmart us when we’re the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda.

But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC.

_**[Look- if we want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17045%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=matB2AFD7ZPPjNpIaDLceQ&sysid=1 "Look – if we want to
win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW. ")**_

That’s why I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it’ll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory.

We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you gave between $27 and $54, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts.

_In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we’ve ever seen before._

**But that’s a big “if” - it requires 100% participation. **

This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off.

So I’ll cut to the chase.

_**[From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17046%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JxG0OgappDSOsi6ujHDpgg&sysid=1 "From the bottom of my
heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54?
If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.")**_

Are you in?

---
**[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17047%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=D99cEl4ygUPgA4RfaEqyLQ&sysid=1)[**YES >>**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17048%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bN038lc3a2LdJ3y3G5UvEg&sysid=1)_[**NO >>**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17049%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iZL3tYTYEYTvVfgM0f2WIA&sysid=1)**
---

More from me soon,
Sean Spicer

clean_body: I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. | | | | | Hey - this is Sean Spicer: With a heavy heart, I just announced I’m parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what’s really happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again. "But with that in the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next... " | | | "READ MY FULL STATEMENT" The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It’s an emergency situation and we’re running dangerously short on time to change course. We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024: - Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency - Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House - Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement The Democrats aren’t going to give us an inch ... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can’t outsmart us when we’re the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda. But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC. "Look – if we want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW. " That’s why I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it’ll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory. We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you gave between $27 and $54, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts. In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we’ve ever seen before. But that’s a big “if” - it requires 100% participation. This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off. So I’ll cut to the chase. "From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history." Are you in? name: Gary Sinise
subject: Most don't know this about Memorial Day
body:
This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc8kjlk2kpgoel8j7utpe69p39muej363rgf5b2o_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm8oj6c3h2bs)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ — but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zg65bep3e658g29ls8bjmul491djf72icf5999mg_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm8oj6c3h2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8km7hl0toog1a08pu9o0dbi6kblii9rkf7rim90_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm8oj6c3h2bs)
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvld6afevjt5c5mppnc2f3pqp4innak8rsd0ugc8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm8oj6c3h2bs)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they’re bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkmleqhgl3sa0l427bicbj1ved0s6l8fb6t7i920_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm8oj6c3h2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztr8vkb47ptie91r3uk0rnvai6puo8gi15l4ehd8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm8oj6c3h2bs)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znhl2fsh63ksgsjjfklqm1gomj088m8lc570jiuo_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm8oj6c3h2bs) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmikne37nq24uqsek578v7corqsglacs0l7th28o_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm8oj6c3h2bs)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zaqntjd89gf89d8rp40ivlp1f6l7gj7gd48eo3q8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm8oj6c3h2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zacdq4jin3ugvaqi4neipg5rmppf6e2e3vuvie00_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm8oj6c3h2bs)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

GOP Presidential
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

---
I recently spoke at an RNC donor retreat.
---
My message was simple: **_“The old Republican Party is gone, and it’s never coming back.”_**
---
In its place is a NEW America First movement that defends America’s interests, secures our borders, protects our jobs, looks after our hardworking citizens, and vehemently opposes illegal immigration, pointless wars, and rigged globalist trade deals that rob our country.
---
**Patriots like YOU are the new leaders of our Party.**
---
Don’t forget that it was __OUR__ America First message that won Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin – states that Republicans hadn’t won since the _1980s_.
---
The Republican nominees in 2008 and 2012 couldn’t win Florida, Ohio, or even Iowa.
---
_We forever revolutionized the electoral map for Republicans. We paved a path to victory._
---
_America First is our Party’s only hope at survival._
---
And in 2024, the survival of our entire country is being put to the test. Either we win – or we lose America for good.

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: This campaign is run by grassroots leaders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I've said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It’s run not by Washington insiders but by people like you.

|
[**$28.99**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zb1edu7g3glbes6cp12g4ilaeogmoj64jlqvbas8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm8oj3cph2bs)
That's our average donation this month, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign less than 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference.

This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, **[I need you to join me and put some skin in the game with me.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7qoh39vblj4np19c5o895mmv2a0t8vu6lgs43u8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm8oj3cph2bs)**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $1, $5, or even our average gift for this month- $28.99?](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvbtrt2m8o6fog92q07omckc9a7610sgd6gndugo_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm8oj3cph2bs)**

| [Chip in $1 ➔](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9ccrd7bvvc8i7o8bhji622ouo16a7sha7k9369o_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm8oj3cph2bs) | | [Chip in $5 ➔](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zodli59e75t98p9mqruh6ibmj861qn552g0ob658_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm8oj3cph2bs)
---|---|---
[Chip in $10 ➔](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zu0m3nukoda0ircvbq1rsd826kqa6ioo416t28ko_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm8oj3cph2bs) | | [Chip in $28.99 ➔](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z843tvhhmkhpa1lqj60e3s3mkp317nif4pkrut90_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm8oj3cph2bs)

This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens.

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite.

We are **leading** this race with actual *solutions.* I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. **[But, I need your help to amplify our ideas and message.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7g2730a2mnhmi1e70vv6sturq58213rpoe0hlho_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm8oj3cph2bs)**

**[Please add your voice to the growing number of grassroots leaders joining our movement.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zp5d4f50vrn86imstum59mtj2pmd5l7ddofhq5d8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm8oj3cph2bs)**

Thanks,

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zh583e3ckjg2m8no30dikcfsmdmm3ekc930g68jg_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm8oj3cph2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** CHIP IN $28.99 -> **](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zskausctms766kmpuhmrc8mi7n54kkvo8uq6lvoo_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm8oj3cph2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: I've said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It’s run not by Washington insiders but by people like you. | That's our average donation this month, Fellow American. Since launching this campaign less than 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference. This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign. I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, | | | ---|---|--- | | This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens. As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline. I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite. We are leading this race with actual solutions. I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: American Federation for Children
subject: Parents deserve CHOICE! OPEN if you agree…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Federation for Children
body:
The Education Freedom Pledge is a way for lawmakers and citizens alike to stand for school choice!

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zec3jetohe5kq24364e3rej2bok725oh40lehoc8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm8oj3chh2bs)
---
| | Friend, We believe that ALL families in America deserve a wide range of educational choices for their kids, whether they opt for public schools, private schools, charter schools, OR homeschooling.**That’s why we launched the Education Freedom Pledge in the Fall of 2021...** _to rally grassroots supporters of school choice and garner support from legislative figures across the country._ The result? Thousands of Americans and legislators across the country signed the pledge, took a stand for school choice, and made a difference in the school choice movement nationwide.This Fall, with so many school choice initiatives once again hanging in the balance in states across the country, **we’re RE-LAUNCHING the Education Freedom Pledge to re-ignite support for SCHOOL CHOICE!** _Will you take a stand for school choice today, Friend?_**Here is the pledge...**
---
| | _“I pledge to support policies that promote parental rights in education and educational freedom. This includes the right of parents to voice their opinions at school board meetings and to take their children's taxpayer-funded education dollars to the education providers of their choosing - whether it be a public, private, charter, or home school.”_
---
| | [**SIGN THE PLEDGE TODAY >>**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zm6rp77c4peeeutlp3o04m1690uncnina56iv0m8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm8oj3chh2bs)
---
| | **Friend, if you agree that parents deserve CHOICE – _and kids deserve better_ – [_join our movement and sign the Education Freedom Pledge today! >>_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zaan16gbnqh5mt4mccb6m5gjsdpthdp8p5mlrklg_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm8oj3chh2bs)**
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za9r6bvt5pij806ivn43c70jo8k2vnkvqn7c57tg_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm8oj3chh2bs)
---
| | When you sign the Education Freedom Pledge, you join a diverse coalition of some of the MOST influential legislators and school choice activists in America.**Some of the Education Freedom Pledge’s top signers include...**
---
| |
* Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds
* AFC Fellow Corey DeAngelis
* Wisconsin Speaker of the House Robin Vos
* Florida Education Commissioner Manny Diaz Jr.
* **[_Add YOUR NAME here >>_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9vjo86gt1hjai8mfe7q682a8u3rpsv5l4t9o8po_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm8oj3chh2bs)**

name: Secure & Prosper
subject: China's "Redback" Could Soon Make Your 401(k) Obsolete
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | | **China's "Redback" Could Soon Make Your IRA or 401(k) Obsolete**
---
**China's "Redback" Could Soon Make Your IRA or 401(k) Obsolete**
| | |
China and Russia are making moves that could radically harm the retirement plans of millions of Americans.

They want to REPLACE the U.S. Dollar with the "Redback", their own **gold-backed reserve currency**.

Under normal circumstances, the world would reject such a currency from these two troublesome countries.

But many predict **the Redback could actually succeed**.

Why? Because of the outlandish money printing and dollar devaluation coming from Washington. Which harms other countries' currencies and leaves many leaders secretly hoping for an alternative.

_And if it does replace the USD, what would happen to our economy?_

Here are three things you should prepare for:
* Stocks in your retirement account could crash because people aren't buying anything other than **_absolute necessities_**.
* The real-world value of your IRA or 401(k) could drastically decline. So when you actually USE your money, your purchasing power may be a _**fraction of what it used to be**_.

name: Sean Spicer
subject: I’m parting ways with Newsmax. Here’s what I’m up to now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR.

| |

---
| | | Hey - this is Sean Spicer:

With a heavy heart, I just announced I'm parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what's _really_ happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again.

_**[But with that in the rearview mirror, I'm thrilled at what's coming next...](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z01r1ul2nken5kitpc9la5hnlkn0r4c2eb4ivfko_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm2o76c9h2bs "But with that in the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next...")**_

---
| | | [READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrr7637k9jv135khndeqmofsfblq9p74okmr4krg_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm2o76c9h2bs "READ MY FULL STATEMENT")
---

The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It's an emergency situation and we're running dangerously short on time to change course.

We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024:

- Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency
- Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House
- Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement

**The Democrats aren 't going to give us an inch... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. **

Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can't outsmart us when we're the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda.

But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC.

_**[Look- if we want to win in 2024, it's going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjt070do2b3km8ukkbm4tt67e51leai5c5lmqv38_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm2o76c9h2bs "Look – if we want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.")**_

That's why I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it'll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory.

We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you gave between $27 and $54, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts.

_In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we've ever seen before._

**But that 's a big "if" - it requires 100% participation. **

This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off.

So I'll cut to the chase.

_**[From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we'll make history.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn6amu6co5q9dv1vf6n33338hugot818m2uigvf8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm2o76c9h2bs "From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.")**_

Are you in?

---
**[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zt79nqatbrl4kg8crtpqtfkfaj6i57kqrr5ep1d0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm2o76c9h2bs)[**YES >>**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zujntjj8idedecjkchl8s913qri67b7b6j3femu0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm2o76c9h2bs)_[**NO >>**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk86evgis6c60ms294g408t0kk8td7ku12d9cmig_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm2o76c9h2bs)**
---

More from me soon,
Sean Spicer

---

name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpaefbj65vhdcnabs5c19gds6scah1ibqm7n7kh0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm6or6cph2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za1bgb4iia9s1rvrauf36gu7k6k5c3sbqa12b7b8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm6or6cph2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zaeuo06fp1rc0jbl6nafuinp9gjksu1ue2uahnuo_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm6or6cph2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z82ddl495sfmb38cbmrnh2pee9derjtp56ctndq8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm6or6cph2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc2ec7lu3rfj9lm26qe1p1bbn688lpd07o18nrr8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm6or6cph2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zma42dmt6u57lppb454j7latk7tekgbe0uf31rho_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm6or6cph2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Please hurry.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjk89vcck5985ffgdq58gau5kgn24slnfa49recg_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm6or6cph2bs)

Kash Patel

name: Sean Spicer, Steve Scalise
subject: FWD: I’m parting ways with Newsmax.Here’s what I’m up to now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Sean Spicer didn’t hold anything back when he was at Newsmax.

Will you consider standing with me and Sean Spicer? It's important.
|
---
| | | Hi Friend,

_Sean Spicer didn 't hold anything back when he was at Newsmax_. He spoke the truth to the American People, held Joe Biden accountable, and set the record straight when the Liberal Media swept his failures under the rug.

Now he's charting a new path and turning his attention to the 2024 election.

Sean is absolutely right when he says we cannot afford to be outworked, outsmarted, and outraised by the Democrats. **And now his warning is even more urgent ... **

We just heard House Democrats outraised Republicans by $12,000,000+ since we took back the House.

_**[Like Sean said: if everyone reading this pitches in between $27 and $54, we can catch up to the Democrats and fully fund our budgets to elect more Republicans in key battleground races across the country.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1e35r0sb47ln7kjh15qq4nelq1fo6oamckfqr9o_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm6or6cph2bs "Like Sean said: if everyone reading this pitches in between $27 and $54, we can catch up to the Democrats and fully fund our budgets to elect more Republicans in key battleground races across the country.")**_

Will you consider standing with me and Sean Spicer? It's important.
---
**[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvjkg2jdt09mcd1cnc96pg8ro0u58tt8aij09so8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm6or6cph2bs)[**YES >>**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zensjdk7svd4j645ljs0k6tmg8kn1fma21d77spg_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm6or6cph2bs)_[**NO >>**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zkkecd0qqc8qct16no0f24tlki0bumlve3enh9m8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm6or6cph2bs)**
---
Talk soon,
Steve Scalise

* * *
From: Sean Spicer
To: _**[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4u4ifggsisaaa1ibard1pb3uur6ssb9esiqrb3g_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm6or6cph2bs "data-amp-placeholder-3-amp-end")**_
Subject: I'm parting ways with Newsmax. Here's what I'm up to now:

Hey - this is Sean Spicer:

With a heavy heart, I just announced I'm parting ways with Newsmax. My show reached millions and helped viewers see what's _really_ happening in our country. Something the Mainstream Media fails to do time and time again.

_**[But with that in the rearview mirror, I'm thrilled at what's coming next...](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z47eol56717s7koc9u3glfdb5gn9v7t5omqi5ja8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm6or6cph2bs "But with that in the rearview mirror, I’m thrilled at what’s coming next...")**_

---
| | | [READ MY FULL STATEMENT >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbc2ltb6iru7bnjsoggq2i1u8645je7mj0lm6i2g_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm6or6cph2bs "READ MY FULL STATEMENT")
---

The 2024 election will be the single most important one in the history of our country. Joe Biden and Democrats in Congress have set our country into a tailspin. It's an emergency situation and we're running dangerously short on time to change course.

We have our work cut out for us ahead of 2024:

- Fire Joe Biden and retake the presidency
- Expand our razor-thin Majority in the House
- Win back the Senate and send Chuck Schumer into retirement

**The Democrats aren 't going to give us an inch... so we have no choice but to 1) outwork, 2) outsmart, and - most importantly - 3) outraise them. **

Unfortunately, that last point is the most important. Why? Because no one works harder than strong Conservatives like you. And Republicans are WINNING on the issues - they can't outsmart us when we're the ones fighting for freedom, defending our country and flag, and resisting their radical woke agenda.

But Democrats have a MAJOR advantage in fundraising thanks to their armies of Hollywood megadonors and woke Liberals whipping out their credit cards whenever they flip on MSNBC.

_**[Look- if we want to win in 2024, it's going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zuddlagl7034a9vccoi5cub1sogru0m2j2lk3tkg_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm6or6cph2bs "Look – if we want to win in 2024, it’s going to take all of us standing up RIGHT NOW.")**_

That's why I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME THIS YEAR. We ran the numbers on what it'll take to outraise the Democrats and pull off an overwhelming victory.

We came to the conclusion that if every last one of you gave between $27 and $54, we would have the resources to MAX OUT all our voter contact budgets, GOTV operations, and volunteer recruitment efforts.

_In other words ... if everyone here steps up RIGHT NOW, the Democrats would suffer a defeat like nothing we've ever seen before._

**But that 's a big "if" - it requires 100% participation. **

This plan falls apart if too many folks sit out. We need everyone on board to pull this off.

So I'll cut to the chase.

_**[From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we'll make history.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlguahq179tssq4an03bbculms642ucc5nftatp8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm6or6cph2bs "From the bottom of my heart, would you be willing to make a meaningful contribution between $27 and $54? If we can pull this off, we’ll make history.")**_

Are you in?

---
**[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0sume5urf25bo03halgv68aoo62s7k7v7d8p9n8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm6or6cph2bs)[**YES >>**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmt1htlkllm9khkcofalqrujuumminq67tas279g_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm6or6cph2bs)_[**NO >>**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztljp0ps78e8bdgeg6qn9q6esf8n2aaiembmd2v8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm6or6cph2bs)**
---

More from me soon,
Sean Spicer

---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmgl7vrloarrultkfvk8api837nvucir9rjbe7l0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm6or6cph2bs "image")
---
* * *
---
|
---

body:

|

name: Gary Sinise
subject: The National Memorial Day Parade is back
body:
This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq20ine80ht372h2hjcfbh5v8br790odnpts80to_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm1ob2cth2bs)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ — but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf1vugr97c9nfsgrh8thirb5rrfj0tb66hh4r7mg_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm1ob2cth2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ziil9mf3dp5e3a00lp3ndeabgbh00274d0pgsa88_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm1ob2cth2bs)
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zslto3r2d43aaaaojo03shjklar2cftp9i6oohs8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm1ob2cth2bs)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they’re bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm88gaij2d85aamc89t5trlesj6ebtu4fqkb4670_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm1ob2cth2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjhco6i3n3ktf92s9hva4jbi62cqdaq06l4nsg00_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm1ob2cth2bs)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt4tmqv2cs75eu0m79u4erfula1i7g4j8pk56s4o_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm1ob2cth2bs) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zemi88d25ulm996a9l0d1slor8id1rhhciftnjhg_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm1ob2cth2bs)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zejoapeh66hs5l9pgc6qvdkb3isocpikt6mn2ud8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm1ob2cth2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zreu1mefdoi3m16l64gp69a5d22ga1hm1ha7mibo_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1jm1ob2cth2bs)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zobh90pn4sog5kn0jnmo1rvb0p9td3lmcpr3glb0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or0s9g6eo71c9jm49fg)

body:
Fellow Conservative:

Conservative star Herschel Walker and woke, socialist Senator Raphael Warnock are locked in a runoff election in Georgia.
After two years of grueling campaigning, Herschel has to keep fighting. And so do we!
Please contribute to Herschel Walker's campaign!
The Georgia Senate runoff election will be on December 6, so we don't have much time. The entire Democrat Party, the media, and woke corporations will be pouring money and propaganda into this race.
Herschel Walker doesn't have Wall Street, Silicon Valley, and the Swamp. His campaign can only rely on two things now: conservative principles and us.
The marathon of the 2022 elections is now a sprint for Georgia.
Herschel Walker is ready for this fight. He is giving everything he's got to save America from another two years of anti-American corruption in Washington. What is it worth...

▶︎ To fight inflation?▶︎ To drill more oil and natural gas?▶︎ To protect our daughters from woke extremists?▶︎ To rescue our classrooms from racist indoctrination?▶︎ To secure our border?▶︎ To clean up our streets?
Please send $5, $10, $25, or more to Herschel Walker's campaign to build a conservative Senate.
We need principled fighters in the Senate, not more spineless and feckless RINOs. Together, we can help send Herschel Walker to Washington to fight for our values.
Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to support strong candidates.

Sincerely,

Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund

 

GEORGIA RUNOFF
COUNTDOWN

name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79980%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6xs4CE8wSBsVYmgmQ82ZaA&sysid=1)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79980%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6xs4CE8wSBsVYmgmQ82ZaA&sysid=1)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79981%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fuynhe0GnPi4egXLKstaKA&sysid=1)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79992%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SVGrBDgQeD%2brGtiZkczWMg&sysid=1)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79993%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=chTJEW%2bX18B%2fy7HDmMolZg&sysid=1)

Kash Patel

Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no “deadly insurrection.” The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It’s time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored. For Freedom, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. Great American Update 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314 |

name: Team Miyares
subject: in the coming days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
Friend, AG Jason Miyares is ALL in for the Commonwealth.
---
| | | | | | | | |
---
| | Friend, In 2021, we won because we promised to make our streets safer, give parents a say in their children's education, and make the Commonwealth a better place for every family, regardless of where you live. We have accomplished so much thus far, but there's still more work to do. The _only way_ we'll accomplish more is by maintaining our Republican majority in the House of Delegates and flipping the State Senate. Attorney General Jason Miyares is traveling all across the state, holding events, reaching out to Virginians and working hard to do his part to help our candidates win. **He is ALL IN to ensure we win in November, but he needs your help.**
---
|
---
| We know the national Democrats and woke progressive groups are going to pour an unbelievable amount of money into Virginia to try to beat us. We can't let our candidates be outspent!

In the coming days, we'll start introducing you to a slate of candidates Jason is personally excited about. Together, we can push to the finish line in November and they can help us maintain our majority in the House of Delegates and flip the State Senate.... We hope you'll join us in supporting them too. Keep an eye out, friend. We'll be in touch soon. -Team Miyares
---
