name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: This May 16th, there’s a special election for two open seats in the Pennsylvania state house. We can’t let Republicans win them and take back the chamber, tying the hands of the new Democratic governor, Josh Shapiro!
body:
Republicans could take this state house in May!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc4f82871-74a0-4289-8158-42f5c021f547/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [**We must stop the Republicans from ripping the state house away from Democrats in Pennsylvania!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf144081e-7699-4679-a73a-b073cf406c70/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _One of the biggest victories on election night, 2022, was in Pennsylvania. We elected a Democratic Governor, Josh Shapiro, over seditionist Doug Mastriano, and Senator John Fetterman over right-wing Mehmet Oz._ **_And, in an incredible highlight of the night, we unexpectedly took back the state house by a 101-100 margin!_** **_It created opportunities to make the lives of 13 million Pennsylvanians better, and those in surrounding states and across the country. As we know, guns sold illicitly and climate-change-causing carbon don't know what state lines mean._** _**So, on May 16th, when there is a special election for two open seats in the state house, we cannot let Republicans win them and take back the chamber!**_ _Democrat Heather Boyd (District 163) is clear after the travesty of Dobbs, "protecting women's bodily autonomy" is the main reason she's running. Trevor S. Finn (District 108) says he'll stop permitless carry to protect our schoolchildren. Both GOP opponents, meanwhile, are ready to give guns to anyone and ban abortion for everyone. And they're terrible on EVERY other issue._ [**_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Democrats Heather Boyd & Trevor S. Finn so we keep progressing in Pennsylvania and across the country, and never return to MAGA Republican policies of pre-2020?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T37d7df84-5957-4001-bad9-e58e43523e84/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for fighting this fight everywhere it's required! Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Kennedy Democrats
subject: Celebrate & Take Action this Weekend on Earth Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy Democrats
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/0M_MSM7PllnO6w_bVjlbvTH_tEtDkpSbXG5ulIqTFlw=/fAsrPPYuxZd0hSfQdwvzJIekmpJ6vSPFx9tev7TEKxg=)
Peter,

Tomorrow is Earth Day - originally a day to raise awareness of our country's growing environmental issues which led to the start of the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA). Today is a reminder of the accelerating challenges to our planet and environment, our task at hand, and the fight to continue progress against climate change.

We here at KD are inspired by President Kennedy's legacy on the environment: How he established three national seashores to protect coastlines and oceans, new laws that protected natural resources, promoted a youth conservation corps, and his generational call to service which led to new environmental civic action across the country.

In Pennsylvania climate and environmental challenges have never been more urgent. Although much work remains, President Joe Biden's recent actions & key legislation on the climate are crucial next steps for our country and commonwealth.

Please join us and partners in your local communities in celebrating Earth Day tomorrow. Give $22 by April 22nd and your donation will be matched by our founder - and will help us invest in the next generation of leaders to continue to protect our environment and take action on the climate.

Co-Founders Patrick Murphy & Scott Wallace, and KD Board Chair Andrew Sommers
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/0M_MSM7PllnO6w_bVjlbvTH_tEtDkpSbXG5ulIqTFlw=/fAsrPPYuxZd0hSfQdwvzJIekmpJ6vSPFx9tev7TEKxg=)

body:

## SpaceX Rocket Explodes
Elon Musk hoped his Starship would [take a lap](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFyhCAQgOGnwQ5nXRWxoEhjd2lTOojrSQ7FYTHm3j5zV6f-m3--r9t4sz74_f5pNzJ5ieORIo_QSKwk1mNbzGYhQqoLMpXSCLqtWihWo6HWrSPbd42uprbp68n29aQQdKd6BYU3CFhDgxX0rW50aasKlXWqd7ZbwIFogGafYyq_o9_zSkt4xh9KpYtbEcya88Gi_hA4CByu6yoTnZkSv7rAYTrZ78QscLCUIh_WkZxpoZ1J4EAh7nI7-cHynX5lsOfuVmI503RmuQR_X7PkbBOv_pApugdlyU_OtMnXu3wxgMChSGY-Lh-CZ9WJBu6b9eG9mf8z-wsAAP__7ZBt0Q) around the Earth before plummeting into the Gulf of Mexico. It didn't get that far, but it did accomplish what company president Gwynne Shotwell called the real goal--"to not blow up the launchpad." This was the first attempt at launching the two-stage rocket combination of Starship + Super Heavy rocket, and it made it 24 miles into the Texas sky before failing to separate its two components. At that point, the spacecraft [self-destructed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1TxCAUAH9N0nHzeHwECgqbdGdrmUF4XFASMoHz9N87Z225s83Ovl2Xq88l77dXv5HrqS7HWdsCkiFnKBY1RpeIkMRIjmuDYBRXMK4uahDehGRConfhKZElrzRFbVEAxjE7BBQgkYNVRpqL5xy1D9oGPyUIMEigmHs9Lx81732lVH7qF52XULexuLX3ow3iZcB5wNkfOz3aUz3h7DkUGnBuhw_0zVr3Z1vzwYq_72FlVOrOtnv7ZNFaYyVwQoIpxBTspEQSCknKpAnH08XjkUvJTU-DhNvmc_kr6P_t-A0AAP__hQJgHg) and headed for the ocean. Elon Musk had given the launch a 50/50 shot at its best-case scenario (one trip around the globe and then falling into the sea), but he tweeted that SpaceX _" learned a lot for next test launch"_ and said another attempt will be made in a few months.
## House Passes Title IX Amendment
The House of Representatives passed the _Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act_. If the [bill](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD2P3CAUAH-N3bF6PDAfBUWa7TZtSgvDs02EwQKUVf79aa--cjTNaP681pdPOZXjt7_Ijb2ud6t9BcmQMxTrMke3EyGJmRxXBsEsfIH5dGqJkSNYDEYgtzHoaI3RmwcwdtNqTg4BBUjkYBcjzcNzjsoHZYPXOwSYJFBMo7bH35rKOGnP_-s_ao9Qrzm7c4y7T-LXhM8Jn_4u9O4f9YE2Usg04TPUcjTqnY3mSz-oRGrsXS8qrN-1jc42X5gfZ6ZBnfGwmIAQfMCNW04CBUmhVdRWWo9xbi7e75Rz6kpPEo7Lp_zdM36a8xUAAP__-O5kOA) passes through the Senate and gets President Biden's signature (it certainly won't) it will ban biological males from competing against women at federally supported schools and colleges. House Republicans are championing the bill as a [common-sense measure](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFvwyAUhH-Nvb0IA8b2wNDFW7p2tB74YagwWEAa9d9XydztTifdnb6v-3bHEEM6PvEk3VzerpLrxiTwAbjYxn7XjoiT6EkPauZsHoeR9V5PuNh5N9LMThmnyBpEiVJIXHDcJ9cHzRkXTPKBLeMs5xsOA1do1WJxcsyyTjLaQ8vl9p1Dap5c_M0_VG42n33UvrWrduKj42vH1-bJhxhfWcdXn09K9Kxv-ajU8VUsiikxwttDoethYrCYKlxYK5gQI7QMBhO0gqkelHYq8Hw1wRFKrOBKPqFan3OEeuXSKjTC87XSF71fzxBjqGrqJDtODO8zffuP2l8AAAD__2w7cO4) that prevents girls from facing unfair or dangerous competition. _" Biological women and girls should only be competing against other biological women and girls,"_ Rep. Beth Van Duyne (R-TX) _said. "And I don't care how many surgeries you have, I don't care how many chemicals you put into your body. You're not going to be a biological woman."_ House Democrats are reviling the bill and calling it an attack on vulnerable children.
## Alec Baldwin Cleared of Manslaughter
Prosecutors [are dropping](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1urTAQBOCngW6RWcxf4eI2dOe2KdFiL-DI2Mg2B523j0idbqQpZvR9veYXWWf99p8OVnkN8xlDmoUErAGbuS2NWpmRm5JV3Q0ohrZuRbkrNIuQXd-ORqzIYmh6OTa1Jk09S01LaRUKbITEWoztIIeK6ho70t2oqV-FFoUUbGwOsfoO1uedV_cJb46VDkfp1J7zmYrmX4FTgdN935Vekuc7PX2B0xMLnMixhoWcua0H69_BXT5T_MBBPjm6tj1zBL1T3DhBvFKGtIeQrd8gB1gYTAznyQZI5xAhnawtOXgcWF85xGeljMqct3XOpq4vpNgOsu73aP5L7ScAAP__fmpyNQ) an involuntary manslaughter charge against Alec Baldwin. The actor was rehearsing with a gun on the set of _****Rust****_ when the gun fired and cinematographer Halyna Hutchins was killed. Baldwin has maintained that he did not pull the trigger, although a forensic report states that the gun could not have fired without the trigger being pulled. The prosecutors [dropped the charges](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFvwyAQRn-NvREdh8FkYOiSLV07Wmc4bCpiLKCN-u-rdO72fXrL0_u4L3dKOR3bOz3Y9ViWs5a2wCRQClSLHoOLzMhqZCeNRbBaahh3F1ermZU2BCquGAlD9KjMSnI1E61jcgioYEIJV20neyEp0ZA3V09zBA_DBBxSL_XyWdLRd475p3xzvfjyGLPbez_boN4GvA14o_PgZ3uh16k9-cyvldmLlXJ4pkPUr9ZF20vp6diE36lu3ESo5Tw5CDVHzSStuU4zgFdaoULwljFIryyN1YXzmXJOzczDBNuDUv5z6f-F-Q0AAP__VL1jUw) after learning of "new facts that demand further investigation and forensic analysis." They made it clear that the charges may be filed again and that Baldwin is not yet completely exonerated.
➤ **Sen. Joe Manchin** (D-WV) attacked President Biden's handling of the debt crisis. He said the White House's unwillingness to negotiate a compromise signals a "deficiency of leadership" that needs to change. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LtuxCAQQNGvwR0rGONX4SKNu02b0hrDsEzEwzIkq_37KKlT3-bqfNz3O3Lk_HjHRGvzZT-vUndlJGgJ_T50bvVEQH1Hqx5nUPOgB9WF9TCwmIMMHmPv0WqvtNbTPA6oJrNY3fEKCnplQKtlmM18Q61hRDsuFievrBJGkeNWrttn4dwC-fgq33TdbEldXENrZxX9m4BNwNYCBY7xtwnYQkmU6VkFbJUyNhKw9cuoplnLhNkGzrJGTFUe7ChLXy7pyLNlyvYli5eR0NFVA58SzzPil6syWYtXCy_p6GgycuImz4hZwNZdqzufHCPXcRJGPRLy30zX_lP7CQAA___S2W8a)) ➤ **Larry Elder** is jumping into the '24 GOP presidential primary. Elder lost his bid for governor in California, but he gained national name recognition in the process. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFytCAURp9GOxy4AqsFxd_Y7d-mdFi46M2gOMCG7NtnNnXa7yvOmfNxX--WIp3bf3ugqSGtV05l5ZKBYDCuqvcmIAKOPRqhJ-CTEor3u0Ftw02OQvMJvQc7ByVnNYIKD7DW6Z4McBi5BMFnNclpsEKAtk7Pzt4Cd7yTHD3VlIfPRGfdMcRX-sI8uHT00ey1XqUb_3WwdLC01oaQvk9s5f13sFwpUiVXOliizfnFMHrMLNrn6XYsrO1Uke3pWZA9yLM3hM6N-XTa6FnNz-NiW07tPW7pYsBBskAYfZ-NvxrFSEXfOsm3w1L81ap_NfoJAAD__1FQakk)) ➤ **Fox News** host Dan Bongino is leaving the network. The former Secret Service agent was a regular contributor on Fox for 10 years. "This wasn't some WWE brawl that happened. We just couldn't come to terms on an extension." ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFu7CAQRb8GdyAYbBYXFK9xt69Nac3CeE2CwcJknfx95NRp79WRjs7bfb5jTDE__-NGri1l3ms5ZtlzUBz0PHTBLURAuiOnjAVpBzXIbnUeUPlRgx_0ENAsaJW1j3EcqbcmGOyiAwla9qDkONjeClQKDHozerwt0kvWSwqxlSreS8xtpSV9lxdV4cvWJbe2th9M_2MwMZjO8xQxB9opB8pN-CI-PxhMmc7juktNgcGEG9Xo8ZoCZv4o-Rlz4YnwRQdfyhe_AP4ADfoGWqxtS111YT9jSvEwN9bL54Yx_Uq0v4r8BAAA__8zoGG-)) ➤ **The Federal** Government has very little to show for its $1 billion worth of research into long-covid treatments. One reason for the poor results: the National Institute of Health hasn’t signed up a single patient for observation and testing. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7GOtCAUhZ8GOs3lAsoUFH9DN3-7pUG4jmwQjJIx-_Ybp97unOTkfPm-ntPTp5zK67_fyLalTvtRzwlUh6JDOWke7UKEJDlZMRgEo4UGvtqgFKgFZ6BRz0HMcgzRGJA-gp5JGp4sAkpQKOChjTK9FwIHH4ZH8OMCAZgCiqnVo_-uqbSVlvxT33T0oW4827W1_WTyH0PH0F3X1Z_Nt0LXeQ8YuvueoQP1yQxdruXVhfpOsStp7eaUc6qFoeOHjft113MYmYLX5lP-YNpfzr8BAAD__4Z2VVc))

clean_body: Elon Musk hoped his Starship would take a lap around the Earth before plummeting into the Gulf of Mexico. It didn’t get that far, but it did accomplish what company president Gwynne Shotwell called the real goal—”to not blow up the launchpad.” Elon Musk hoped his Starship would take a lap around the Earth before plummeting into the Gulf of Mexico. It didn’t get that far, but it did accomplish what company president Gwynne Shotwell called the real goal—”to not blow up the launchpad.” | | | | | | Friday, April 21, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today we're covering a SpaceX rocket exploding on its way to orbit, charges against Alec Baldwin being dropped, and Larry Elder jumping into the Presidential race. Is this your first time reading The Flyover? and never miss a thing. How did our Editor do today? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback for The Flyover and tell us exactly what you liked or didn't like in today's edition. Want to hear more news? and stay in touch. | SpaceX Rocket Explodes Elon Musk hoped his Starship would around the Earth before plummeting into the Gulf of Mexico. It didn't get that far, but it did accomplish what company president Gwynne Shotwell called the real goal--"to not blow up the launchpad." This was the first attempt at launching the two-stage rocket combination of Starship + Super Heavy rocket, and it made it 24 miles into the Texas sky before failing to separate its two components. At that point, the spacecraft and headed for the ocean. Elon Musk had given the launch a 50/50 shot at its best-case scenario (one trip around the globe and then falling into the sea), but he tweeted that SpaceX " learned a lot for next test launch" and said another attempt will be made in a few months. House Passes Title IX Amendment The House of Representatives passed the Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act. If the passes through the Senate and gets President Biden's signature (it certainly won't) it will ban biological males from competing against women at federally supported schools and colleges. House Republicans are championing the bill as a that prevents girls from facing unfair or dangerous competition. " Biological women and girls should only be competing against other biological women and girls," Rep. Beth Van Duyne (R-TX) said. "And I don't care how many surgeries you have, I don't care how many chemicals you put into your body. You're not going to be a biological woman." House Democrats are reviling the bill and calling it an attack on vulnerable children. Alec Baldwin Cleared of Manslaughter Prosecutors an involuntary manslaughter charge against Alec Baldwin. The actor was rehearsing with a gun on the set of **Rust when the gun fired and cinematographer Halyna Hutchins was killed. Baldwin has maintained that he did not pull the trigger, although a forensic report states that the gun could not have fired without the trigger being pulled. The prosecutors after learning of "new facts that demand further investigation and forensic analysis." They made it clear that the charges may be filed again and that Baldwin is not yet completely exonerated. ➤ Sen. Joe Manchin (D-WV) attacked President Biden's handling of the debt crisis. He said the White House's unwillingness to negotiate a compromise signals a "deficiency of leadership" that needs to change. () ➤ Larry Elder is jumping into the '24 GOP presidential primary. Elder lost his bid for governor in California, but he gained national name recognition in the process. () ➤ Fox News host Dan Bongino is leaving the network. The former Secret Service agent was a regular contributor on Fox for 10 years. "This wasn't some WWE brawl that happened. We just couldn't come to terms on an extension." (-) ➤ The Federal Government has very little to show for its $1 billion worth of research into long-covid treatments. One reason for the poor results: the National Institute of Health hasn’t signed up a single patient for observation and testing. () ➤ Tom Brady is 44, but he may not hang up his cleats just yet. He declined to rule out a return when asked about playing for the Dolphins. () ➤ Oakland is losing another professional sports team to Los Vegas. The A's have reached an agreement to purchase stadium land close to the Vegas Strip. () ➤ The Warriors are losing patience with Draymond Green. () Market Report 4/20/23 | ▼ | Nasdaq Natl. On the heels of the 2nd largest bank failure in US history and the 9th interest rate hike in the last 12 months, a staggering **186 more banks are on the brink of collapse.** **" Could your bank be next?"** The Fed's reckless recent printing of **$300,000,000** **to bail out more struggling banks** has further devalued the dollar (and your savings) and pushed inflation trending toward all-time highs. If your bank goes under, do you really think the government is going to bail you out like it did SVB and Signature Bank? The **FDIC can 't even cover SVB **and Signature Bank combined deposits, so how can you expect them to cover your deposits if your bank fails? name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=09cb95754a2e43eba10d27b4be68378c&_e=QndiSAsOhxU2TFhdFfwWJLFc-vEYmm6eOX_IMiqEaiq8BgGcKA79IQHWRaysyr4ZmhKjx0BPZzIPTAACYvGWseJvLt13Tfv6GZuoZK26hOZ-RbrdZpbb8bK4y_jj_1WwLyeh19HYxYifRQ0X0HagW5Gb9rVYFwj5yGdgG4pFVpzDKCTF1Bxo_p_KgionSbrNeQz4IbahLVuQtfyvoizR8pCUQpUFjbCEbCTF22X-TJXalcyLknttqd77aYrdgRHc_-wPhJKFoKSCtgeMgRg4xA%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=09cb95754a2e43eba10d27b4be68378c&_e=QndiSAsOhxU2TFhdFfwWJLFc-vEYmm6eOX_IMiqEaiq8BgGcKA79IQHWRaysyr4ZmhKjx0BPZzIPTAACYvGWseJvLt13Tfv6GZuoZK26hOZ-RbrdZpbb8bK4y_jj_1WwV2K2FHUBKuGZB25af7WOqTjAs3O0fmY_75KbOD6HqwTgNKeq47lLQd3fc-YJe0xEI_K0Mge5tFRq6zYgT7s_0vdQOTLE7h6r3_8dmnje-msjpMNK-8ZoVjFiZz7GGkEXxbnGbNdsGWv0Xdtars0rtQ%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=09cb95754a2e43eba10d27b4be68378c&_e=QndiSAsOhxU2TFhdFfwWJLFc-vEYmm6eOX_IMiqEaiq8BgGcKA79IQHWRaysyr4ZmhKjx0BPZzIPTAACYvGWseJvLt13Tfv6GZuoZK26hOZ-RbrdZpbb8bK4y_jj_1WwzjDIqzP-iI0k0cBGzpvN3FsmvoKv0unAc--gK9SvJ7e9Zrb1byPE5eUgrwvDRxmoRRTjrcrzLQnJIu16Kq0qCISCaVcdzgI4DqPEgVOdChbgxuPYOoOQ4V6ufZtbrM5PKQFmn0_UYZbd1KQSz7WAoQ%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=09cb95754a2e43eba10d27b4be68378c&_e=QndiSAsOhxU2TFhdFfwWJLFc-vEYmm6eOX_IMiqEaiq8BgGcKA79IQHWRaysyr4ZmhKjx0BPZzIPTAACYvGWseJvLt13Tfv6GZuoZK26hOZ-RbrdZpbb8bK4y_jj_1WwzRe9HkjAPWrOjBS2TT_IUmEVPMdxQ9qvGkWLGnaR_SHHF2Urf3k3FfUupLixhmKGofI6oF5SVt0b8-MIA2OguXw7DueN2Ze__5zEqgt8CcjH_FYRNqJw4wZig41SfcRGp4l7MZI9E1sxCNfkRo7YMQ%3D%3D)

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Future generations are counting on your response
body:
It's clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation

Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor?
This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9482ee4e83634c40b2f76754c94de92a&_e=rGVlfVHgsX6IAV32aM4qCwf9YFrid31kZw0zZrxOK6Yg9q8PU7WIx5yL1myXoLZjh2Uf1Ia-dRxqCce1NGWOv30J2CH-Ckjrw2LrBQNq8YcVoFsgITtejUQxzXZKGpXssWYV7DdTN5c-wI3Fru0ENDGjbPOsmIc3PW3kZad5_1-M0BtfIhGhdPJuuI-G-bHf1dohFVreA6ideO5BR_6oX--mxv4OxfWkbBLd0ElCW-75dx1FBubadP_ry7XbvZps5K0vC6_TOEwTfDJJQe6fkYgm2IrwPndgHZ8esvytXCk78t35bXA3S9zNfBEgTkR5agQzr53F2kWdBScd7Mu1JK4BTfAnELO9BrdOa1Dbt09JgMTWi2Gj6mRH-BUjs3DmsWqsJn9sGaa1CLQUriKHng%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College's [**RECLAIM AMERICA 'S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9482ee4e83634c40b2f76754c94de92a&_e=rGVlfVHgsX6IAV32aM4qCwf9YFrid31kZw0zZrxOK6Yg9q8PU7WIx5yL1myXoLZjh2Uf1Ia-dRxqCce1NGWOv30J2CH-Ckjrw2LrBQNq8YcVoFsgITtejUQxzXZKGpXssWYV7DdTN5c-wI3Fru0ENDGjbPOsmIc3PW3kZad5_1-M0BtfIhGhdPJuuI-G-bHf1dohFVreA6ideO5BR_6oX--mxv4OxfWkbBLd0ElCW-75dx1FBubadP_ry7XbvZpsA034I72ChJ7v4QzDozprgTC0SVTsVSEfcp5drndbq2CeNXexEsguAIPjkh8SulE3N4A4ov7ho50HE60Kz-nRH9qDvFkupWIe7SovO-gpn0stJ8571zHT9YDUpxr-l6Xg-JnQ4iybVlHNhnCFV0Y4sw%3D%3D) My name is Bill Gray, and I'm the Vice President of National Donor Outreach at Hillsdale College. It's my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. **I don 't use the word "battle" lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt.** It's clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation--a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called "progressives" seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. _The New York Times'_ "1619 Project" is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation's history. If you haven't heard, the "1619 Project" places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that "all men are created equal" and endowed by God with "unalienable rights." **" Our democracy's founding ideals," the "1619 Project" proclaims, "were false when they were written."** Outrageous! _The New York Times '_ stated goal with the "1619 Project" is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery--not freedom--is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayis won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the "1619 Project" into a feature film. **Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans --and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas.** Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our** _most urgent priority._** Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. **We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective.** Hillsdale is America's most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism--our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to efforts such as the media-driven "1619 Project" that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work--especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the **RECLAIM AMERICA 'S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. **As _The New York Times '_ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. ** _Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible._ And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale's work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. subject: Here’s how I’d fix things in Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
It's time to stop complaining and actually fix the problem without apology.

| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5d8912e7c8e74277ae50de5e17e048b4&_e=1CgquXQFnzTdXTGEnHFmjaYrd_QsG6EYgMurhagdMSqUBGG8HWKdRxr4FpRBsyeZyEj6EpW7-oL50_myATY85hIA8DL_Eh1q5bKQqfskZBqxoHptVu_4y3bpgDAdCrZKVM84Zs0NQhRIuAKg-zlDKjE0tnw3pAapT4KXwtjMa064xpj97hYL_CNHTmn4-FtfLvRVq_iv1jsSlVPZdVpG8B7RHeQWmL83VNlQ-O4tGNHLy3T1irFe26SGY6bsZEjJoCYUi_xb9WmbsixcU4dF1Pc5nF5BBcOEUqw3RKymEUM6OIC0qOKJoHh-yLsEZ6I9IOPgOwKYz6uYDviuum1eFGsb-EX8NgXljQkh3-K1cEbmS6wF0jAEx5W_bh0GEhNg)
Fellow American -

Over the course of this election, I am laying my vision for an American national revival.

Here's one promise for you: I will end the weaponization of police power in America.

Time to stop complaining and actually *fix* the problem without apology.
1. Shut down + replace the FBI
2. Shut down + replace the IRS
3. Pardon all federal defendants prosecuted based on political motives. This includes Douglass Mackey & nonviolent January 6 defendants denied due process
4. Hold Congress accountable for taxpayer $$ used as hush money for sexual harassment claims
5. Publish the Jeffrey Epstein client list: the police state can't be weaponized to protect a select few.

Fellow American, if you agree, and want these policies debated on the main stage of the Republican Presidential Primary, then I need your help. **[Chip in $1 to build this movement toward our American revival.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5d8912e7c8e74277ae50de5e17e048b4&_e=1CgquXQFnzTdXTGEnHFmjaYrd_QsG6EYgMurhagdMSqUBGG8HWKdRxr4FpRBsyeZyEj6EpW7-oL50_myATY85hIA8DL_Eh1q5bKQqfskZBqxoHptVu_4y3bpgDAdCrZKVM84Zs0NQhRIuAKg-zlDKjE0tnw3pAapT4KXwtjMa064xpj97hYL_CNHTmn4-FtfLvRVq_iv1jsSlVPZdVpG8JRoi6c_Xn93Ib64kTFI7GCYD2xo89NWngGT0o-vtfmunSn1fu_zmKz7W3wjA9DfzDh1XiIYapKJ3dCI4g6JFFSM267xp3ZL4jbQGPBqI8TNGg5GJOgqO114Aj1_GkGtmkQFjiAMQ2hkwx0Y8CgB5a0whK9ynGJJt_uxn0L2irer)**

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5d8912e7c8e74277ae50de5e17e048b4&_e=1CgquXQFnzTdXTGEnHFmjaYrd_QsG6EYgMurhagdMSqUBGG8HWKdRxr4FpRBsyeZyEj6EpW7-oL50_myATY85hIA8DL_Eh1q5bKQqfskZBqxoHptVu_4y3bpgDAdCrZKVM84Zs0NQhRIuAKg-zlDKjE0tnw3pAapT4KXwtjMa064xpj97hYL_CNHTmn4-FtfLvRVq_iv1jsSlVPZdVpG8JgqVjLx-3hsiA9K9P5lO8phPSkmlyPn9Ql6iDAh3El6DRw89J0yETujxPqCKS3YqgMJ_YjDjGhvYTAmtv0hkwzMJRFRbIcaqoCc16llUq0wTc4HUiINFzG17NF6awAacmOWDnu6VbCOHnmwkFpBk9r_KqGHzoFg1tumRxKWSfjp)

| [** DONATE TODAY -> **](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5d8912e7c8e74277ae50de5e17e048b4&_e=1CgquXQFnzTdXTGEnHFmjaYrd_QsG6EYgMurhagdMSqUBGG8HWKdRxr4FpRBsyeZyEj6EpW7-oL50_myATY85hIA8DL_Eh1q5bKQqfskZBqxoHptVu_4y3bpgDAdCrZKVM84Zs0NQhRIuAKg-zlDKjE0tnw3pAapT4KXwtjMa064xpj97hYL_CNHTmn4-FtfLvRVq_iv1jsSlVPZdVpG8Dd781QQUCTu9ENsIdUFHn5OMU4TkYdEBTFgty1y5UA-3qPYVv7e_nWA2vLHVWSK8fNWFIPQiJqZhK-A7LZaE7p3hnf53Gjekil6bVhoZFNHtQ8JSxKC-3Qz112RJplmxqP-V8m5dCog8BT7hThNzEgB4AbImdEl_4Yc_Duik89X)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5d8912e7c8e74277ae50de5e17e048b4&_e=1CgquXQFnzTdXTGEnHFmjaYrd_QsG6EYgMurhagdMSqUBGG8HWKdRxr4FpRBsyeZyEj6EpW7-oL50_myATY85hIA8DL_Eh1q5bKQqfskZBqxoHptVu_4y3bpgDAdCrZKVM84Zs0NQhRIuAKg-zlDKjE0tnw3pAapT4KXwtjMa064xpj97hYL_CNHTmn4-FtfLvRVq_iv1jsSlVPZdVpG8Fb_c7nllf0SooA1hyRwjSYn57DFBtNn_fpekRoDJtlAMbr9496r6DbwuS2XLHEpkE60B6vXEN1rGZmrnbrW4LuuL20UL00KJ9rLd3E9r1h7hGYgUy0Skal-hm8KUDSy92lH3swlJQLq_Oh3zqS-e1Z-l4FL3HBiy0SD1wc7pJsH)

clean_body: My team just informed me that your membership status is still INACTIVE | | | | | Over 4,000 Republicans have already renewed their membership to the Congressional Leadership Circle! My team just informed me that your membership status is still INACTIVE - and we're running out of membership cards! "Will you accept my invitation to renew at 50% OFF today?" Last fall was just the beginning. We took back the House - but if we're going to keep it, expand it, and sweep Democrats out of the Senate and White House in 2024 we're going to need you with us. | | Democrats are counting on us - on YOU - to falter. They want to divide us. They want us to stay home & give up. It's the only way they can ram through their unpopular, America LAST agenda. This is why I am personally emailing you today. As Speaker of the House, it is my duty to defend our majority, expand our ranks, and deliver for YOU. Truly, this isn't about me - it's about protecting my incumbents and boosting GOP momentum so we can best serve YOU. Step 1 to accomplishing this goal is securing your commitment to the Republican Party. "Confirm you’re with me, %%FirstNamec%%. Use my special Speaker’s link to active your membership at 50% OFF:" | | I can't do this without you. My team will update me with the names of those who heed my call to action today. I hope to see your name. Thank you for your time and patriotic support, Kevin McCarthy Speaker of the House | | * | Paid for by McCarthy for Congress PO Box 12667 Bakersfield, CA 93389 Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: We can overcome the current threats to our democracy.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

Team,
For years, gerrymandering has been used as an anti-democratic tactic to win unearned power. **And Republican operatives have no plans to stop using and abusing it.**
The good news is that maps across the country are the fairest they've been in decades because of our work. Ahead of the 2022 elections, the _New York Times_ called the congressional map the fairest in 40 years. As a result, more voters like you were able to cast their ballots in fair districts than the previous decade.
**[I know All On The Line will continue to make a difference and be able to fight back against attacks on our democracy. Our work continues and we will need support from folks like you -- will you make a contribution to All On The Line?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62103699/402317417/-721137812?refcode=20230421_AOTL_P_EHHB1_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA5Mjc2MWM5LTRjZTAtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1-U56KapTDhoksW_ZXIE7ALJepj267iqFdtrug-zwHs=)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

[DONATE $50](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62103702/402317420/-721137812?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20230421_AOTL_P_EHHB1_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA5Mjc2MWM5LTRjZTAtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1-U56KapTDhoksW_ZXIE7ALJepj267iqFdtrug-zwHs=) | [DONATE $100](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62103703/402317421/-721137812?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20230421_AOTL_P_EHHB1_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA5Mjc2MWM5LTRjZTAtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1-U56KapTDhoksW_ZXIE7ALJepj267iqFdtrug-zwHs=)
[DONATE $250](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62103704/402317422/-721137812?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=20230421_AOTL_P_EHHB1_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA5Mjc2MWM5LTRjZTAtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1-U56KapTDhoksW_ZXIE7ALJepj267iqFdtrug-zwHs=) | [Another Amount](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62103705/402317423/-721137812?refcode=20230421_AOTL_P_EHHB1_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA5Mjc2MWM5LTRjZTAtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1-U56KapTDhoksW_ZXIE7ALJepj267iqFdtrug-zwHs=)
The bad news is that a new wave of anti-democratic tactics has already begun. Republicans in North Carolina want the state's highest court to reverse a decision, made just weeks before the request, that ruled in favor of fair maps. This political act is cynical. Neither the case nor the law have changed in those weeks \-- only the justices that makeup the North Carolina Supreme Court have changed.
But there's good news. We can and we are fighting back against cynical, partisan tactics like these. All On The Line continues our fight to end gerrymandering, and there is still time to get involved. **We need supporters like you to help us keep up the fight for fairness and voter protection.**
**[Can you contribute to All On The Line today to help our work to safeguard our democracy against these brazen attempts to undermine judicial independence?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62103706/402317424/-721137812?refcode=20230421_AOTL_P_EHHB1_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA5Mjc2MWM5LTRjZTAtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1-U56KapTDhoksW_ZXIE7ALJepj267iqFdtrug-zwHs=)**
Together, we have overcome a lot. We overcame four of the darkest years in our nation's history. We overcame relentless efforts to manipulate our election maps. And together in this pivotal moment, **we can overcome the current threats to our democracy.**
\-- A.G. Holder

**_All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering._**

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Fight profit-hungry tactics that are killing bees and our planet
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | Friend, do you think greedy corporations should be allowed to DESTROY our food system and planet for profit? We don't either. But right now, **the pesticide industry's profit-hungry tactics are putting our precious bees at EXTREME RISK. Skyrocketing bee deaths could soon threaten our food supply, which means some of our most nutritious foods could soon be scarce and expensive. MILLIONS of families could be priced out of essential foods -- unless we fight back now!** **And to make matters worse, pesticide companies and Big Ag are STILL contaminating our environment with chemicals that are TOXIC to bees.** These neurotoxic pesticides -- called neonics -- cause major neurological damage to our tiny pollinators. Even in small doses, neonics severely damage bees' ability to communicate, reproduce, fight pests and disease, and forage for food. **In higher doses, bees just don't stand a chance! **
[](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1731943?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) Neonics are the most widely used insecticides in the world. **But here's the bombshell truth: Studies show little to NO BENEFIT to crop yields for neonic seed coatings on soybeans -- one of their biggest uses! **What's more, neonics can damage soil health, worsen harmful pest problems and contribute to MASSIVE bee die-offs. Ecological methods like organic farming can save precious bees and protect our food security.**But the pesticide industry is doing everything it can to BLOCK bee-saving policies and sway public opinion AGAINST these crucial alternatives.** We need your urgent help to fight back! **Right now, a group of generous donors is matching all gifts up to our $180,000 Earth Day goal, so we can protect precious bees, stop the pesticide corporations from contaminating our ecosystem for profit and protect our planet for generations to come. But this rare match EXPIRES AT MIDNIGHT TOMORROW, and we're falling behind on our critical goal! ** **We need 33 more gifts from supporters in your area to stay on track for our Earth Day goal. So please: ** [**Will you make a membership gift of $27 or more now -- while $27 becomes $54! -- to help Friends of the Earth protect precious pollinators, hold Big Polluters accountable, and achieve a healthy, sustainable future for our planet?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1731944?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [$27 donation + $27 match = $54 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1731945?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

name: Freedom First Project
subject: US Dollar’s Dying Breath? - Biden’s Endgame EXPOSED!
body:

# The US Dollar May Be On Its Last Breath!

Folks, we might be seeing the dying kicks of the US Dollar...

And your retirement savings could be in for a devastating reckoning.

See...

China and Russia just signed 14 mega deals to trade in their own currencies, completely bypassing the US Dollar.

And as if that wasn't bad enough...

Saudi Arabia recently declared it's hell-bent on trading oil in the Chinese Yuan, which could spell disaster for the petrodollar.

Talk about adding insult to injury, huh?

[This impending shift could hurl the US Dollar into a tailspin...](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)

Pulling the rug out from under the petrodollar...

And wiping out your IRA and 401(k) savings faster than you can say "hyperinflation" or "banking crisis."
But the mainstream media prefers to distract you with news about Donald Trump's witch hunt instead.
---

Fortunately, there's [a genius IRS Loophole that could shield your hard-earned money ](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._Swt08jWiXnjLDS7jg)from this unprecedented attack on the petrodollar.

And when you [claim your FREE wealth-protection guide right now...](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)

You'll discover how you can [exploit this little-known IRS-proof loophole ](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)to shield your retirement savings in just 1 simple step.

But you've got to hurry.

China, Russia, India, and oil-rich Saudi Arabia have assembled a powerful anti-dollar coalition...

And they're chipping away at the foundation of the petrodollar right now as we speak.

So don't take this ongoing currency war lightly.

Trillions of dollars are on the line - and when this house of cards finally comes crashing down...

You could be left with nothing to show for your years of hard, back-breaking work.

The clock is ticking.

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: This is our wake up call...action is needed NOW
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | We have good news and bad news. First, the bad news: We’re hurtling toward climate disaster, and corporations are taking every opportunity to dismantle hard-fought environmental protections, destroy our public lands and waters, and accelerate mass extinction... just so they can profit at our expense. The good news: We can fight this together, and what better time to do so than now, for Earth Day? Friends of the Earth has been working overtime to fight for people and our planet -- before it’s too late. But we can’t do it without you. To keep up the fight, we urgently need to raise $180,000 **by midnight tomorrow.** That’s why we need YOU to donate as generously as you can today. Can you help us meet our goal? **Please, Friend, make a special Earth Day donation of $27 or more by midnight tomorrow. Donate now and your gift will be matched dollar-for-dollar, doubling your impact!** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [$27 donation + $27 match = $54 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732088?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

The facts are sobering. This past year has been one of the worst ever for scores of species -- including wild bees and gray wolves -- as well as for climate change.
The Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change just gave the world its strongest warning that there is absolutely no time left to delay action on climate change. If we don’t act now, more areas of the planet will become unlivable. Extreme weather events will become more common. And the degradation of our ice caps and forests could tip us into increasing rates of global warming.
In short, **we don’t have much time left before complete ecological disaster.**
That’s why we’ve ramped up our efforts this year. **We’re not only running our typical campaigns** \-- including shifting our food and energy systems, protecting our oceans and forests, and more -- **but we’re also rapidly responding to new daily threats as they arise.**
Over the course of our history as an organization, we’ve seen and accomplished a lot together. And more than ever, we need your support -- as does our planet.
**Friend, please donate $27 or more to Friends of the Earth by MIDNIGHT TOMORROW. **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | [$27 donation + $27 match = $54 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732088?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [$50 donation + $50 match = $100 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732089?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [$100 donation + $100 match = $200 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732090?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Double another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732091?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**With your support, we pick strategic targets and run winning campaigns.** We use all the tools in our toolbox, from _hard-hitting research_ that exposes corruption and blocks dangerous policies, to _corporate campaigning_ that disrupts polluters’ actions and holds them accountable.
And we’re not just focused on immediate needs or reacting to the bad news of the day. We’re organizing to build long-term political power, for a healthy, just, sustainable world. **We’re changing the systems at the root cause of environmental harm, not just addressing the symptoms.**
This transformative leadership is thanks to you. With your support, we’ve been able to boldly push for urgent change. For decades, we’ve been a fearless, tenacious watchdog for people and our planet, and our expertise is perfect for this moment. **But now we’re counting on your membership support so we can continue this important work, Friend.**
Right now, a generous group of donors will match your gift dollar-for-dollar up to $180,000, doubling your impact!
**Please give as generously as you can. Rush a donation to Friends of the Earth today.**

body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/PrUW_-htV8vqiC4P9nP3CR9d98f-cSG2mcwcAp_xxV4=/DSy8-owsBjpNpW8YpXU_cRT2uOrfEOeor5-BUk69fZ4=)

Friend,

With the violent criminal attack on a female NYPD officer this week, some Republicans are trying to blame President Biden. As a son of a Philly cop and a former prosecutor, like you, I was outraged. The American people know public safety is one of, if not the, main jobs of our government. We would never condone violent behavior against our local police force - and the facts from the FBI show attacks against police are down 25% these last couple of years under President Biden.

Please check out our work getting the facts straight on these crucial issues on the national stage & please help spread the word.

Share This Message Here: [https://video.foxnews.com/v/6325399786112](https://act.myngp.com/el/PrUW_-htV8vqiC4P9nP3CR9d98f-cSG2mcwcAp_xxV4=/AnMrgEmsMSCVCS3gqedDdDOkCCsgrq3-au1fR2BOPOc=)

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Earth Day: Did you know?
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | EARTH DAY TRIVIA KNOWLEDGE IS POWER. TEST YOUR EXPERTISE BY CLICKING ON THE CORRECT ANSWER TO THE QUESTION BELOW: | Which of the following are ways the Endangered Species Act benefits life on Earth? | **A. **[**It protects species at risk of extinction**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732327?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) **B.** [**It is an effective safeguard in the fight to protect our public lands that endangered species need to recover**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732327?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) **C.** [**It gives the federal government power to enforce a recovery plan for endangered species **](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732327?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) **D.** [**All of the above**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732327?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
This year, the Endangered Species Act turns 50 years old -- and we have much to celebrate thanks to this critical act. Its success rate is incredible: it has saved 99% of species protected under it from extinction!

But the attacks on ESA protections are threatening one of our most powerful tools to protect vulnerable species, their ecosystems, and our planet. Friends of the Earth is doing all we can to fight back, and I hope that with you by our side, we can continue to push back and win!

In honor of Earth Day, a generous group of donors has agreed to donate all gifts up to our goal of $180,000, but only until midnight tomorrow. [**Will you make a contribution of $27 or more and help fuel our fight to protect the ESA, endangered species, and our planet?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732328?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Our average donation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I've said this since day one - this campaign is a bottom-up grassroots effort. It’s run not by Washington insiders but by people like you.

|
[**$28.99**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z73nunqtlfasdi3vr9mrptiackaht4uc188550p8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1ie8p74c9h2bs)
That's our average donation this month, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign less than 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference.

This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, **[I need you to join me and put some skin in the game with me.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z5hbot7ntj9oik1fd1bfu1k95bg740umd2tar6mg_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1ie8p74c9h2bs)**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $1, $5, or even our average gift for this month- $28.99?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2oaohmt37umv8gmodae0o94iidc5uls9mre5cvo_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1ie8p74c9h2bs)**

| [Chip in $1 ➔](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2runu8m0hn60pfqltfg9tn31eu2cd0fmup2trog_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1ie8p74c9h2bs) | | [Chip in $5 ➔](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zo5f3ddah1e1nhnddhelie0mh6nnpu6o2nepm3s0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1ie8p74c9h2bs)
---|---|---
[Chip in $10 ➔](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z7t9aoc2hneabrvtc8rbjtsrreuefh34cdvdjb30_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1ie8p74c9h2bs) | | [Chip in $28.99 ➔](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zpu4a212ctgso27edfjlv6kf0i04an6r97nduee8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1ie8p74c9h2bs)

This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens.

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite.

We are **leading** this race with actual *solutions.* I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. **[But, I need your help to amplify our ideas and message.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z84ajdeq49qo1l1vlnah2ldmi1kloib19am15l7o_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1ie8p74c9h2bs)**

**[Please add your voice to the growing number of grassroots leaders joining our movement.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zdhnrrk78f56kundhh5mlvkj3pvud6d7pcjk5ie8_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1ie8p74c9h2bs)**

Thanks,

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zkpb2dkmg0ciok8gs425j1prfkc0ntsboe84lppo_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1ie8p74c9h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** CHIP IN $28.99 -> **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zibr1m05f0dcqddfdsak9f1g7p4vdvaljrqhfo0g_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1ie8p74c9h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zh6acc1odd41co578tkfv61pag50alqdkicpq078_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1ie8p74c9h2bs)

---

| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z10lbchltabu8svq0bs8fa5u3lcq9plra9n92koo_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1ie8p74c9h2bs)| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z58ale556lgilmotab5f4fqfuq2b0436s59uh39o_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1ie8p74c9h2bs)| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8lbl5u6v45t88r571hg3uoe8a5th7cppaiq1lm0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1ie8p74c9h2bs)
---|---|---

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: What can you do in your own backyard?
body:
Recently, I had a long conversation with someone about our country's difficulties.

| | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=468f4116baec4e29aad41c5c43ebcd61&_e=V7QryQpovQQVDGa2t1ZDsQ45RHMv1LgC2TmlxFlnIjXOrWG8urGGYtAqnKhviR1X13uQPkQst9OSCmseTS2O3yvMDSr5Bezfd3c1ZjqCI-30ds3GJmzvSCKL1daivNYSNxlSC02iVlgCz6MO_c_eDH3V1sxO1iG8EB_agwj2fVkjY2qdxXKH2H_W2Nw5Ihr0kKr8cTA2WsDILtyIW1cMpJXxq12lFuJcmOmqW2b5z9R9Ja82HC_ezbY_bx4EUcg6fnxPQUhf_pkzNhdRHgbv5MKgk9XURyHq5OY8vXzg3XRMWRjAQE_V-_PPcKyC9IxYYvCgqOjtDPO_WrdnUIFbvh2SW5VhjpBK7zCYjAEUZNlJSEkWrzPi1NjAO5M3KhGSVJHHcovqt8BHisVzggxNRSYnMLqX_5S5k__L4pl5uQ0%3D)
---
| | Recently, I had a long conversation with someone about our country's difficulties.
They were especially concerned about critical race theory and how "progressives" are pushing this dangerous ideology into American schools, businesses, and even the military.
**They kept asking me, "what can I do?" **
That may be a question you're asking yourself right now as well.
**My answer is always the same --EDUCATION! **
That's because education is our surest defense against radical ideologies like critical race theory.
By supporting our educational outreach efforts, you're reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.
But, if you want to do something closer to home, we've recently printed thousands of copies of our issue of _Imprimis_ ,** "Critical Race Theory: What It Is and How to Fight It,"** for you to share with your family, friends, neighbors, and colleagues.
That's because there's a good chance that your neighbors have never heard critical race theory, even if it's happening in your local schools.
To make it easier for you, we've wrapped the copies in packs of ten, and we'll send you one for your generous tax-deductible gift of any amount today.
The print issue is perfect for leaving at a doctor's office or sending to teachers in your local schools.
So, not only will you support the expansion of effective outreach efforts like free online courses, classical K-12 education, and of course, _Imprimis_ , with your gift, but you can also have an effect in your neighborhood.
**To give a gift and receive your ten copies of **_**Imprimis**_**, "Critical Race Theory: What It Is and How to Fight It," to hand out, visit the secure link below: **
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/fight-critical-race-theory-10-pack](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=468f4116baec4e29aad41c5c43ebcd61&_e=V7QryQpovQQVDGa2t1ZDsQ45RHMv1LgC2TmlxFlnIjXOrWG8urGGYtAqnKhviR1X13uQPkQst9OSCmseTS2O3yvMDSr5Bezfd3c1ZjqCI-30ds3GJmzvSCKL1daivNYSNxlSC02iVlgCz6MO_c_eDH3V1sxO1iG8EB_agwj2fVkjY2qdxXKH2H_W2Nw5Ihr0kKr8cTA2WsDILtyIW1cMpJXxq12lFuJcmOmqW2b5z9R9Ja82HC_ezbY_bx4EUcg6fnxPQUhf_pkzNhdRHgbv5Cm15kSwc1bKu9kV8ni8paJG_7IglRFxFqqYrZed1-GQTXRsawcCmIgUPDeuxb5rmwTn2SOZkAD0jM7KUefeVI9usLhGvYimu9qeLOazu49TUGJqSANEMOwAtq2HhRO9QPpfCfdaeiftIl1F0FQbAUw%3D)**
Please allow me to extend my heartfelt thanks for everything you do to preserve and defend liberty for future generations.
You're countering the far-Left's aggressive efforts to destroy informed patriotism nationwide and in your own backyard. We greatly appreciate what _you 're doing!_
With gratitude,
Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

Freedom Nation Today
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=468f4116baec4e29aad41c5c43ebcd61&_t=UWQMLgWcUXAOrwWerffJtcaKDOpWDgsTyEG6ZRaN-VESio14OCTWGCyOnzk7Dll-Sv2C47kijinfMUCG7sZok6rsA-faL_b0P6AQpXY8Rq5i8562k6cddCCNpRwBeqRkovoCNxh03wgfYP0aZ9qGMtAdMqCghokzD_i4UdNgPpA%3D)

name: Al Franken via Blue Amp Action
subject: My friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley just made a BIG announcement.
body:
key 2024 House district

| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T20552c8a-6bfe-4af0-ba24-75c031f3bfd7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._

| | | | | _Hi! Cliff here, and we have a special guest who'd like to speak with you! A_ _s they say in the business Al used to be in, Senator Franken, take it away!......._ [__](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf8851265-57c9-4d2c-bdd6-821c5e2a998d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Dear Person Who Opens My Email, My friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley just made a BIG announcement. Josh is running for Congress in New York’s 19th District — a key district to taking back the House in 2024. He ran for the seat last cycle in his first political race, nearly defeating a 30-year career politician and Republican Marcus Molinaro – losing 50.8% to 49.2% in a district where some Democrats at the top of the ticket lost by more than 6 points. Josh will win this time! And I will give you five reasons why 2024 promises to be better than 2022. **[But first, let’s help Josh’s 2024 campaign get off to a great start. Will you join me right now by splitting a contribution of $10 or more between Josh Riley and Blue Amp Action right now? He’s not taking corporate PAC money and he’s counting on individual supporters like you and me, Peter.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T74ba9c4a-b3dc-43ff-a0e1-9c55eaec9e18/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta4e4204e-0e1d-4443-aa48-fd08e2ff4f4a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Here are five reasons why 2022 was a seriously hard year to win in New York as a Democrat, and why it’s so impressive Josh came as close to winning as he did:
1. **Redistricting**. Last cycle, the New York State Legislature drew a congressional map that the New York State Courts deemed too partisan — so they threw it out and redrew it themselves. Unfortunately, for five months Josh had been running in the wrong damn district! The only good part is that the working-class town Josh grew up in remained in the newly formed 19th District. But Josh had a whole bunch of new territory in which to make himself known.
2. **Primaries**. Josh had to win an expensive primary challenge in late August against a strong opponent. Still, Josh won the primary by a nearly two-to-one margin. By working his butt off, not that he had much of a butt to start with—have you seen this guy? Beanpole!
3. **Marc Molinaro**. Josh’s Republican opponent in the general election had already been a State Assembly Member, County Executive and GOP candidate for governor in 2018, losing to then-Governor Cuomo. Molinaro gained wide name recognition and had no challengers in his 2022 primary. But now he has a record to run on–and it’s not a good one. He’s voting 95% of the time with Marjorie Taylor-Greene!
4. **Crazy GOP Attack Ads**. Republicans had momentum statewide, and they ran tons of deeply dishonest dark money ads that said crap like, “Josh Riley’s allies want to defund the police.” I don’t know who Josh’s “allies” are but Josh and I funded the police—getting crisis intervention training and bullet proof vests for local police departments across the country. It was completely false, and it was sickening.
5. **Midterm vs. Presidential Years**. 2024 will not be a midterm! Ultimately, too many New York Democrats didn’t show up in a number of races this past cycle. But this time, not only is the presidency on the line – so is the Supreme Court. You can bet Democrats will turn out!

So now that you know how tough 2022 was — and how CLOSE Josh came to pulling it off — are you ready to join me in supporting Josh for 2024? **[Split a contribution to support Blue Amp Action and Josh’s campaign — he’s going to win one of the most important races in America for 2024 and I want you to be a part of it.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6d06f139-0b0a-446b-99c5-ed7c0e7fb636/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Thanks, Al [**P.S. I like the P.S. because it’s one more opportunity to ask for a donation. So donate now!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T96b902fd-938b-4622-93d4-0e8229544fb1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

|

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Here’s Why President Trump Supports My Bill to Target Cartels
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAN CRENSHAW FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PqSar126pgxjBwxJK70SYZY_tSkwEbgnRTLr8pgtWT9t3d7Dq2X7V8AeyBnMh5IPZpBKrFLraFVm8kti-o4oCMyHE7j1jmVc_0FHAaCOLmHafgZQHWMJJAZIF3aVaFYTidcrHSTf5A325kNFIJveaGBfy08lKUdmmSvBgLtQcy7e3Z2pE79uA2t4npS-TX-o-yxpBmKyLmrbcOpGZLZIAz6NppHOWtBvI5ilaUEI4PeF1zgQp6E5H8mAsxPw9OzIZDkGoZBQUBdQFnqTKNfLCbiQ9cCb4FnHwyWqYXme7JLdW9LrAMVuFNp4yos8OcSk_3ArIWQrP6uuAt37TT32UQ==&c=1tCYVAquiObHOsJi3IXuMXgyB4G3bEFQXa0T5A2xMUph1QEmEImhpQ==&ch=1oxjzH3Nhx5a0tLnEmdHMXu_oXqwaEUI8pahGl7rErFO6T3D9hcg-Q==)
---
|
Peter –
This week, President Trump endorsed my bill to crush the Mexican drug cartels that are killing tens of thousands of Americans every year with fentanyl. I also introduced legislation to get answers from the CDC about the faulty data they used to push unscientific COVID mandates on the American people and called on my fellow Members of Congress to stop using the Chinese spyware app TikTok.
As always, thanks for your support. Now, here's your brief.
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| PRESIDENT TRUMP ENDORSES MY BILL TO CRUSH THE CARTELS
---
| |
---

| The draconian COVID policies handed down from unelected bureaucrats in Washington, DC had serious consequences for the American people. From lockdowns that destroyed small businesses and kept children out of school to nonsensical mask and vaccine mandates, these policies were not about "the science." They were about power.
That's why I introduced legislation this week with Senator Rubio called The Restore Public Health Institution Trust Act, which will open an investigation into the CDC's messaging on unscientific mask and vaccine mandates. The CDC has yet to justify these decisions with clinical data and repeatedly claimed that COVID has caused widespread pediatric deaths, which was used as a cudgel to push COVID policies on our children. The CDC is now facing questions about how they collected this data. But instead of answering these concerns, the CDC is doubling down even after credible publications like the British Journal of Medicine called out the flawed method CDC used for tracking COVID deaths. The CDC Data Tracker is based on the surveillance data, which meant that any hospital patient with a positive COVID result would create a case report--even a patient who died of head trauma, for example. The Data Tracker, when compared to the CDC's death certificate data, is overstating pediatric deaths by over 40%. For school-aged children (in the 5-11-year-old age group), the difference in overreporting for COVID deaths is even worse - 90%. That's unacceptable. This flawed data was used to justify a ludicrous recommendation that children wear masks in our schools, which did untold harm to our children's social development and psyche.
The CDC is betting that the American people will simply forget about their unscientific mandates, but I promise you we won't. We need the actual clinical evidence that justified these decisions, and I won't stop until the CDC gives us answers. This bill requires the CDC to provide those answers to the American people.

Under Chinese law, every single Chinese company must comply with the Chinese Communist Party (CCP) in surveillance activity if they are called upon and must keep that cooperation a secret. That means that the CCP has direct influence over TikTok and has control over the data of all users of the app, which included millions of Americans and even, shockingly, Members of Congress.
Yes, Democrat Members of Congress continue to use the Chinese spyware app in their official capacity. Either Democrats are completely oblivious or they're purposely ignoring what they already know about the threat posed by TikTok. Members are using this CCP-controlled app in their official capacity, in their offices, in the Capitol, using official resources. They're welcoming China to access their data, and worse, they're encouraging their constituents to put themselves at risk. That's why I led a letter with Senator Tillis urging the Senate Rules Committee and the Committee on House Administration to stop lawmakers from using this app in their official capacity. If Members of Congress won't heed the warnings about the security risks of using TikTok, then we need to take decisive action to prevent them from using it and continuing to promote this dangerous app to the American people.

That's why I led a letter with Senator Tillis urging the Senate Rules Committee and the Committee on House Administration to stop lawmakers from using this app in their official capacity. If Members of Congress won't heed the warnings about the security risks of using TikTok, then we need to take decisive action to prevent them from using it and continuing to promote this dangerous app to the American people. | | | | | | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | == | == | == | | | | | | NEWS | DAILY WIRE: == FOX NEWS: == WSJ: == | That's it for this week's campaign brief. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Impulsive decisions are out of character for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friends –
Impulsive, emotional decisions are out of character for me.
I am the guy who had a four-year plan to get into Harvard even though my family was dirt poor.
So I thought long and hard about the decision to run for the United States Senate.
I prepared for it long before the possibility of Senator Sinema’s party switch.
I came to the conclusion that as a Marine, a Latino, and someone with a record of standing up for working people, we can build a coalition that can win a 2-way race, 3-way race, 27-way race... doesn’t matter.
The only open question was whether the grassroots support would be there. And I thought it would be. So far, I’ve been right.
So I am asking:
Can you please use this link to split $5, $10 or whatever you can afford between Serve America and my campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation, because it all adds up when we’re all chipping in. So please. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]
Thank you, and adiós,
Ruben

name: Indiana Republican Party
subject: A Lot of (Good) Economic News
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
The Party Line — An Indiana Republican Party Newsletter
| | |
---
|
---
# _A Lot of (Good) Economic News_
---
Last week, a report once again gave Indiana high marks on our economic conditions and outlook, ranking us seventh in the nation. But with today's media being ever so selective in what it chooses to cover (_for some odd reason_), you may have missed it. This is the 10th consecutive year that this report has placed Indiana in the top 10, a testament to the economic environment Republicans have been working to cultivate to ensure entrepreneurs and businesses both small and large can thrive. The reports notes as much stating "states with low taxes attract more business investment and more workers. People move to where they have economic opportunities." No wonder our neighbor to the west ranks 46th! But that's not the only good economic news coming out of Indiana lately. This week, Eli Lilly announced a historic investment in Boone County that will now total $3.7 billion and create 700 new jobs, the latest state revenue forecast revealed that Indiana's economy is performing even better than expected, and just this morning, unemployment numbers revealed that Indiana's unemployment rate has now been below the national average for 33 months with a new private employment peak. That's a lot of good news. And every day, Republicans are working hard to deliver more. Enjoy this week's newsletter. Sincerely,
---
---
Chairman Kyle Hupfer

# **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
| |
# On the Second Amendment
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/bbb670e5e4aa807e/3317d4fe3e50b376c3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
| | _**Governor Eric Holcomb** welcomes the crowd to the NRA-ILA annual meeting in downtown Indianapolis._**
---
Last Friday, **Governor Eric Holcomb **welcomed thousands of guests to the NRA-ILA's annual meeting held in downtown Indianapolis, speaking on our state's successes and thanking our uniformed heroes. _Excerpt:_ "You are in a state that could not be, as my two predecessors at this podium just articulated, a state that could not be more grateful for our uniformed heroes. Who keep our nations flag and all it represents flying high over this land of the free. Because of their bravery, you are surrounded by patriots not just in this hall, but border to border in the state of Indiana. "Yes, we fully exercise our constitutional rights, we put our money where our mouth is, and we invest in those that protect them and our laws, and our safety. Ladies and gentlemen, you will not find a place in America more supportive of your — our Second Amendment — than here in Indiana." Click on the thumbnail above or [here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/bbb670e5e4aa807e/42a3693b5e84fd95c3d6b838967d376c/40313) to watch **Gov. Holcomb's** speech.
---
|
---
**MORE: Governor Eric Holcomb **[joined](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/bbb670e5e4aa807e/42e290eaac5a044cc3d6b838967d376c/40313) executives of Eli Lilly and community leaders of Boone County to break ground on the company's new manufacturing facility. The company also announced an _additional investment_ of **$1.6 billion** and the creation of **200 more jobs** , bringing the total to **$3.7 billion** and **700 new jobs** , making it the company's largest investment in a single location.
---
| | |

# _Early Voting Has Started ... Knock It Out Now_
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/bbb670e5e4aa807e/a0c5eb65f260d592c3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
You don't have to wait until May 2, 2023, to cast your ballot for the municipal primary election. You can visit [indianavoters.com](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/bbb670e5e4aa807e/0015e31b5cbd7cf0c3d6b838967d376c/40313) to see who is on your ballot and find your voting location and hours and knock out voting at your own convenience. You can also apply for an absentee ballot if you qualify and learn more about the processes and tools that the state uses to keep our elections safe and secure (which Indiana has long been a pioneer in).
---
|

# _Save the Date: Municipal Candidate Training_
---
---
This week we released a save the date for our upcoming municipal candidate training — **IN IT TO WIN: Victory in Indiana's Cities & Towns **— to be held on **Saturday, June 10, 2023** , at the University of Indianapolis. We're fielding candidates across Indiana's cities and towns who will work to deliver results for Hoosiers like you. And to help them get across the finish line first on election night, we're helping skill them up with this one-day training session on all things grassroots, finance, and communications. **Be on the lookout for more details!**
---
|
---
# _Congressman Yakym, Congresswoman Houchin Introduce First Bills_
---
This week, **Congressmen Rudy Yakym** and **Congresswoman Erin Houchin** introduced their first (ever) bills of the 118th Congress, a bill to add a balanced budget amendment to the U.S. Constitution and the Regulation A+ Improvement Act, respectively. **Yakym's** bill includes eight provisions, among them that "total outlays for any fiscal year shall not exceed total receipts, unless three-fifths of Congress approves in a roll call vote." _" In Indiana, we make responsible spending choices and exercise fiscal discipline every single day. It’s high time we brought that same Hoosier commonsense to Washington. And a Balanced Budget Amendment is the way to do it." _— **Congressman Rudy Yakym** **Houchin's** Regulation A+ Improvement Act would expand investment options for Americans across the country and support the growth of small to mid-size businesses. _“It’s important we cut red tape to make it easier for our local businesses to grow."_ — **Congresswoman Erin Houchin** Click [here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/bbb670e5e4aa807e/bf3e608bb0f39cc6c3d6b838967d376c/40313) to read more about **Congressman Yakym's** bill and [here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/bbb670e5e4aa807e/ae8e13fdecac80a4c3d6b838967d376c/40313) to read more about **Congresswoman Houchin's** bill.
---

# _Rockport Mayor Donald "Don" Winkler Passes Away, Honored on House Floor by Rep. Bucshon_
---
It's with a heavy heart that we share the passing of **Rockport Mayor Donald "Don" Winkler**. **Mayor Winkler** proudly served his beloved city, the city that he grew up in, after being elected in 2019. Driven to make a real difference and ensure the city exceeded its former greatness, he would emphatically say, _"I believe in Rockport."_ Our sincere condolences to **Mayor Winkler's** family, all who had the pleasure of calling him a friend, and to the city of Rockport. On Thursday, **Congressman Larry Bucshon** [honored](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/bbb670e5e4aa807e/b0235890c55eff41c3d6b838967d376c/40313) **Mayor Winkler** on the floor of the U.S. House. Click [here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/bbb670e5e4aa807e/9a76c33f290eb022c3d6b838967d376c/40313) to read **Mayor Winkler's** obituary.
