# _This Week at the Statehouse_
---
The last day for adjournment is now just one week away. More and more bills continue to make their way to Governor Holcomb's desk while others are making their way to conference committee. _Buckle up!_ _Priority Bills of Governor Holcomb_ The rundown: HB 1001 (the budget bill) is headed to conference committee to work out differences between the House and Senate version of the bill, as are HBs 1590 and 1591, and SB 4, and the House concurred with amendments to HB 1492. _Priority Bills of House Republicans_ The rundown: HBs 1002 and 1004 were sent to conference committee to work out differences between the House and Senate version of the bills, the House adopted the conference committee report for HB 1006, and the governor signed HEA 1007. _Priority Bills of Senate Republicans_ The rundown: the Senate concurred with House amendments to SB 1, SBs 3 and 8 were sent to conference committee to work out differences between the Senate and House version of the bills, SB 5 and SJ1 were signed by the President Pro Tem, and SB 7 was returned to the Senate with amendments. To stay up-to-date, visit [iga.in.gov](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/bbb670e5e4aa807e/24516a47136b155ec3d6b838967d376c/40313) and the governor's bill watch page [here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/bbb670e5e4aa807e/c3ee65dae2dafae5c3d6b838967d376c/40313). **TOTAL BILLS SIGNED (as of TODAY at 10 AM): 93**

body:

---
| | stop the pesticide industry from POISONING precious bees | |
---
| | | **Do you think we should BAN bee-toxic pesticides to protect pollinators and the planet?**
---
[ ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732412?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

---
_** This link has been generated specifically for dpwillis67@gmail.com. Please do not share. **Deadline for responses: 11:59 p.m.** _
---
**The shocking rate of bee deaths could spell DISASTER for our ecosystems this Earth Day, and scientists are warning of catastrophic collapse due to an insect apocalypse.** **Bee-toxic pesticides like neonics are largely to blame. Studies show the destructive impact of neonics, but Big Ag still uses** MILLIONS of pounds of these chemicals every year!
Sustainable farming practices exist that could help stop bee die-offs and protect the future of our food supply. But **chemical corporations dominate U.S. agriculture** , and our farming system is totally hooked on their products. Even the seeds of our major crops are coated with neonics – **trapping us in a destructive loop that harms the precious pollinators we depend on.**
Even worse, chemical corporations are **spending MILLIONS to keep their death grip on our food system** and hide their role as key drivers of the bee apocalypse. They run massive misinformation campaigns to deceive farmers and consumers and spread distrust in ecological farming solutions we desperately need like organic agriculture. Enough!
**It’s time to stop the pesticide industry from POISONING precious bees and polluting our farm fields for profits.** **** **That's why we urgently need 4 more activists from your area to speak out before 11:59 p.m. Saturday in service of Earth Day – but we're still missing your response! So please, tell us now:**
| | **Do you think we should BAN bee-toxic pesticides to protect pollinators and the planet?** ** **
---
| | | [YES](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732412?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Obscene
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Kevin McCarthy raised an astounding $12.3 million from a collection of donors from Big Pharma, the fossil fuel industry, and other corporate interests.
#
[](https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18913?t=1&akid=3165%2E346206%2ED9vkDD)
Peter,
In a single night, Kevin McCarthy raised an astounding **$12.3 million** from a collection of donors from Big Pharma, the fossil fuel industry, and other corporate interests.
It just goes to show everything that’s broken in Washington.
We have a terrible system of campaign finance that has allowed the rich and powerful to buy off our elections ever since the Supreme Court’s 2010 decision in _Citizens United v. FEC_.
I’m not accepting corporate PAC money in this race, but if we’re going to reach every voter in California and compete with McCarthy and the MAGA Republican Party’s millions, then I’m going to need your help right now:
[**Please, before our fundraising deadline, can you pitch in $15 or any amount to support our campaign and Charles Booker today and reject the corrupting influence of money in politics that allows Kevin McCarthy to raise $12.3 million in a single night?**](https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18935?t=2&akid=3165%2E346206%2ED9vkDD)
Thanks team,
— Adam
**[CHIP IN →](https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18935?t=3&akid=3165%2E346206%2ED9vkDD)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230421-3165-footer&t=4&refcode2=3165_346206_D9vkDD&akid=3165%2E346206%2ED9vkDD)**
---
Email us: [info@charlesbooker.org](mailto: info@charlesbooker.org)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. To contribute via check, please address to PO Box 4369, Louisville, KY 40204.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.charlesbooker.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=3165%2E346206%2ED9vkDD)

name: Rep. Joe Sweeney
subject: What you can do today to help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman
body:
Can you help defend the taxpayer in Concord?

| | | | | [](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fexpand-majorities/1/01000187a3e55fa3-a56eebc3-fa7b-4c5e-a25a-474d696fc60f-000000/IE23TueX3P2hrrKfJR4P1eLInvY=318)
---
| | Derek,

As a political advocacy organization committed to supporting fiscally conservative candidates in New Hampshire, [Granite Solutions is reaching out to you today to ask for your support.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fexpand-majorities/2/01000187a3e55fa3-a56eebc3-fa7b-4c5e-a25a-474d696fc60f-000000/1sLiCZonvAhURZ6Ww6Y-MxlxoRo=318)

---
[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fexpand-majorities/3/01000187a3e55fa3-a56eebc3-fa7b-4c5e-a25a-474d696fc60f-000000/m45wJa3nC-DTUI_xm0THoIJTnf0=318)
---
Granite Solutions is dedicated to promoting a conservative tax policy and agenda in Concord while electing candidates who share our vision for a prosperous and thriving New Hampshire. With elections coming up later this fall in New Hampshire cities, [we need your help to ensure that we have the resources necessary to support fiscally conservative candidates](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fexpand-majorities/4/01000187a3e55fa3-a56eebc3-fa7b-4c5e-a25a-474d696fc60f-000000/jtwLlDwMNsXsdCBAx3TsWP6CgJA=318) and make a difference in New Hampshire - a battleground state for the future of our nation in 2024.

We believe that every donation counts towards achieving our mission. Your contribution will help us reach more voters, support candidates who share our values, and continue to make a difference in our community. [Whether you can donate a small or large amount, every donation makes a difference in achieving our mission.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fexpand-majorities/5/01000187a3e55fa3-a56eebc3-fa7b-4c5e-a25a-474d696fc60f-000000/F77v10wAiWSRnVK5oTSLB_DyQ-c=318)

[Please consider making a donation to Granite Solutions today.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fexpand-majorities/6/01000187a3e55fa3-a56eebc3-fa7b-4c5e-a25a-474d696fc60f-000000/PD4x936bbJ3C6xBUJLxwMp8Ftzc=318) Your support will help us continue to promote fiscally conservative policies and elect candidates who share our vision for a prosperous and thriving New Hampshire.

Thank you for considering our organization and joining us in our mission. We appreciate your support and dedication to our cause.

Best,

Rep. Joe Sweeney
Chairman, Granite Solutions

Peter, Democrats want to put America in a cage.

_They want to take away our freedom of speech so we can’t speak out against them._

_They want to take away our opportunity so we rely on the government._

**And they want to use the justice system to lock up whoever disagrees with them and throw away the key.**

**Peter, I didn’t serve this country for 25 years to watch the Left throw the very principles my brothers and sisters in arms gave their lives for away.**

We don’t need to trap American potential away - **we need to unleash it!**

clean_body: | | | Peter, Democrats want to put America in a cage. They want to take away our freedom of speech so we can’t speak out against them. They want to take away our opportunity so we rely on the government. And they want to use the justice system to lock up whoever disagrees with them and throw away the key. Peter, I didn’t serve this country for 25 years to watch the Left throw the very principles my brothers and sisters in arms gave their lives for away. We don’t need to trap American potential away - we need to unleash it! My family escaped the tyranny of Communist Vietnam for American freedom when I was just four years old. I owe my very life to this country’s freedom, Peter. That’s why it makes me sick to see the Left using the same tactics the communist regime in Vietnam used to silence anyone who spoke out against them. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) | | Paid for by Unleash America PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. | | Address: PO Box 320253, Alexandria, VA 22320 Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Unleash America PAC

name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a16c19f85664967addfe8d224682c69&_e=TxFPk5o65lrWFW5GEzhUZp_Dz0iLuU1KahC92Saba_a9b0x5cCWIeKfPWMiESBYWPWEXPYb7wIKQnoxPCk5MKHKuFf_E28NdCoya0X0ZpNXM-VqJ0MeQ2tdq2AF01kjZPKkXFL-4_2CEXbhzzk0Zz-5H9ys1pJ1LdcNFJDZoZeCYXkvyCbyD1cGC1xftVF04G2DPn_T0D8zIT8nM29lgtCWf1tSDrBVogX0XVj-l4d98ib41pfKkrkf7AsG3cfg3aP8jdFveSgW_okw2C3bzXA%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a16c19f85664967addfe8d224682c69&_e=TxFPk5o65lrWFW5GEzhUZp_Dz0iLuU1KahC92Saba_a9b0x5cCWIeKfPWMiESBYWPWEXPYb7wIKQnoxPCk5MKHKuFf_E28NdCoya0X0ZpNXM-VqJ0MeQ2tdq2AF01kjZY3AC93LNHOT56ZX4KIa0hwYsn_2tuPn8Z4UlqM2WgG6Eae77oHl3MSphMlXTvCLBLZ45pOME99-29uWa3UlQI1eG1wJsPsnFnY15cdfP4jFR5uMslH6lyn4GrIo4jNRw8QxBvhPVOlv3K1UItcX6zQ%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a16c19f85664967addfe8d224682c69&_e=TxFPk5o65lrWFW5GEzhUZp_Dz0iLuU1KahC92Saba_a9b0x5cCWIeKfPWMiESBYWPWEXPYb7wIKQnoxPCk5MKHKuFf_E28NdCoya0X0ZpNXM-VqJ0MeQ2tdq2AF01kjZ5jLlFVWey91Gfin3J_VsZj-xqBGpbh4JdH988IcnFMNYe3PVWsMm5v0tA7HH18zoMRtuQZfaa4Fz9H8nlnCDXHB5JgL5cZJ3mz0z7S4bXuqe6I3cnJ2cwUrteqsJv-AGbAwAlfmOvUipvHFP27ID_w%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a16c19f85664967addfe8d224682c69&_e=TxFPk5o65lrWFW5GEzhUZp_Dz0iLuU1KahC92Saba_a9b0x5cCWIeKfPWMiESBYWPWEXPYb7wIKQnoxPCk5MKHKuFf_E28NdCoya0X0ZpNXM-VqJ0MeQ2tdq2AF01kjZ6o1egwnSj1wH9KPfrH1XjF9JACJQEuYB5QFcVoXuUXdmJ9vGGvS18aGTHG-z4PkB9_Q2e25p_u2uJgO2Kqlaq_QogVLaLu2PiCxaKsFYw3ifyM3XdUL_u7ZSUzIqAvviHJcgNBF6HMej3nkcx6utGA%3D%3D)

[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a16c19f85664967addfe8d224682c69&_e=TxFPk5o65lrWFW5GEzhUZp_Dz0iLuU1KahC92Saba_a9b0x5cCWIeKfPWMiESBYWPWEXPYb7wIKQnoxPCk5MKHKuFf_E28NdCoya0X0ZpNXM-VqJ0MeQ2tdq2AF01kjZbKGvi7OhqwG0soGI7G7yF8nkms7waqeCTGmds_fp8Eq6wWVgdDU7tHjuwqwa-tjUCDBn8x1mBYNtFcxoVutQUe182doCGAlAO6JbMS3r2KnVugk7cMHJ7jz0IpmhYcZczXXbsepwmPU3NeIoiyGN8Q%3D%3D)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a16c19f85664967addfe8d224682c69&_e=TxFPk5o65lrWFW5GEzhUZp_Dz0iLuU1KahC92Saba_a9b0x5cCWIeKfPWMiESBYWPWEXPYb7wIKQnoxPCk5MKHKuFf_E28NdCoya0X0ZpNXM-VqJ0MeQ2tdq2AF01kjZrG-1gXTFIdd9m3X9i08oWOQVVCENQsp18lwS-VuEBSMfSsaKA9ttHC85uNtXU5nUMMbN75GWGLMXoz190xqP_M7DuMoAR0ZtE4D0LYv5lc3wnqXmTySUrPHf3bNlnewaFJwsSUlCU4pj_HOzzLFs7w%3D%3D)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6a16c19f85664967addfe8d224682c69&_e=TxFPk5o65lrWFW5GEzhUZp_Dz0iLuU1KahC92Saba_a9b0x5cCWIeKfPWMiESBYWPWEXPYb7wIKQnoxPCk5MKHKuFf_E28NdCoya0X0ZpNXM-VqJ0MeQ2tdq2AF01kjZegOhD8SW8OPV_9I0ddVWX87-hEEsx8nvOzPIPU9MnwQgjTssuYK4JKQVq09XN_vUlLnF0Z6c7vRCBBVPgxSv3mFI35X-4l0nY3XC3bqy1eF8dOn0qJbr0oAqSy9OiOePXPRpPVt2E_B6187_ssbhHw%3D%3D)

clean_body: Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored. For Freedom, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

The GOP's attacks on reproductive freedom are coming from every corner of America.
**FIRST:** After decades of lobbying, the far-right Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade,__ sparking multiple states to enact immediate abortion bans.
**THEN:** Far-right lobbying groups bullied the courts system to overturn FDA authorization of mifepristone, an abortion pill people all across the country rely on – even affecting people in progressive states.
**NOW:** Infamous Florida governor Ron DeSantis signed a six-week abortion ban into law – making abortion illegal before most people even know they're pregnant!
These shameless attacks on our reproductive freedom can't continue.

We're working around the clock to hold Republicans accountable and defeat them at the ballot box.

**That's why we launched a petition to show that the majority of Americans support protecting reproductive rights. We set a goal of receiving 5,000 signatures, but we're still missing yours. So, please, stand up NOW before our midnight deadline:**
**[SIGN THE PETITION TO PROTECT REPRODUCTIVE RIGHTS>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62097841/402294970/-522441025?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fab-2023-repro-rights-survey&code=jtk2490-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc3MzlhNjFhLTQ1ZTAtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TzL9zN8SX2ePbHo7v7XurIm6VF4P2MT23zlDyk-z4Xw=&emci=0045f349-f5de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=7739a61a-45e0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=23124236)**

Peter -
Think for a second. It’s November 5, 2024. The polls close in Arizona and Ruben Gallego is declared the winner on MSNBC and the other networks.
Just think about how important that would be:
It would mean a truly grassroots-funded campaign beat a campaign funded by hedge fund managers and another funded by the MAGA-right. What a victory for regular people everywhere!
It would probably mean, because of our work, we helped make sure Democrats carried Arizona in the presidential election — keeping Trump out of the White House.
It would mean Democrats gained the decisive vote for raising the minimum wage, expanding the right to vote, protecting abortion access, taking on the drug companies, and getting serious about combating climate change.
And if Ruben wins, we’d probably have the votes to get it done.
That is the future we are fighting for. With every volunteer shift, every social media post, and every donation we move one step closer.
We know we ask a lot, no doubt about it. But it’s because that is the way we fund this campaign. And hopefully it’s a small price to pay for the future that is within our reach.
So please:
[**Can you make today the day you make a contribution to Ruben Gallego’s campaign? $5, $10 or whatever you can afford. clean_body: Think for a second. It’s November 5, 2024. The polls close in Arizona and Ruben Gallego is declared the winner on MSNBC and the other networks. = Peter - Think for a second. It’s November 5, 2024. The polls close in Arizona and Ruben Gallego is declared the winner on MSNBC and the other networks. Just think about how important that would be: It would mean a truly grassroots-funded campaign beat a campaign funded by hedge fund managers and another funded by the MAGA-right. What a victory for regular people everywhere! It would probably mean, because of our work, we helped make sure Democrats carried Arizona in the presidential election — keeping Trump out of the White House. It would mean Democrats gained the decisive vote for raising the minimum wage, expanding the right to vote, protecting abortion access, taking on the drug companies, and getting serious about combating climate change. And if Ruben wins, we’d probably have the votes to get it done. That is the future we are fighting for. With every volunteer shift, every social media post, and every donation we move one step closer. We know we ask a lot, no doubt about it. But it’s because that is the way we fund this campaign. And hopefully it’s a small price to pay for the future that is within our reach. So please: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you in advance, Ruben Gallego for Arizona * Paid for by Gallego for Arizona Gallego for Arizona 1601 North 7th Street Phoenix, AZ 85006 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, you can , but we'd be very sorry to see you go.

name: Hillsdale College via CIntel
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsb_SiiDN8

You are an informed citizen-I believe that wholeheartedly. You
love this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S.
Constitution says

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osb_SiiDN8

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Good day,
fellow American.

You are
an informed citizen-I believe that wholeheartedly.

You love
this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S.
Constitution says and what it means, and you aren't afraid to
stand up for America's founding and the principles of liberty
that define our nation.

Your
leadership and knowledge are needed today…

Do you
believe the American education system is failing millions of
young Americans?
YES
NO

We need
more citizens like you-informed citizens-because America is at a
turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold
thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the
Constitution and undermine liberty and patriotism.

The
country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore
knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We
can't let that happen!

That's
why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of
Hillsdale College and our new, nationwide initiative-the CAMPAIGN
FOR INFORMED CITIZENS.

We are
the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and
teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal
of this new campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable
Americans who understand:

WHAT
the Constitution says
HOW
it relates to current issues and events
WHY
the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to
liberty

If this
campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the
Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people,
that our education system failed.

These are
young people that "educators" deliberately deceived or who just
haven't learned about a proper understanding of American history
in school.

You are
essential to the success of this effort to make America more
knowledgeable.

That's
because we're seeking 1,000 people in each state to help us teach
the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to
10,000,000 Americans in the coming year, and this initiative
starts with you-YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights.

And we
must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer
support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student
grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you
who want what's best for the country.

So
please, share your opinions by completing the National Survey on
the State of American Education today at the link below. Thank
you for reading my email!
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61724862:sb_SiiDN8:m:3:2532013465:35583D7155AA87F2C019D77F1702A5EC:r

For our
children,

Bill
Gray, '01
Vice
President
National
Donor Outreach
Hillsdale
College

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.

name: Kat Cammack
subject: URGENT: 20 days until Title 42 ends…
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H7Ib74w8WKhAy11ilFRIIqTNadxpqm5-7nnxM4lHiNLf98n_Mz1W9ah8Wqg9WYtNZWK4McgvfQdb43rxXMha-guwmawSRaO3YzdFhrQ6g-1nz-7mHP_BZ4ci16f6BzCpe2Tup_j91dnkoolvqhW79NKlBMeigCvXtmsZg5FD-I6CJUEO3bgelIorkTVcSTJK72nZXeOUMog=&c=fR47z3hJkGH2Y2QVC_IF1eCNuul6iEqV-0x3TCZCZcBqpIiR7bSRug==&ch=hp-FTE8xm02Btc60gSjpVJh3v9169yuAwGLcEwg59EL-dyzMngxTtA==)
---
| BORDER ALERT FROM TEAM CAMMACK

Friend
Title 42, the most crucial border policy defending our nation, is set to end in just 20 days...
What does that mean for you? The expiration of Title 42 means that America can no longer stop immigrants from entering the U.S. illegally. That means we'll see more migrants in holding facilities, entry attempts, and getaways running through our communities and neighborhoods.
What is Kat doing to stop it? Currently, I'm joining my colleagues to call for an extension to Title 42. Without the policy, America will be home to another humanitarian crisis as millions of migrants flock to our borders to receive free room and board while taking money from your pocket!
How can you get involved? You can get involved today by rushing in your support for my fight to defend Title 42. Republicans will need all the funds they can get to spread the word and win the messaging battle, and I'll need every patriot to join my fight to get Florida involved.
---

name: Senator Ted Cruz
subject: Can I trust you with something?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Take the 2024 Republican Platform Survey >>

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zol2j8loscf6qr9959qg6jd52dr5v3scaugsjna0_rp22sh2s8i66o72c1ie1oj5c9h2bs)

I need patriots I can trust, Friend.

My Senate Republican colleagues and I just left a BIG 2024 Election meeting, but we ran into a problem - we needed more up-to-date information to make better strategic decisions.

name: Riley Gaines
subject: They gave Lia Thomas the trophy all for a photo-op…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I was told that the NCAA hadn’t planned for a tie

| |
---
| | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17106%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CsOKkbTLGH7002cuwN3Bnw&sysid=1)
---

My name is Riley Gaines. I’m a 12 time All-American swimmer with 5 SEC titles under my belt after my time at the University of Kentucky.

After college, my dream was to become a dentist. Unfortunately, my life completely changed when I was forced to share a locker room with and compete against biological male Lia Thomas at the 2022 NCAA Women’s Swimming Championship.

**It gets worse:** When I tied with Lia Thomas - down the _hundredth_ of a second - I was told that the NCAA hadn’t planned for a tie and that Thomas had to have the trophy for photo purposes...

My story is not unique. Unfortunately, countless young girls and women like myself are being sidelined as biological males infiltrate and dominate our competition.

**That’s why I’m taking a stand against Democrats’ attacks against women’s sports.**

_The “Party of Science” doesn’t believe in biological differences.
The “Party of Women” doesn’t support women.
Democrats are erasing our dreams in the name of wokeness._

Fortunately, Republicans in the House have introduced a bill that would codify the protections that women have been able to count on for generations, ensuring that biological girls will have an equal playing field. Together, we’re making it clear we will not stand for discrimination against girls and women in sports. But Joe Biden is threatening to do just the opposite - to cement into law the destruction of women’s sports...

So, I’m humbly asking on behalf of millions of female athletes dreaming big - **[will you stand with me?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17107%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OMNdIjHj0JyW1RFNkt1p8A&sysid=1 "will you stand with
me?")** If we fail, I fear this could be the end of female athletic competition as we know it...

---
| | [STAND WITH RILEY](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17108%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XpBKqjsfZOMNDESFFRAMkQ&sysid=1)
---
| | [SAVE WOMEN’S SPORTS](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17109%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1%2fb2S73%2bu6xZb%2fzDBaXEIA&sysid=1)

Can I count on your $14? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62103372/402316885/-1810142053?refcode=20230421_em_fr_b1_raja_30_v2&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTI2NjFjOS00Y2UwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mC9RxzbS7KLE_pUG_D0e1-HwRmcH3h-gbpd5t7imE_k=) Peter, I’ll be blunt: MAGA extremists would rather play political games than keep our country safe. subject: More news. Less time.
body:
Here is your opportunity to sign up today for FREE.

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17117%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=g4R3aYHEf8fWAxjmgUA2LQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Reader,
Are you sick and tired of trying to search through so many different news sites to figure out what is going on in the world? Spending too much time trying to figure out what is **ACTUALLY** important? Not sure if you can trust what you are reading? Today is your day to sign up for a **FREE** newsletter called _[The Flyover](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17118%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=V1EMR3T0q4tWIqfff1wxqQ&sysid=1)_ where our talented team of editors will do all that work for you. Get informed on politics, business, world affairs, science, technology and many other topics with a single email directly to your inbox. **_[Click here to sign up now for FREE!](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17119%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sqcf2iQIa%2f7FFS%2fJsdcI2A&sysid=1)_**
Finding quality news online is like sifting an avalanche. We dig through hundreds of sources and pull out the most important news of the day, so you don't have to. One email does truly have every relevant story. Here is your opportunity to **[sign up today for FREE](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17110%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QcgdMFqTBwUrV96VYe2kFQ&sysid=1)**. In today’s world, the mainstream media tries to tell people what to think. At _[The Flyover](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17118%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=V1EMR3T0q4tWIqfff1wxqQ&sysid=1)_ , we eliminate the bias and just deliver the facts of today’s news and allowing you to reach your own conclusion. **_[Click here to check out our latest briefing.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17111%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dSQf4HHmSsvyEtf%2b%2fHq0zA&sysid=1)_**
Get _[The Flyover](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17118%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=V1EMR3T0q4tWIqfff1wxqQ&sysid=1)_ delivered to your inbox every Monday, Wednesday, and Friday so you do not miss out on anything. Our team summarizes every story in a couple sentences or less and offers you a link to the full story so you can read deeper on what matters to you. _[The Flyover](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17118%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=V1EMR3T0q4tWIqfff1wxqQ&sysid=1)_ covers a wide array of topics, so you stay informed on what is important. Politics, sports, market watch, scientific advancements, etc. we cover it all, so you stay informed. Join The Flyover today to cruise the news and just land the facts. **_[Don’t miss this EXCLUSIVE opportunity to sign up for FREE today.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17112%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lip2VDuNybtdzPBuF7rMZg&sysid=1)_**

name: Gary Sinise
subject: Most don't know this about Memorial Day
body:
You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI NY-- but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump, that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders.

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1840d4a804844b00b86b15e3897b8304&_e=wQSyhUcbV6DwZqTiN5vnn1-tjir8M_2dnD7n10OufVmfd51ZnPmtwowCVbe-g5coZKmeqLSERJw2y-SyqGS20rF1C5u0nzJU0bpQR545oCQ6HHKKoxcTPKPvr9vjSU0l-QwqMmGa-cPGoWZEgkgENLN2cBoY7JUz9tyyVujt8ePVrUyxZMxItZnBfVaS9ELhBDLjnxoZ_sgC0r23Oy3G7olpLGwBZDtVAC2SZRBTf0ObGCct08OmrheZkPI6Ia2hH2yk2hv41-EyDUQME1vWV9d8s1_SG1WTmQY181GnWrvybpZM_BRsY57aOf4AsnpD)
---
Fellow American, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ -- but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I 'm honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1840d4a804844b00b86b15e3897b8304&_e=wQSyhUcbV6DwZqTiN5vnn1-tjir8M_2dnD7n10OufVmfd51ZnPmtwowCVbe-g5coZKmeqLSERJw2y-SyqGS20rF1C5u0nzJU0bpQR545oCQ6HHKKoxcTPKPvr9vjSU0l-QwqMmGa-cPGoWZEgkgENLN2cBoY7JUz9tyyVujt8ePFYu_cqsVVPjjKYirhD6KGFAWB59DCtwbsz2jIuuQ8SKOHpv4THjpfol7czkBQYm8QwIkpQu7GjmsTrGwHK-_sxlLKS93icN9dcSUay2Q0H0QjnjVgwKnVl6qITlxER314C4mAkcSDqYs73_Gp4g7I)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1840d4a804844b00b86b15e3897b8304&_e=wQSyhUcbV6DwZqTiN5vnn1-tjir8M_2dnD7n10OufVmfd51ZnPmtwowCVbe-g5coZKmeqLSERJw2y-SyqGS20rF1C5u0nzJU0bpQR545oCQ6HHKKoxcTPKPvr9vjSU0l-QwqMmGa-cPGoWZEgkgENLN2cBoY7JUz9tyyVujt8eMibxDJnIqi4sDiB_N1lVhRiKXeEUQL6JzKJ1R2ti2rPDaJLAhtL4m_vWCCqjVR1SAe31xtrjTj8fZ81K3X_JJuNXnVPfsrzOpslj65ZWJeSTMMQrXRbQJStRXqCVKQJFgO_QHaIyBeTagPvRSk4Jjj)
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1840d4a804844b00b86b15e3897b8304&_e=wQSyhUcbV6DwZqTiN5vnn1-tjir8M_2dnD7n10OufVmfd51ZnPmtwowCVbe-g5coZKmeqLSERJw2y-SyqGS20rF1C5u0nzJU0bpQR545oCQ6HHKKoxcTPKPvr9vjSU0l-QwqMmGa-cPGoWZEgkgENLN2cBoY7JUz9tyyVujt8ePuOQlXixhfftC7pVcM-wc4GV_20cusn4YGg6_K6vMAgT2xbwTq7VGKmKPRc7jRSvQc9rSrWU76mH5zPgFd7hOoleT25esRiSk6Yqsa_OhDD4d5hmZREBBj7XnlpuPU1EFwViu08Z0OEscBSxBsA03H)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they're bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our "Greatest Generation" heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country -- the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ -- as this year's event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation 's heroes deserve.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1840d4a804844b00b86b15e3897b8304&_e=wQSyhUcbV6DwZqTiN5vnn1-tjir8M_2dnD7n10OufVmfd51ZnPmtwowCVbe-g5coZKmeqLSERJw2y-SyqGS20rF1C5u0nzJU0bpQR545oCQ6HHKKoxcTPKPvr9vjSU0l-QwqMmGa-cPGoWZEgkgENLN2cBoY7JUz9tyyVujt8eMBDdE6cenasOmYA_o2BchndTwIABracS1nwbg51EFjYo4ho8TR8GtMw_arXKibWBaC5iNoTWHR9rl4nBn5CPliQeUZLf5Z1P2oQp90XmY1wkeDHManNfdLQWLP87sdBn6S-ObQI4Wzoxo3DpZoNPQD)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1840d4a804844b00b86b15e3897b8304&_e=wQSyhUcbV6DwZqTiN5vnn1-tjir8M_2dnD7n10OufVmfd51ZnPmtwowCVbe-g5coZKmeqLSERJw2y-SyqGS20rF1C5u0nzJU0bpQR545oCQ6HHKKoxcTPKPvr9vjSU0l-QwqMmGa-cPGoWZEgkgENLN2cBoY7JUz9tyyVujt8eNd7gxmviA2uwA41l1GwORa7m8s47JxMx5O6pPEAjVnSOdBYvb1u9m4rHkM51ItI4nPtN1ao8u4I5eMZ8xR4CvpCdmYvh68HSLeTqgVdHpY9_k1ZnU6p9E7kt2zhpY1TS3RlhdOfdkSdS7NmAhflISx)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1840d4a804844b00b86b15e3897b8304&_e=wQSyhUcbV6DwZqTiN5vnn1-tjir8M_2dnD7n10OufVmfd51ZnPmtwowCVbe-g5coZKmeqLSERJw2y-SyqGS20rF1C5u0nzJU0bpQR545oCQ6HHKKoxcTPKPvr9vjSU0l-QwqMmGa-cPGoWZEgkgENLN2cBoY7JUz9tyyVujt8eN9l2i9Gl6YfNUarAxz0lm1X-P4fjHYQ31fzrdTauNkppnux1nllrXBVBpeqr7m6aCGR-JgAeDLwIyEPT-zMx-roCN69-TdolbtkNpYLrwvtqRxLAOrMmANmh8uUewXrxBcJdcb0y5FGwbBvGhqHShd) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day -- this year and every year -- please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please -- [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1840d4a804844b00b86b15e3897b8304&_e=wQSyhUcbV6DwZqTiN5vnn1-tjir8M_2dnD7n10OufVmfd51ZnPmtwowCVbe-g5coZKmeqLSERJw2y-SyqGS20rF1C5u0nzJU0bpQR545oCQ6HHKKoxcTPKPvr9vjSU0l-QwqMmGa-cPGoWZEgkgENLN2cBoY7JUz9tyyVujt8eOAgu_9CyGxyXsl6mcnFrJoR5KTepFh-Xn9ZLhjTx7W22YpH5SotfrS5f2tQm8HvbjOlDMg6fyNeSxCToPFuDABW9spTaieuXWdE8mJgnNo7rdpeSNvK9Xnv8kl1m7fYqqWX1YO47CGNGeX3BbaZPG_)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal

clean_body: You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI NY-- but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump, that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. | | | Fellow American, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI NY -- but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump, that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. This year, I 'm honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they're bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our "Greatest Generation" heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country -- the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is more important now than ever -- as this year's event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home. The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like: Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever. Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam. * Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom. But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day -- this year and every year -- please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please -- Sincerely, Gary Sinise Honorary Grand Marshal National Memorial Day Parade The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. Now, McCarthy is trying to follow through on that promise — introducing legislation that would slash food stamps, cut Medicaid, roll back progress we’ve made fighting climate change, and wipe out over 100,000 manufacturing jobs in exchange for raising the debt ceiling. Look, it is outrageous that the GOP majority is attempting to do so much harm to hardworking American families — let alone that they’re threatening to cause a global economic catastrophe if President Biden and congressional Democrats don’t give them what they want. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = The only way to stop this kind of extremism in its tracks is to retake our Democratic House majority — and Brittany’s seat is absolutely critical in this fight. = Thank you, Team Brittany Pettersen | Email is a great way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to . Paid for by Brittany Pettersen for Colorado. Brittany Pettersen for Colorado P.O. Box 150887 Lakewood, CO 80215 United States

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Don’t let trophy hunting lobbyists delist grizzlies
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend, ** | **Fight back against trophy hunting and Big Industry attacks on bears and their cubs, and donate $27 today to make twice the impact.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$27 donation + $27 match = $54 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732768?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$50 donation + $50 match = $100 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732769?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$100 donation + $100 match = $200 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732770?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732771?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
One bullet. It takes just one bullet to kill a mama bear. One bullet to leave her orphaned cubs struggling, starving, and unable to fight off predators. One bullet to completely decimate an entire bear family. Our country’s bears are under attack, and as they begin to come out of hibernation this spring, it could be their last. **[Protect mama bears, their cubs, and the planet and make a $27 contribution to Friends of the Earth today, and your gift will be MATCHED -- dollar for dollar -- up to $180,000, but only until midnight tomorrow!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732772?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) **
Maryland already**DOUBLED the bear slaughter** over the previous year, killing 103 black bears in the state. This could be the future for states like Wyoming -- as they push the federal government to remove Endangered Species Act protections for grizzly bears, they are already planning to TRIPLE the number of grizzlies than previously proposed.
Trophy hunters in the Northern Rockies are chomping at the bit to remove ESA protections for iconic grizzly bears. They’ve made numerous attempts to delist them in hopes of ruthlessly murdering them during the hunting season, and they show no signs of stopping.
**We need to act fast to protect grizzlies -- cubs and adults. Protect vulnerable species and our planet with a $27 donation today while your gift will be matched, dollar for dollar! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[$27 donation + $27 match = $54 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732768?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$50 donation + $50 match = $100 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732769?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$100 donation + $100 match = $200 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732770?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732771?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
If delisted, grizzlies could be treated as horribly as vulnerable wolves currently are -- with Wyoming _**allowing a shoot-on-sight**_ approach across the state. Pro-trophy hunting officials are looking to steamroll the delisting of grizzlies without public comment or review, which means grizzly bears are coming dangerously close to being caught in the crosshairs during the next hunt -- we can’t let it come to that.
A top predator, grizzlies play a pivotal role in keeping our ecosystem healthy and in balance. Standing up to eight feet tall and weighing up to 800 pounds, these intelligent omnivores enhance biodiversity, enrich soils, regulate prey populations, and transport nutrients through different ecosystems as they roam far and wide. Scientists are continuously discovering more and more ways grizzlies play a pivotal role in the ecosystems they inhabit.
Today, faced with shrinking habitat, the loss of critical food sources, and many impacts of climate change, grizzly bears are struggling to survive. Their populations outside Alaska have **plummeted to a mere 2% of their historic population** and are restricted to only 1% of their historic range. Fewer and fewer cubs are surviving to reach adulthood, and adult bears are dying more quickly because of rapid changes -- from a shifting food supply to being forced to hibernate later and later in the fall. Fewer than 2,000 grizzlies remain in the lower 48 states -- and about 700 of those call the Greater Yellowstone area home.
Now, grizzlies are under attack by the trophy hunting lobby looking to add them to their list of kills, and oil, logging, and mining companies looking to weaken protections on the public lands that these bears call home for drilling, logging, and mining -- permanently destroying these wildlife habitats.
**Protect vulnerable bears from trophy hunters and private interests. Rush your $27 donation before the clock strikes midnight and your giving power will be doubled! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[$27 donation + $27 match = $54 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732768?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$50 donation + $50 match = $100 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732769?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$100 donation + $100 match = $200 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732770?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732771?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Endangered species laws provide critical protection for America’s iconic animal species. They are also some of our most effective safeguards in the fight to protect our public lands and curb catastrophic climate change. If the GOP attacks on the ESA succeed, these harmful industries will have an even easier time drilling, fracking, mining, and operating massive factory farms.
For the sake of our wildlife and our planet, we can’t let Big Polluters and their cronies in Congress destroy our public lands and wipe out our endangered species.
At Friends of the Earth, we are using every tool available to **protect endangered species and our planet -- not Big Industry’s profits.** We know how to fight and win, and that’s exactly what we plan to do. Today, we are asking you to stand with us as we continue this work with your membership gift.
We all need to raise our voices in defense of vulnerable species. Together, we have the power to stop these killings, defend wildlife and protect vital species before we lose them for good. Make your $27 contribution now, before it’s too late.
**This Earth Day, join the fight to protect bears, endangered species, and our planet. Donate $27 now and have it matched dollar for dollar. **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[$27 donation + $27 match = $54 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732768?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$50 donation + $50 match = $100 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732769?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$100 donation + $100 match = $200 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732770?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732771?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Nicole Ghio
Senior program manager fossil fuels,
Friends of the Earth **
|
##### Contact Us:
Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](http://foe.org/about-us/contact/)

| | [Andy Roth](https://substack.com/redirect/26cb31c3-8d43-4159-b13a-730d7eabf72e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Why is Florida the only state that is governing in a conservative way? Why are fake Republicans in charge of Wyoming, the most conservative state in the country?
I answer these questions and more on Liz Wheeler's podcast this week. You can listen to it on whatever app you use to listen to podcasts. But here's the [video version](https://substack.com/redirect/a1268cd5-b6fd-49df-b106-6b6437366be7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on Rumble. And here's the Apple Podcast [link](https://substack.com/redirect/d0141460-5508-44ff-89a2-ead73c157005?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a1268cd5-b6fd-49df-b106-6b6437366be7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Please support the [State Freedom Caucus Network](https://substack.com/redirect/0f36ec75-3b93-40c4-9863-469df4597dba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) today.
[DONATE](https://substack.com/redirect/0f36ec75-3b93-40c4-9863-469df4597dba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Keep fighting,**

**Andy Roth**
_President
State Freedom Caucus Network_

name: Gary Sinise
subject: The National Memorial Day Parade is back
body:
This year, I'm honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8599c3b8a07246b6a03225b78c29657c&_e=zupxhqfm4jNJXUDqZVySMPK_jNKo0kAa8SnDOjUtoDo9IXTLqHLuSjfCpt0NQ6GYE1VMzZdgxWoRrfCRu_gyVTkMWXOJr_UyqPSH6PRq9zGKEXjY3wukkWxxLJe0P3Gq15rI0FUJNFYr_OL7gy-Tgz3KeS_sRzWGGxWYQunBeMFH2IqRqgLVAZgCgHoYGqCZ62W-7zlLVbBXWHINIFvVZPQ5cMpVk9mrUdXuuJ2FCxiqmluFlze-NVMms3v8XdAdq3HGfhSChV_vgvtCxfwRrNnqQ-zYmuCzX6s2fWhlj4Ve-lEVbrPb5Ldvh_d76ynj)
---
Fellow American, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ -- but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I 'm honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8599c3b8a07246b6a03225b78c29657c&_e=zupxhqfm4jNJXUDqZVySMPK_jNKo0kAa8SnDOjUtoDo9IXTLqHLuSjfCpt0NQ6GYE1VMzZdgxWoRrfCRu_gyVTkMWXOJr_UyqPSH6PRq9zGKEXjY3wukkWxxLJe0P3Gq15rI0FUJNFYr_OL7gy-Tgz3KeS_sRzWGGxWYQunBeMFZVw0X7dJoj0gy8VOnTxTQmXRXI_QrK8POjvG-p87G1TXuYYZdh-Iuuf7zEWtOt1qLM6IzpAZLPBsutd2ViABz_Du-WpY8klv-Ed-mfnoB4qem2ePq1m3ljlZIMIjo4ifjudAZ-TyIO7cJEqqZkO85)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8599c3b8a07246b6a03225b78c29657c&_e=zupxhqfm4jNJXUDqZVySMPK_jNKo0kAa8SnDOjUtoDo9IXTLqHLuSjfCpt0NQ6GYE1VMzZdgxWoRrfCRu_gyVTkMWXOJr_UyqPSH6PRq9zGKEXjY3wukkWxxLJe0P3Gq15rI0FUJNFYr_OL7gy-Tgz3KeS_sRzWGGxWYQunBeMHWFpToo1xi_8Qx270ENhw_dAj-u-Dnjndb9HVKjuCaqvdKAsU9ZO5FdyN3qpZhROfAaA_VYtLadyqfS5ICMlsGBJXwAdmdFHUANQ1ENcqcnCeTNIi4lT3DuMXW1POFggQIPokC2ykbyKrGdXz8YLZ0)
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8599c3b8a07246b6a03225b78c29657c&_e=zupxhqfm4jNJXUDqZVySMPK_jNKo0kAa8SnDOjUtoDo9IXTLqHLuSjfCpt0NQ6GYE1VMzZdgxWoRrfCRu_gyVTkMWXOJr_UyqPSH6PRq9zGKEXjY3wukkWxxLJe0P3Gq15rI0FUJNFYr_OL7gy-Tgz3KeS_sRzWGGxWYQunBeMEIP7VCcj85oDDxl8hhASLeUWKp8R_TD3h4kdeXawqkGO4G_ScuKzAwfY9g1pgdR5qRzc9kAUpHU6XMZEk8Q1yhffKzYZykth-zpWrbg5RjSXiucmceP3kWS4UjKPvrfGNz_ALRBxJZvoV2hz0eaesm)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they're bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our "Greatest Generation" heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country -- the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ -- as this year's event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation 's heroes deserve.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8599c3b8a07246b6a03225b78c29657c&_e=zupxhqfm4jNJXUDqZVySMPK_jNKo0kAa8SnDOjUtoDo9IXTLqHLuSjfCpt0NQ6GYE1VMzZdgxWoRrfCRu_gyVTkMWXOJr_UyqPSH6PRq9zGKEXjY3wukkWxxLJe0P3Gq15rI0FUJNFYr_OL7gy-Tgz3KeS_sRzWGGxWYQunBeMETltT1Pb7lDQcDpAKJYSSqWe4owPnQqfbridsxZ5-Q5bm-QOh4jXnFYU1hki4IFc-fVYnxHUr3f-8bATtfNvmpd0LPYXJuQS-k6MpFYL9q1dY0Hd5n4hZGIhJagUFKQ0KIOn28ZkjYDHKW73R83k9R)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8599c3b8a07246b6a03225b78c29657c&_e=zupxhqfm4jNJXUDqZVySMPK_jNKo0kAa8SnDOjUtoDo9IXTLqHLuSjfCpt0NQ6GYE1VMzZdgxWoRrfCRu_gyVTkMWXOJr_UyqPSH6PRq9zGKEXjY3wukkWxxLJe0P3Gq15rI0FUJNFYr_OL7gy-Tgz3KeS_sRzWGGxWYQunBeMF7QFi1CQtICNoDp2mphAocVLJFCk_UB1eLeZH8-nWeskiZnHiZ_jlEMBEhcEchNbdh5n7mSrxd1l9VjfqOGzDKgfXKrFeMMm3RVghG-r6VIaYrnLAVCjipO_CBqRnIcmaXRhKW2H2U0BYM0BBStaQk)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8599c3b8a07246b6a03225b78c29657c&_e=zupxhqfm4jNJXUDqZVySMPK_jNKo0kAa8SnDOjUtoDo9IXTLqHLuSjfCpt0NQ6GYE1VMzZdgxWoRrfCRu_gyVTkMWXOJr_UyqPSH6PRq9zGKEXjY3wukkWxxLJe0P3Gq15rI0FUJNFYr_OL7gy-Tgz3KeS_sRzWGGxWYQunBeME_93RLbD_IL-y9DIsDrBMzDmULBaM0cBKNm7ZjFkm0e-2OfJ-RYjAn6b87Ru_o6ybTBYtuUtR15Sgi5x3Lg7kafDfawgn3REDdGBWmWqNt_Vr2tkruwvZzEFOoMWBZkW_NQFeRx5H1Sjsj0dZhyQ2m) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day -- this year and every year -- please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please -- [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8599c3b8a07246b6a03225b78c29657c&_e=zupxhqfm4jNJXUDqZVySMPK_jNKo0kAa8SnDOjUtoDo9IXTLqHLuSjfCpt0NQ6GYE1VMzZdgxWoRrfCRu_gyVTkMWXOJr_UyqPSH6PRq9zGKEXjY3wukkWxxLJe0P3Gq15rI0FUJNFYr_OL7gy-Tgz3KeS_sRzWGGxWYQunBeME9BrRyl8PE20o5jj_bVBf5YDi7fmuevQGWRTg6ii92XiOI-Jtmcmhd0_BxmR68-1vI7ZWTPVTVWhikr4xec03NuQqh_54oOkIjtqHKseY36bn3jKmMf47xoqKGSjmpqfoCFPVrTFe7kRxENC9MwP5Y)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade

clean_body: This year, I'm honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. | | | Fellow American, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI NY -- but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump, that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. This year, I 'm honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they're bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our "Greatest Generation" heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country -- the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is more important now than ever -- as this year's event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home. The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like: Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever. Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam. * Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom. But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day -- this year and every year -- please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. name: Wisconsin Republicans
subject: Save the Little White Schoolhouse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin
body:
Help us defend the history and legacy of the Republican party
| [](https://links.wisconsin-republicans.com/u/click?_t=d8e9586dc433414d81114a9282924d1e&_m=b8c1a0fecd8049e9a1d3a2a140109105&_e=yxcAar8iagCIl8mITY_i9BPh2sfwOcVZo57l98vvHLAqe-EglsVYlvO14lD42mhTV2H5qGZfS4M_4efOVL4fEB2ZPpGMo1OKRwv7JGqp6G7wGz-1X-tIAP0rofz6qhJmBif7s9qDqgkbD2pQITPC-ESeaehTaaKBDNyC5FusHwHKi-YYMtTK3woDRUOSC-i9_NVAYYxXZhH8fdDyc-KLLTJxo4euw7okV_noNyrOChGrVf4-W-CiQPagUJ9KC836hAmBTY3iOtH3QH-AeTOIqYdu69R4mFeTlZA8vmO_qGZcPYXpOGCLesklcplh2JIs6Hyzh9PYh3ivW0qg0ZYcqfzDl_4GsZCCpsKthHH9OYg%3D)
---
Friend,
---
A meeting at the Little White Schoolhouse held on March 20, 1854, to protest the westward expansion of slavery, eventually led to the formation of the Republican Party.
---
**This schoolhouse, the birthplace of the Republican party, is an icon we are proud to have as a part of history here in our state.**
---
But earlier this week the Little White Schoolhouse was moved to a new location that no longer qualifies it for national historic monument status.
---
[](https://links.wisconsin-republicans.com/u/click?_t=d8e9586dc433414d81114a9282924d1e&_m=b8c1a0fecd8049e9a1d3a2a140109105&_e=yxcAar8iagCIl8mITY_i9BPh2sfwOcVZo57l98vvHLAqe-EglsVYlvO14lD42mhTV2H5qGZfS4M_4efOVL4fEB2ZPpGMo1OKRwv7JGqp6G7wGz-1X-tIAP0rofz6qhJmBif7s9qDqgkbD2pQITPC-ESeaehTaaKBDNyC5FusHwHKi-YYMtTK3woDRUOSC-i9_NVAYYxXZhH8fdDyc-KLLd0Oo0q59WABtIE_PekV9P5jbw7-6qjWsKBZoUFWnpKR_zWxZUUmxtyur5x0EvodqcVG8YjBqX6lm239VgrvHm7tVto_GQ-gphCu6XOh0W02zIcOCfl5KnJ8A5ddgsi3XjAmpnWp3i6SACnIAexmXg4%3D)
---
_This has caused an uproar as many are disappointed and frustrated with some saying this move is an attempt to “erase the history” of the Republican party’s anti-slavery roots._
---
_We need to FIGHT BACK to defend our history and protect the legacy of freedom that our party has stood for since its founding in Ripon._
---
That’s why we need your help to keep this historic monument a part of Wisconsin and Republican history alive.
---
[**Please add your name to our Save the Schoolhouse petition to help us keep Republican history alive.**](https://links.wisconsin-republicans.com/u/click?_t=d8e9586dc433414d81114a9282924d1e&_m=b8c1a0fecd8049e9a1d3a2a140109105&_e=yxcAar8iagCIl8mITY_i9BPh2sfwOcVZo57l98vvHLAqe-EglsVYlvO14lD42mhTV2H5qGZfS4M_4efOVL4fEB2ZPpGMo1OKRwv7JGqp6G7wGz-1X-tIAP0rofz6qhJmBif7s9qDqgkbD2pQITPC-ESeaehTaaKBDNyC5FusHwHKi-YYMtTK3woDRUOSC-i9_NVAYYxXZhH8fdDyc-KLLV7Yavzl69Bmh6nSRQJvNkPVgXjlVd7YXvJlgo283TQA2z4hSzWyvd7cr5Y7rjmaGP2chsnMVAsqj7J2bpucMDu2j8CzUvQmuC3Fu3x2bVBwMqWcupNpmQh6956Y89d-yMkzNH_kkoi7xsVxq3pvJXM%3D)
---

[ADD YOUR NAME](https://links.wisconsin-republicans.com/u/click?_t=d8e9586dc433414d81114a9282924d1e&_m=b8c1a0fecd8049e9a1d3a2a140109105&_e=yxcAar8iagCIl8mITY_i9BPh2sfwOcVZo57l98vvHLAqe-EglsVYlvO14lD42mhTV2H5qGZfS4M_4efOVL4fEB2ZPpGMo1OKRwv7JGqp6G7wGz-1X-tIAP0rofz6qhJmBif7s9qDqgkbD2pQITPC-ESeaehTaaKBDNyC5FusHwHKi-YYMtTK3woDRUOSC-i9_NVAYYxXZhH8fdDyc-KLLVR2B_qNhdQCD2C3qo2m-K5Imr62OKxBS9k8xkIgoVkxrCLMNfKT56tAnELq0URVX4XnE5vg06Y7FLwCookIpZ60FW1vgcrl6j7ooVULZKrsru_dH_ls-dyMi7ShtLGHaxfgoGSvb-Y-Vo1TlX4zdnM%3D)
---

Thank you,

Wisconsin Republicans

name: Response Needed
subject: [URGENT] NPR in danger!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
We need to know where you stand on this!
| | | **URGENT UPDATE: Republicans are trying to __DEFUND__ NPR!**

Republicans are attacking one of our most important news sources, and we need to know where Democrats stand -- **but we have NO RESPONSE from you on file:**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/12802?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230421-ResponseNeeded-DefendNPRRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230421-ResponseNeeded-DefendNPRRF-Pros-sl1&akid=10511%2E9716520%2EtD-sNF)
**Do you support National Public Radio?**

| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/12802?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230421-ResponseNeeded-DefendNPRRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230421-ResponseNeeded-DefendNPRRF-Pros-sl1&akid=10511%2E9716520%2EtD-sNF)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/12802?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230421-ResponseNeeded-DefendNPRRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230421-ResponseNeeded-DefendNPRRF-Pros-sl1&akid=10511%2E9716520%2EtD-sNF)
---

**Team, the GOP is going on the _attack_ against one of our most trusted news sources -- National Public Radio (NPR)!**

Now that they have a House majority, some far-right Republicans want to BAN any federal dollars from going to NPR -- threatening a news organization that has brought quality, non-profit journalism to Americans for _decades._

Republicans are trying to tear down, defund, or delegitimize EVERY trusted news organization that threatens ultra-conservative outlets like Fox News -- and that's why we URGENTLY need Democrats like you to speak up.

**_We set a goal of gathering 10,000 responses by midnight, but we still haven’t heard from you! _**

**Do you support National Public Radio?**

**[As one of Congress’ biggest voices against socialism, I’m a top target for the Left in 2024, and I need your help to fight back and defend our Florida freedom in Florida and across this great nation.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=1dfd08d3a826474ba769fcb233af07be&_e=8RSVsCtrp2vsrgC510CmPLhNBvjQ8WNzRGQY0yB670BjdRIzI-tH0Vh5YE5H4EaJfnWXr_qyLjzQrM8tdLXA5y5SEVXKb-wBbcyMjIf_XdiM5iu2xPa1DXPrnXz1szLXzHgfIUaYYQIERqPR7DPaBADhIzP5w002SFc3uPJPZ0gs3-ZigfmrqwmXrjhd9GvwipdOVs6AMot40qjRgvDV_vtTRQI1E5xNvItpmsPa-nN4tpGVpFkh20NodU0BJz0bdswu4k4u4Ds_0Nj5IcK_FvwqUZhKw2MLOGJP3eM8Kw5axPBe4NqDBAMHl-t8JCTJgpSm9nxjP2gDGJxwFpPnDcD6fgQMFPULMCAiuWgFXxKuVpWApzhN-rYHLDjAtp3dhRSYrs_t3wA_aMNp0hnJLfNCAsmUQUWTvNPPSlaNvoPoyVqtsOU20rbdOw4iEyZacFgmRwKzlF49gtY6uKlWZT5e3Vf-KoyzW52lJYXRktLhcG8XZt8x3Z6bWAD-FSFgjHSAV6lnMy8-vZGTCqNEPw%3D%3D)**
But first, let me tell you a little bit about myself.
I was born in Miami’s Little Havana neighborhood as the daughter of Cuban exiles. **My parents risked _everything_ to seek FREEDOM in America.**
Growing up, they told me about the horrors of socialism back home in Cuba - and instilled in me the importance of individual freedom and hard work.
I was blessed that my parents made it to our great nation, but I knew millions of people throughout the world are still living under tyranny, so I dedicated my life to exposing corrupt dictators.
As an Emmy-award-winning journalist, I took on Venezuela’s Nicolas Madura, Chile’s Augusto Pinochet, and Fidel Castro himself head-on.
**[But I never thought I’d see the same socialist agenda I was fighting make its way to the United States.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=1dfd08d3a826474ba769fcb233af07be&_e=8RSVsCtrp2vsrgC510CmPLhNBvjQ8WNzRGQY0yB670BjdRIzI-tH0Vh5YE5H4EaJfnWXr_qyLjzQrM8tdLXA5y5SEVXKb-wBbcyMjIf_XdiM5iu2xPa1DXPrnXz1szLXzHgfIUaYYQIERqPR7DPaBADhIzP5w002SFc3uPJPZ0gs3-ZigfmrqwmXrjhd9GvwipdOVs6AMot40qjRgvDV_vtTRQI1E5xNvItpmsPa-nN4tpGVpFkh20NodU0BJz0bdswu4k4u4Ds_0Nj5IcK_FvwqUZhKw2MLOGJP3eM8Kw5axPBe4NqDBAMHl-t8JCTJgpSm9nxjP2gDGJxwFpPnDcD6fgQMFPULMCAiuWgFXxI4Wx-wDqk9o0RIQF1loNqGr7a9EHaCGX_6ZOiLZ8NDF8mDT4TBm4WZjXbZXEPIZxS-qVrhBmLuoWpQE-3ecDfdC2IzYZhJo9jJ1T0pozkM63IAAi7F24kUJZU24o4NMp1vKP6PL-5-XueaqeHQppRlBEyP7FJiiFQrCfwJIaRW2Q%3D%3D)**

My parents didn’t risk their lives to come to America just for our great country to go down the same path as the Cuban regime they escaped, Fellow conservative.
**I need your help to take on the socialist Left and keep America free. I know how much you love America, and now, it’s time to put that patriotism into action.**
