name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: My email from yesterday
body:
did you get it and can you help? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen/law-suit-2?e=9828080a05)
---
| | Peter,

I sent an email yesterday about my next step in this fight for freedom. Over the past several years, I've had to defend my reputation and medical license against the attacks of political activists weaponizing the Board of Medical Practice. During the latter part of my senate term and my run for governor, this threat hung over my head constantly.

In this fifth and latest investigation, which was totally dismissed, I was perturbed to see Keith Ellison join in as a political actor - hoping to use the weight of his office to influence the process. It's becoming harder and harder for doctors (and all Americans) to speak freely and have a political opinion without it meaning a weaponized government agency can come after you.

[I am preparing a lawsuit in Federal court](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=1b76e9aecd&e=9828080a05) against Keith Ellison and the Board of Medical Practice. No doctors or professionals should go through this ever again. How many people have lost their jobs or their livelihoods in the past few years because they expressed something against the mainstream? How many lost their careers because they wouldn't do what the government demanded?

My team and I, along with capable attorneys, are prepared to take this lawsuit as high as we need to. Our goal is to aid the courts in further drawing the line between protected speech and professional conduct subject to regulation, as well as holding accountable those responsible for the outrageous weaponization of government against me and so many others.

I am writing you again today because [I need your help](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=9fb9620eaa&e=9828080a05). We've created a [fundraising link](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=e92d6d20fd&e=9828080a05) to help fund this expensive process. I have already invested my own resources and will continue to do so, no matter the cost. But this lawsuit will hopefully set a precedent for all Minnesotans and Americans, that they can feel their 1st and 14th Amendment rights are protected again. Will you help me before the weekend hits? [A donation of $5, $10, $15 or more would](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=6f897d5025&e=9828080a05) help immensely in what will be a long and arduous fight against the Attorney General's office.

Thank you for your support. Thank you for your prayers. Thank you for being with me in the fight to come. It is time to go on offense. [Will you join me](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=95d2389019&e=9828080a05)?
---
|
Sincerely,

Dr. Scott Jensen
---
|
---

Fractured Times Media LLC9375 Pierson Lake DriveChaska, MN 55318

name: Letitia James
subject: FWD: a record-breaking number of voter suppression laws
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
---

name: Conservative Intel
subject: Dueling Populisms—Urban Equality vs. Rural Liberty—free report Victor Davis
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWFf2WiDDN

Populism is nothing new to world history. While it can be easy to
think about American politics as being divided between the Left
and the Right ....

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWFf2WiDDN

Dear
Friend,
Populism
is nothing new to world history. While it can be easy to think
about American politics as being divided between the Left and the
Right, the reality is much different. What we've really been
seeing is two sets of populist backlash against both the Democrat
and Republican establishment.

And
believe it or not, these tensions actually trace their roots back
to Roman times.

That's
why I'm sending you this email today.

I want to
make sure you get a free copy of one of our popular eBooks:
Dueling Populisms by Victor Davis Hanson.

Hanson is
a Hoover Senior Fellow and world-renowned historian, and I think
you'll get a lot out of his insights. Inside this important
eBook, you'll learn more about:

What
we can expect from a political climate ruled by movements that
rebel against both the establishment-and each other.
The
important parallels between these ancient movements and their
modern counterparts in both progressive and conservative
populism.
What
lies ahead for America as we revive these ancient tensions in our
culture.

You can
get your free copy of Dueling Populisms using this secure link:
https://resources.hoover.org/dueling-populisms-signup/.

And
please feel free to share this with your family and friends. It's
important that we recall the voices of experience and apply them
to contemporary conflicts and challenges.

You can
use this link to get access to your free eBook right now.

Thanks,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

clean_body: We’re counting on you to join the 14,000 Democrats nationwide TODAY that have already renewed their DLCC membership. | | | | | Here are three reasons why you should become a DLCC member → 1\. Grassroots support last year carried Democrats to victory, helping flip four chambers, secure three new Democratic trifectas, and gain seats in at least 24 chambers. If we want to expand on these wins in 2023, we need you to join our team. 2\. Over 98% of our donations come from grassroots donors, like you. Small gifts of $10 and $25 add up to make a huge impact in electing state Dems. 3\. By becoming a member, you’re helping power the DLCC’s groundbreaking strategy. Ahead of elections in Virginia and Pennsylvania in 2023 and nationwide elections in 2024, we’re building the best-in-class analytics, organizing, and mobilization programs that led Democrats to victory last November. It’s critical that we have support from our members all year long, not just in the days leading up to Election Day in November. We’re facing must-win special elections and a fundraising deadline all in a few weeks. name: VoteVets HQ
subject: Moving the needle
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
We wanted to take some time to show you how VoteVets moves the needle in competitive races.
#
Derek, we wanted to take some time to show you how VoteVets moves the needle in competitive races.
To put it simply, it comes down to trust. And if you have a minute, we hope you’ll let us explain.
VoteVets supports Veterans who run for public office. A great example is Senator Mark Kelly. Mark isn’t just an astronaut — he’s a Navy Veteran and a trained engineer. He served for 25 years, and he flew into combat in Desert Storm. Now he serves Arizona in the Senate.
The Military is the most trusted institution in the United States, and one of the big reasons for that is serving in the Military means putting the country before yourself.
That means something to people. And when candidates like Mark run in competitive races, people gravitate towards them. They trust that they will put the country first in public life, too.
Finding candidates like Mark, backing them up, defending them from attacks and lies and smears — that’s how VoteVets moves the needle. That’s how we win.
But we need your help to do it.
**[So we’re asking you to make your first $3 contribution to VoteVets today. And when you see us running ads to back candidates who can win in tough races over the next two years, you’ll know you played a part.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-apr23.Brw65h&refcode=em230421-1-15&t=1&akid=8198%2E3013755%2Etzhy2B)**

_“The Biden administration has spent the past two years trying to inject politics into the military. In February this effort reached a new low as the administration put the taxpayer on the hook for travel and paid time off_ _for service members, wives and other dependents to get elective abortions.” --**Senator Tuberville via Wall Street Journal article**_ _ _[**Read More >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/2b8c93237dee02da/bdca1b3bdee63a51c3d6b838967d376c/33013) Our storied United States military has a distinguished lineage and precedence of honor, duty, service and sacrifice – however, being used as political pawns by leftists has tragically become the new order of things in Woke Washington. **Senator Tuberville has made it abundantly clear: he will not allow this to happen.**

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62112170/402343447/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGNlYzlhZS01N2UwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AZLH3GNDWtFZpNOYc9UXLrCxpkXnHzcPnPxZlsA7LYI=&emci=b25b3145-c7de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=14cec9ae-57e0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) | Team, Although Congress hasn’t passed a federal minimum wage increase since 2009, the Fairness Project has supported and won 10 ballot measure campaigns in eight states and localities to raise the minimum wage since our founding in 2016. We’re proud of the work we’re doing to ensure workers are receiving a fair living wage and are able to work safely thanks to strong labor protections. _But friends, we can’t stop fighting until Americans are guaranteed a livable wage all across the country — **and we can’t do it without your help.**_ [_**Please sign on to our petition now and demand Congress take action to raise the federal minimum wage to a livable wage!**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62112174/402343449/2025808385?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGNlYzlhZS01N2UwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AZLH3GNDWtFZpNOYc9UXLrCxpkXnHzcPnPxZlsA7LYI=&emci=b25b3145-c7de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=14cec9ae-57e0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) [SIGN ON](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62112175/402343453/2025808385?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGNlYzlhZS01N2UwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AZLH3GNDWtFZpNOYc9UXLrCxpkXnHzcPnPxZlsA7LYI=&emci=b25b3145-c7de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=14cec9ae-57e0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) Too many Americans are struggling to put food on the table or pay their bills. As a result, citizens have been taking matters into their own hands to raise wages when politicians won’t do their jobs. From Nebraska to California, we’ve shown we can create the change our communities want _and deserve_ by showing up at the ballot box. [_**We’re gearing up for 2023 and 2024, but in the meantime, please add your name to our petition and demand a raise in the federal minimum wage!**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62112178/402343454/2025808385?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGNlYzlhZS01N2UwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AZLH3GNDWtFZpNOYc9UXLrCxpkXnHzcPnPxZlsA7LYI=&emci=b25b3145-c7de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=14cec9ae-57e0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62112179/402343455/2025808385?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGNlYzlhZS01N2UwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AZLH3GNDWtFZpNOYc9UXLrCxpkXnHzcPnPxZlsA7LYI=&emci=b25b3145-c7de-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=14cec9ae-57e0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) Thank you for standing with workers! – Fairness Project

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Dying bees! Please help, Friend
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend, ** | **Act now before we lose vulnerable pollinators forever: Donate $27 before midnight and help us reach our $180,000 Earth Day goal! ** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$27 donation + $27 match = $54 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732979?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$50 donation + $50 match = $100 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732980?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$100 donation + $100 match = $200 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732981?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732982?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
An "insect apocalypse."
A "second Silent Spring."
A "catastrophic collapse of nature's ecosystems."
This is how scientists are describing the loss of bees and other insects. **[The time to act is now: Donate $27 or more and help us meet our $180,000 Earth Day goal for pollinators and the planet! When you do, your gift will be matched, dollar for dollar -- but only until midnight TOMORROW.](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732983?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
Neonicotinoid pesticides are a key driver of this crisis. They can impact bees' ability to navigate and reproduce and even kill bees on contact. But they're also the most widely used insecticides in agriculture.
The EPA has a chance to ban neonics once and for all. Instead, it might **_approve these pesticides for another 15 years._** But there's still hope, Friend. Because of supporters like you, we have the chance to make real change -- change that would help protect bees, people, and the planet. Will you join us in this fight?
**Help get bee-killing pesticides out of our food system. Donate $27 immediately and help us reach our $180,000 goal before midnight TOMORROW! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[$27 donation + $27 match = $54 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732979?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$50 donation + $50 match = $100 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732980?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$100 donation + $100 match = $200 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732981?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732982?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Bees play a crucial role in their ecosystems. From fields of blooming wildflowers to rows of veggies on organic farms, these insects and others aid in plant reproduction. Many of these plants support an entire web of life by offering habitat and food for countless other species.
We rely on bees and other pollinators for 75% of the world's food crops, including the most nutritious -- so when we lose bees,**we also lose some of the foods that keep us healthy!** In fact, the decline in bees and other pollinators has already harmed global fruit, vegetable, and nut production. Without access to these vital crops and a healthy diet, people could be at higher risk of _**heart disease, stroke, diabetes, and even cancer, according to a recent study.**_
There's no mystery here. Study after study has found that the massive use of pesticides, like Bayer-Monsanto's bee-toxic neonicotinoids, are key drivers in the decimation of pollinators.
But pollinator-killers like Bayer-Monsanto are sweeping their lethal impact under the rug -- and the United States EPA is giving them a free pass, allowing widespread use of toxic pesticides instead of shifting away from chemicals we KNOW are killing massive numbers of bees.
**Stop the downward spiral of vulnerable pollinator populations. Donate $27 or more to Friends of the Earth today! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[$27 donation + $27 match = $54 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732979?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$50 donation + $50 match = $100 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732980?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$100 donation + $100 match = $200 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732981?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732982?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Bees are a canary in the coal mine, signaling that the toxic way we produce food is on a deadly track. We must act NOW to protect our health and ensure that we are not among the last generations to share the planet with countless species of wild bees.
At Friends of the Earth, we are doing everything we can to help save pollinators, protect our health, and stop the destruction of our planet. We're working to ban toxic pesticides that are driving the decline of bees and butterflies. At the same time, we're pushing major grocery companies like Kroger to stop selling food grown with these chemicals. With your help and membership support today, we can win.
But the bees are running out of time -- **and they need you. **
If we don't stand up to Big Ag now, we could stand to lose _hundreds_ of wild bee species in North America alone. It's up to you to help prevent a world without these vulnerable pollinators. Please, Friend, we need you by our side as we ramp up our efforts to save wild bees from extinction and protect our planet.
**Act now to give pollinators a fighting chance. Rush your $27 donation while it can still be matched, and help us reach our $180,000 Earth Day goal before the clock strikes midnight.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[$27 donation + $27 match = $54 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732979?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$50 donation + $50 match = $100 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732980?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[$100 donation + $100 match = $200 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732981?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1732982?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Kendra Klein
Deputy director of science,
Friends of the Earth **

name: =?utf-8?Q?Anika=20Page?=
subject: Defunding the police is dangerous. Come hear why!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8133000?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**Defunding the police is dangerous. **For too long, anti-law enforcement progressives have been allowed to undermine confidence in our local police.

Rafael Mangual, a best-selling author, will be in Jackson to explain why law enforcement needs our full support.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=1b94d07233&e=5703353baa)
---
**_Click on the image above to reserve a ticket!_**
| Mangual's research shows that it is often poor, vulnerable people who pay the price for the elite's anti-police position.

**He will be joined by State Auditor Shad White**. White has been a strong component of combatting crime in our capital city and has highlighted some of the key issues that lead to the ongoing high homicide rate in Jackson, such as the epidemic of fatherlessness in the state.

**Tickets are available[here](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=b8da8bb199&e=5703353baa). **

Hope to see you there!
---
|
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=ef57e14e66&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Best,

Anika Page
Director of Operations
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=28257184b4) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=28257184b4).

name: Senator Ted Cruz
subject: Can I trust you with something?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Take the 2024 Republican Platform Survey >>

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665053%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aIQYyEqiGadG6yfBnvv8sg&sysid=1)

I need patriots I can trust, Friend.

My Senate Republican colleagues and I just left a BIG 2024 Election meeting, but we ran into a problem - we needed more up-to-date information to make better strategic decisions.

I’m entrusting YOU with completing the **[Official 2024 Republican Platform Survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665054%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=A9VZrvjansSpdNy46qH2Iw&sysid=1)** because of your excellent track record of providing valuable input for the Conservative movement.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665065%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AKb2Rx%2bP8fz1z883CI%2by4g&sysid=1)

Your opinions, concerns, and interests are CRITICAL to formulating our 2024 campaign platform. We can only **WIN** in 2024 when we create an agenda __that best represents the will of the American people.__

You’ll be the voice of your fellow patriots in your area, so we’re counting on your quick response.

**[Please take the Official 2024 Republican Platform Survey IMMEDIATELY to represent your area in our critical 2024 Election strategy.>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665066%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8mC4gipsv5t6ObNGqYOGlg&sysid=1)**

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665065%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AKb2Rx%2bP8fz1z883CI%2by4g&sysid=1)

2024 is the most important election of our lifetime. We can’t afford another defeat like the one we had in 2022. The **[Official 2024 Republican Platform Survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665054%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=A9VZrvjansSpdNy46qH2Iw&sysid=1)** is our way of correcting our missteps and ensuring a GOP victory next year.

Please don’t let our Party down, friend. We’re counting on you.

**[I need you to complete the Official 2024 Republican Platform Survey AS SOON AS POSSIBLE to ensure your response is recorded.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665067%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hliGPuiT2rLRy%2bFNYgzdzA&sysid=1)**

Thank you,

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c665068%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=h87SW5wskjHWLUY9g7z8dg&sysid=1)

name: COURIER
subject: In the 24 hours following Trump’s arraignment:
body:
Right-leaning Facebook pages are leading the conversation on Trump’s indictment.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=887%2E120351%2E8AUR2X)
Peter —
When Donald Trump turned himself into authorities and was arraigned at the Manhattan County Courthouse, we knew that right-wing bad actors would seize the moment to push their extreme agenda on social media.
**But what we didn’t expect was that they would be leading the conversation.**
In the 24 hours following Trump’s arraignment:
* Posts on right-wing Facebook pages saw over one million interactions.
* One of the top-performing posts was Trump’s livestream of his Mar-a-Lago speech.
* And we saw a spike in posts attacking D.A. Alvin Bragg and Judge Merchan, who are prosecuting Trump’s case.

[**These moments are at the heart of what COURIER is all about. We combat disinformation like this in real-time, to ensure that the people who are most vulnerable to right-wing bad actors know the truth. Will you chip in $5 to power our team?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3665?refcode=em-20230421&t=2&akid=887%2E120351%2E8AUR2X)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3665?refcode=em-20230421&t=3&akid=887%2E120351%2E8AUR2X)**
With the 2024 Presidential election already in full swing, and one of the leading candidates in the Republican Party facing criminal charges, our work to stop right-wing misinformation has never been more important.
**Peter, the reality is running newsrooms in 8 battleground states takes a tremendous amount of time and resources.**
From providing accurate, accessible articles that aren’t hidden behind paywalls, or by engaging directly with voters on social media to provide real-time information about urgent news and local issues, we need your generous support to keep our lights on.
[**Can you chip in $5 to and combat disinformation about Trump’s arraignment?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3665?refcode=em-20230421&t=4&akid=887%2E120351%2E8AUR2X)
**We know that the best antidote to their bad information is the truth**. That’s why our newsrooms are working in real-time to counter these false claims and spread our trustworthy journalism to as many people as possible — **we just need the resources to do it.**
Thank you,
The COURIER team

**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=887_120351_8AUR2X&akid=887%2E120351%2E8AUR2X)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=887%2E120351%2E8AUR2X)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

| VSHL Endorses John McGuire in Senate District 10
---
| Dear Friend,
Life is a miracle, it begins at conception, and it must be protected. I'm honored to have the support and endorsement of The Virginia Society for Human Life (VSHL). VSHL is the Virginia pro-life affiliate of the National Right to Life Committee.

My Pro-Life Speech: [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YmwUABUyuZhdueehorUHtGbKHJczEMmLkOrsFzNwRZd1dxu1CsJYBM_5opS_f6IRnztUVt7FQUVHulyI6q6Nz210lL9gJqntmPvf9jJf6kmnWtOTEzqFDPyUxtMDG8OBRsWANTdzpHyXVFZAxLwlg7Cs1lkTw2nmfsngHoe_zH4fqTT2Yf62hg==&c=FTCo3pVDIjNXxmxUXT4xhmPCcM7oxIyLk-BJyau3DS0gNUPEb8bv8A==&ch=ix3w2OC9-15tZapZE-5QxedPRUTUBNVba_qY82VtwMCVHLhK4-TZWQ==)

During one party rule, Virginia Democrats undid 20 years worth of protection on life. I have a perfect six-year pro-life voting record in the General Assembly. As your State Senator, I will continue to fight for this inalienable right to life.
Jeremiah 1:5 \- "Before I formed thee in the belly I knew thee; and before thou camest forth out of the womb I sanctified thee, and I ordained thee a prophet unto the nations."
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YmwUABUyuZhdueehorUHtGbKHJczEMmLkOrsFzNwRZd1dxu1CsJYBNnHWO4iEm3jZL4fG3z8aFJRvaaV68Wf_JfQ-WvOQpeMYYj_fUx8x_2yltW0FFvvc2dKgq-tflvhoO_v1HHBy_cmbOVLEL3lBItEfOOQO_20uNXv2lKm2YqO1JHKukopYA==&c=FTCo3pVDIjNXxmxUXT4xhmPCcM7oxIyLk-BJyau3DS0gNUPEb8bv8A==&ch=ix3w2OC9-15tZapZE-5QxedPRUTUBNVba_qY82VtwMCVHLhK4-TZWQ==)

|
April 21, 2023
For Immediate Release:
The Virginia Society for Human Life (VSHL) Endorses John McGuire in Senate District 10

Olivia Gans Turner and The Virginia Society for Human Life is proud to endorse pro-life champion, Delegate John McGuire, for Virginia State Senate District 10. John is a staunch supporter of life, believing life begins at conception, no exceptions, and he will always fight to protect all life. He believes that the right to life is inalienable and all unborn and born babies should be protected by the law. He will continue to support and chair legislation, which respects and protects the right to life of each member of the human family, both before and after birth.

We believe John is the best choice in the new Virginia State Senate District 10 to preserve and protect our inalienable right to life here in the Commonwealth. The Senate in Virginia needs strong leadership to roll back the many egregious abortion bills we saw under the Northam Administration. John McGuire will provide that leadership, just as he did as a Navy SEAL protecting this country. Delegates to the 10th State Senate District Convention, please vote for John McGuire on May 6th at Buckingham County High School.

Sincerely,
Olivia Turner, VSHL President

Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire
|
Convention Updates go to [www.john4va.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YmwUABUyuZhdueehorUHtGbKHJczEMmLkOrsFzNwRZd1dxu1CsJYBFMl9exsCPclAF_MBJr9bhc_W4DSbMThSjE4F1an59cDmlN2OjbePGxBP52IyXiaz2vHzYKl5AJMxbIJncfoXEUtyqFzl6bYsT68u55NnFSIB_f3HIMY6MXoAD3Tcc0BF9HMjS8nzlFMxmHtjLMitLq_FNazgZAnX7S4WNix6kfpYqWA9VtW_ysM_X3cC07Vs3tDTdUI1TYn&c=FTCo3pVDIjNXxmxUXT4xhmPCcM7oxIyLk-BJyau3DS0gNUPEb8bv8A==&ch=ix3w2OC9-15tZapZE-5QxedPRUTUBNVba_qY82VtwMCVHLhK4-TZWQ==)

| I'm running for State Senate so we can un-California Virginia. It starts with election integrity. For a better future, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and stop the madness. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause.
I am committed, as your Representative, to adhering to the principal duties of government, as stated in our Declaration of Independence, i.e., the protection of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.
Thank you, once again, for allowing me to serve you in the Virginia House of Delegates. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district!

Sincerely, Olivia Turner, VSHL President Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | Convention Updates go to == | Just 15 days until May 6! All delegates are asked arrive at Buckingham H.S. on May 6th between 8:30-10am. Arriving early will ensure that you are able to get in to vote before the doors close. Please send an email to john@mcguireforvirginia.com if you have any questions. | == | I'm running for State Senate so we can un-California Virginia. It starts with election integrity. For a better future, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and stop the madness. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. I am committed, as your Representative, to adhering to the principal duties of government, as stated in our Declaration of Independence, i.e., the protection of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. Thank you, once again, for allowing me to serve you in the Virginia House of Delegates. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district! | 70 Plus Endorsement List == | == == You can donate == or by mail. If you'd like to donate by mail, please make a check out to "Friends of John McGuire" and send to: Friends of John McGuire P.O. Box 168 Manakin-Sabot, VA 23103 | | | | | | | God Bless America, Delegate John McGuire Running for == in 2023 Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner Pro-Life == Pro-Gun America 1st The Spirit of Virginia Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 == NFIB 100 Endorsement List == == == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA Email: john@mcguireforvirginia.com | | == | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | Friends of John McGuire | Friends of John McGuire, PO Box 168, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

## The Kellen Courier - Campaign Newsletter, Edition 3
---
| |
---
| | The Kellen Courier brings you the latest news from the campaign trail. Friends, Family, and Supporters, We had a busy week on the campaign trail, including George Santos's re-election announcement on Monday. In response, we spoke with several reporters and journalists. We also participated in a key stakeholder meeting with members of the Nassau County Republican Party, including Chairman Joe Cairo. I met with Chantee Lans from Eyewitness News ABC 7 via Zoom. Read the article and watch the video here. Matthew Rice from The New York Sun wrote an upbeat [article](https://www.kellencurry.com/so/1aOU1NfZV/c?w=5ISUXsE3gcA9u91UyNMK5XajQFlRtUdkinuwP7lECcM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubnlzdW4uY29tL2FydGljbGUvbWVldC10aGUtbWFuLXRyeWluZy10by1kZWZlYXQtZ2VvcmdlLXNhbnRvcy1pbi1uZXh0LXllYXJzLXJlcHVibGljYW4tcHJpbWFyeSIsInIiOiJiYWFjNTZjMS1lOGFkLTRmMDMtOTZkMC0xZmE3ZjE0ODU0ZTkiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyMThjNmJhYS01MzllLTQ3M2EtYjYzZi1iMjM0Yzc2ZThjNzQifQ) calling my resume impressive, but most importantly, the resume is real! I also spoke with Joe Arena from News 12 Long Island. The video of the feature is below! While TV is great exposure, I am particularly honored to be featured in the Student Highlight for Columbia University Sports Management, see [here](https://www.kellencurry.com/so/1aOU1NfZV/c?w=U4lnIZn3NActq5XwVQ826jmM_rJj4748D5sBcqpZp2w.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGlua2VkaW4uY29tL2ZlZWQvdXBkYXRlL3VybjpsaTphY3Rpdml0eTo3MDU0MTY1NTUyMTE3NzM5NTIxLyIsInIiOiJiYWFjNTZjMS1lOGFkLTRmMDMtOTZkMC0xZmE3ZjE0ODU0ZTkiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyMThjNmJhYS01MzllLTQ3M2EtYjYzZi1iMjM0Yzc2ZThjNzQifQ). Your many messages of encouragement keep rolling in and keep me going. I cannot thank you enough. I hope to count on your continued support to like, follow, and share our message! Please share your thoughts using our website [Contact page](https://www.kellencurry.com/so/1aOU1NfZV/c?w=SPKRzggG4zoXvXXClJx-d5BPHQFrtqDJePjRbF-xJz8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cua2VsbGVuY3VycnkuY29tL2NvbnRhY3QiLCJyIjoiYmFhYzU2YzEtZThhZC00ZjAzLTk2ZDAtMWZhN2YxNDg1NGU5IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMjE4YzZiYWEtNTM5ZS00NzNhLWI2M2YtYjIzNGM3NmU4Yzc0In0). Please share this newsletter with your community!

name: Juliana at United We Dream Action
subject: Backlash is brewing
body:
Title 42 is finally set to end next month. | | | | | **Title 42 is _finally_ set to end next month. But anti-immigrant groups are urgently trying to replace it with more cruel restrictions on asylum.** **[Will you rush a donation to help us fight back against plans to reinstate Title 42, criminalize asylum seekers, and put migrants in danger?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8boxgscbY-5-ibPYXy2zRI_H8FwZdcAFKTAeYfDJ6QxplJLXWaoGLm6HC2hPgY3AvyXL4Wej90X46WQpCdC-FtlLPnA8y_JfrwWZh0nCcgbg2VFF92yK9CQpHilq33q-Hc4kBHz601P_WONmqPQ1Y06jj17qFSiKW2DWa5wFz8JrEcyq2XMOrMLXskGzFT5t5oJmyU2nZCYbr7Y5GhkAdX23txkGBkK_JjPfoIg0T3L4kdHe4pww1RtD3E_jKydh1-0JiuAhWfxJQT3aMXqv6lQ45QnAkxG7xoNGCLvFl-56BLVlt5pT7uAHHS9DyF6Zqo4C4X7jhUmUk9LQon3FDPw/3vj/JeAN1xKRQBqxFUaryduXYw/h0/oITIb9Sv56jd_YEjIC_WAn2xLTIlxQscZVpPtIyxskY)** | | [DONATE NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8boxgscbY-5-ibPYXy2zRI_H8FwZdcAFKTAeYfDJ6QxplJLXWaoGLm6HC2hPgY3AvyXL4Wej90X46WQpCdC-FtnpYmt13zTkmfL1B0YKRy4n_8qxhz8BegFLTah-FcV45MPrs10dwg-XZyYzt3boFoUSf6CXgQ_zPET72YgI_xJglYuwxfCkJGbqGydeo2nWBaNHQLokAaTnogFMOajUuQDCScyTK4Y5QUbw5RjyGX1bzRfXcvsQgzB6Q_9z5h2Lw64PpfSaKaM8qqLFvP18PQHZ40ODEgrcRWFCX6jq5uyiQDOqEeexpCIMcl4T3DXeQm3pCz3oeRXL1yxZTjOyM1A/3vj/JeAN1xKRQBqxFUaryduXYw/h1/Gux9lTMfupp2pFg02ZBgOkouH8GTur5y8qV_DRPY62o)
---
Peter — Over a year ago, we celebrated when the Biden administration announced intentions to end Title 42.
Title 42 is the Trump-era policy disguised as a “public health order” but used to deny the right to asylum to millions of Black and brown immigrants.
**Now, just three weeks from today, the xenophobic policy is finally set to end. But backlash is already brewing.**
Republicans in Congress want to codify Title 42 into law.
The Biden administration is considering a return to family detentions and the Transit Ban.
And right-wing governors continue to make their states hostile to asylum seekers.

clean_body: Title 42 is finally set to end next month. | | | | | Title 42 is finally set to end next month. But anti-immigrant groups are urgently trying to replace it with more cruel restrictions on asylum. | | Peter — Over a year ago, we celebrated when the Biden administration announced intentions to end Title 42. Title 42 is the Trump-era policy disguised as a “public health order” but used to deny the right to asylum to millions of Black and brown immigrants. Now, just three weeks from today, the xenophobic policy is finally set to end. But backlash is already brewing. Republicans in Congress want to codify Title 42 into law. The Biden administration is considering a return to family detentions and the Transit Ban. And right-wing governors continue to make their states hostile to asylum seekers. We have three weeks to ensure the end of Title 42 and prevent another anti-immigrant policy from being introduced in its place. Will you donate $10 today to fuel our fight for asylum seekers and all undocumented people? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you for stepping up, Juliana, United We Dream Action | We rely on monthly donors to successfully fight back against anti-immigrant policies like Title 42. Will you help our immigrant youth-led movement prepare for the fights ahead by setting up a recurring donation today? | |

clean_body: Pennsylvanians have a critical primary election coming up on May 16. | = Hey folks — Pennsylvanians have a critical primary election coming up on May 16. Voters like you have the opportunity to decide who will be the next representatives on your school board, county commission, and various municipal offices. Mail-in ballots are being sent to PA voters right now, so we wanted to ensure you have everything you need to make your voice heard at the polls! May 1 is the LAST day to register to vote in the primary. | May 9 is the LAST day to apply for a mail-in or absentee ballot. May 16 is the LAST day to return your mail-in ballots by 8:00 PM ET. If you have any questions about how to vote, you can contact the Bucks County Elections Office at mailto:elections@buckscounty.org and the Montgomery County Office at this Thank you for making your voices heard. Donald J. Trump April 20th, 2023
ICYMI: Florida Congressman Michael Waltz Endorses President Trump
**Mar-a-Lago, FL** – Congressman Michael Waltz announced his endorsement of President Donald J. Trump and gave the following statement to [Breitbart News](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kE2P1DAMhn9NenOVuB-hhx5YRr2MhBAX9pomztaQNlWSpQy_HmWE9ma9fvX4kc1-BvaPWegXgbixywJRdJ8F4r1_ef063n_cb_D9W3iF2zj0V93iF4FYHid9VP9TWtoNh5rqW-PmAb2SDc1q_IRy6oZBN9ts0ftJSzl2uOpVkZ2c1Z2Rk1w71Wvd8IwSO9mjUqPCTrXKT4oG6ew4OrRail46yr-id_Ewwf0s6X0_Wxv3JsxbKWd-Oi0Cl-u62jURl9WkUhsClzMGLmyzwKXeEbjI_jkLXOiPDe-ZfxP4EBM7A4lO2NluhgJcJpS_cG2xpokyHSWDo2yOwjlDDA5sPN4S5czVDBznktgWoMPFlCnDUxV8TFAB7OgowAegxOrQpNmdF4fAedSil2_1m1X7XwAAAP__OpqFPw) :
_“These last two years under Joe Biden have been disastrous for our country. Inflation is rampant, our southern border is wide open, China is on the rise and embarrassing us on the global stage, the left have wasted trillions of dollars, and the Washington bureaucracy is worse than ever before. Biden’s devastating handling of the withdrawal from Afghanistan killed 13 of our brothers and sisters. Biden’s actions have not only weakened the U.S. but emboldened terrorists around the world who seek to strike back at America. We need experienced and proven leadership back in the White House._
__
__
__
_“Today I am proud to endorse Donald J. Trump for President. Under his leadership, President Trump secured our southern border, created seven million jobs with record-low unemployment, brought manufacturing back to the U.S., made America energy independent and affordable, brokered historic Middle East peace deals, destroyed the ISIS caliphate, launched the Space Force, took out Soleimani, gave veterans choice, and put measures in place to stop China’s march towards global dominance.”_
Additional context from the _Breitbart_ article:
_"When DeSantis stepped down from his congressional seat in September 2018 during his run for governor, the seat remained vacant until the next Congress. Waltz, who won the election, took over representing the sixth congressional district in Florida in January 2019. Waltz is currently in his third term in Congress, having won reelection in the subsequent two elections in 2020 and 2022."_

name: Chrissy
subject: Earth Day in our backyard
body:
We see the impact of climate change all around us, and I know many of us are doing what we can to limit our own footprint while also urging our country’s leaders to do more.
| | | Derek, we see the impact of climate change all around us, and I know many of us are doing what we can to limit our own footprint while also urging our country’s leaders to do more. Thank you for being part of the solution.
---
As an engineer and co-chair of the bipartisan Congressional Climate Solutions Caucus, I know government and industry can come together to rescue our planet from climate change's more disastrous effects. Last year, I was proud to vote to pass the Inflation Reduction Act – the most impactful climate change mitigation legislation in history – but we all know there is more work to be done.
I hope you’ll join me this Earth Day in recommitting ourselves to doing just a little bit more. There are events all across our community: an Earth Day Festival at the Upper Main Line YMCA, an Earth Day clean up in Phoenixville, an Earth Day Fair at Happy Hollow Playground in Wyomissing, and more. I wish you, Derek, a hopeful and meaningful Earth Day.

Will you take a second to join our poll? **Before our live poll closes at 11:59 p.m., will you let me know:**
| | **Should all new passenger vehicles sold be electric by 2040?**
---

clean_body: We see the impact of climate change all around us, and I know many of us are doing what we can to limit our own footprint while also urging our country’s leaders to do more. | | | Derek, we see the impact of climate change all around us, and I know many of us are doing what we can to limit our own footprint while also urging our country’s leaders to do more. Thank you for being part of the solution. As an engineer and co-chair of the bipartisan Congressional Climate Solutions Caucus, I know government and industry can come together to rescue our planet from climate change's more disastrous effects. Last year, I was proud to vote to pass the Inflation Reduction Act – the most impactful climate change mitigation legislation in history – but we all know there is more work to be done. I hope you’ll join me this Earth Day in recommitting ourselves to doing just a little bit more. There are events all across our community: an Earth Day Festival at the Upper Main Line YMCA, an Earth Day clean up in Phoenixville, an Earth Day Fair at Happy Hollow Playground in Wyomissing, and more. I wish you, Derek, a hopeful and meaningful Earth Day. Will you take a second to join our poll? Before our live poll closes at 11:59 p.m., will you let me know: | | Should all new passenger vehicles sold be electric by 2040? | | | | Happy Earth Day. There is work to be done, Chrissy | Chrissy Houlahan for Congress P.O. name: Senator Ted Cruz
subject: I’m entrusting you to complete the 2024 Official Republican Platform Survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Take the 2024 Republican Platform Survey >>

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17281%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8VXuud3mSUkkBd%2bufvNXDQ&sysid=1)

I need patriots I can trust, Friend.

My Senate Republican colleagues and I just left a BIG 2024 Election meeting, but we ran into a problem - we needed more up-to-date information to make better strategic decisions.

I’m entrusting YOU with completing the **[Official 2024 Republican Platform Survey](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17282%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Pdo41gv%2bOGsCytSCmKnHSA&sysid=1)** because of your excellent track record of providing valuable input for the Conservative movement.

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17283%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zVG8CFdssFAgbkMrTFGjfg&sysid=1)

Your opinions, concerns, and interests are CRITICAL to formulating our 2024 campaign platform. We can only **WIN** in 2024 when we create an agenda __that best represents the will of the American people.__

You’ll be the voice of your fellow patriots in your area, so we’re counting on your quick response.

**[Please take the Official 2024 Republican Platform Survey IMMEDIATELY to represent your area in our critical 2024 Election strategy.>>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17284%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EQjV6btn8%2fgk6TKt7LIAyw&sysid=1)**

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17283%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zVG8CFdssFAgbkMrTFGjfg&sysid=1)

2024 is the most important election of our lifetime. We can’t afford another defeat like the one we had in 2022. The **[Official 2024 Republican Platform Survey](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17282%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Pdo41gv%2bOGsCytSCmKnHSA&sysid=1)** is our way of correcting our missteps and ensuring a GOP victory next year.

Please don’t let our Party down, friend. We’re counting on you.

**[I need you to complete the Official 2024 Republican Platform Survey AS SOON AS POSSIBLE to ensure your response is recorded.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17295%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7ILt5Kh8SWYP%2bhOEbdTmPA&sysid=1)**

Thank you,

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17296%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uSz%2b0hsKj5ShTnoBjasYVQ&sysid=1)
Ted Cruz
United States Senator from Texas

******************************************************[TAKE THE SURVEY>>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c17297%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=l6exqMQ0kQwlp7jPQrBueg&sysid=1)******************************************************

body:
If we can afford massive tax breaks for billionaires, we can afford basic health care, housing, and food assistance for working people.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=83%2E791427%2EjcS4tY)
Remember Kevin McCarthy?
That's right — the same Kevin McCarthy who lost 14 votes in a row to become Speaker of the House, and launched bigoted attacks against Ilhan to kick her off the House Foreign Affairs Committee earlier this year?
Well, he's gotten back to work this week with his new debt ceiling proposal ahead of this summer's deadline. Check it out:
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-apr23.QUZUGP&refcode=em230421-1-t2&t=2&akid=83%2E791427%2EjcS4tY)
Here's just part of what the GOP leadership's proposal would do:
🚮 Take away food stamps

🚮 Kick millions off health insurance

🚮 Make it easier for billionaires to dodge taxes

🚮 Block student loan forgiveness

🚮 Kill over 100,000 green jobs

🚮 Cut COVID-19 pandemic relief

McCarthy and his billionaire friends have already made it clear that Ilhan is one of their top-priority targets this campaign cycle, and now they're planning to hold the global economy hostage to attack our movement's progressive agenda.
The truth is that this is all just the beginning.
We _have_ to be ready for the attacks to come, and do everything we can between now and Election Day to elect as many progressives as possible, all across the country.
Doing that takes a LOT of resources, and the only way we fund our grassroots movement is by standing together. That's why we're asking:

name: Sign your name (via Left Action)
subject: Sign: Tell “My Pillow” guy to pay $5 million he promised to pay if proven wrong about election fraud
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Tell the My Pillow Guy: "Pay the $5 million you promised for being proven wrong about election fraud."](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1d23e14f-eb44-4620-a1a5-d7c6f46df787/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T37aa7f8e-d049-46d6-810c-d5a28eb9128f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Mike Lindell, the founder of My Pillow, and one of the loudest 2020 election deniers, promised to pay $5 million to anyone who could disprove his "data" showing Chinese interference had stolen the election. Well, somebody did just that. And an arbitration panel (per rules Lindell himself set up) has ordered him to pay the $5 million. And now he's refusing. [**Tell the My Pillow Guy: "Pay the $5 million you promised for being proven wrong about election fraud."**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4383876c-3bf8-4d42-ae33-1e7a10c65005/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Here's the full story (from [Washington Post)](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1b13c2c1-20fe-4607-894f-7ad4251dd10c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9): _" My Pillow founder and prominent election denier Mike Lindell made a bold offer ahead of a "cyber symposium" he held in August 2021 in South Dakota: He claimed he had data showing Chinese interference and said he would pay $5 million to anyone who could prove the material was not from the previous year's U.S. election._ _He called the challenge "Prove Mike Wrong." __On Wednesday, a private arbitration panel ruled that someone had. __The panel said Robert Zeidman, a computer forensics expert and 63-year-old Trump voter from Nevada, was entitled to the $5 million payout._ _Zeidman had examined Lindell's data and concluded that it not only did not prove voter fraud, it had no connection to the 2020 election. He was the only expert who submitted a claim, arbitration records show... __In their 23-page decision, the arbitrators said Zeidman proved that Lindell's material "unequivocally did not reflect November 2020 election data." They directed Lindell's firm to pay Zeidman within 30 days._ He made his bed (with pillows) and now he needs to lie in it. [**Tell the My Pillow Guy: "Pay the $5 million you promised for being proven a liar."**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbedb41ae-2e61-43af-9e0d-1f7de9bb24e9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tca0967e9-ef5e-46c4-a023-abe6d16ca00e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action _[P. S. - if you no longer wish to receive updates, use the unsubscribe link below]_
---
|
---
| | | | | **Other things you can do:**
* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/T330c78e5-d77f-42bf-b603-9a09cf0b0d9e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) and [Twitter](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9d7e048a-c62d-41a6-8f50-e3db0d860e2e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfc4f2098-6611-42ea-9f88-2181ef8937e5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Helen Gym
subject: Jeff Brown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em]
Friends — Did you catch the debate last night?

My opponent Jeff Brown tried attacking me with baseless and sexist comments. See the clip for yourself and how I responded here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-debate-brown-em]

She’s “the least informed person on this stage.”

“She’s never built anything in her life.”

“She’s the queen of making stuff up.”

Really, Jeff? I’ve spent my career fighting for safer, stronger communities with a particular focus on children and families. My work has restored nurses and counselors to schools, kept thousands of families in their homes, and guaranteed predictable schedules for 130,000 hourly workers.

But this is what angry, entitled men do — they look to silence their opposition and have no respect for anyone who has a different vision from them. Pitch in right now to support our campaign and stand up to arrogant millionaires like Jeff Brown. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-debate-brown-em]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:

ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-debate-brown-em]

When we win, we’ll build the quality schools that our children need. When we win, we’ll deliver real safety for every neighborhood. Together, we’ll build the safe, thriving, and vibrant Philly we all deserve, and we won’t let people like Jeff Brown keep us from reaching our city’s true potential.

Thanks for standing with me. Your support means the world.

Helen
Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. name: The Team at the Long Run
subject: Clarence Thomas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
#
Friends -
By now you know that Justice Clarence Thomas was exposed for accepting tens of millions of dollars in gifts, trips, vacations, and access to events by one of the largest Republican mega-donors and failing to disclose it under Ethics law.
We should be outraged.
Time and time again, Clarence Thomas has proven to be unfair and unfit to sit on our country’s highest court. From sexual assault allegations to his wife Ginny Thomas having partaken in the January 6th insurrection and spreading election fraud misinformation, we’ve seen him disrespect his role as a Supreme Court Justice and abuse his power.
**Simply put, Clarence Thomas is a threat to our democracy and Congress must act now to hold him accountable.**
[**If you agree, please add your name to our petition calling on Congress to hold Clarence Thomas accountable. We cannot let a seat on the Supreme Court be bought.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/em230421_clarence-thomas/?source=em230421-1-t2&refcode2=4377.196590.V1LTPx&t=1&akid=4377%2E196590%2EV1LTPx)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/em230421_clarence-thomas/?source=em230421-1-t2&refcode2=4377.196590.V1LTPx&t=2&akid=4377%2E196590%2EV1LTPx)
It’s no secret that over the last few years, we have seen the extreme politicization of the Supreme Court. From the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ to the weakening of the EPA, conservative justices on the court are no longer using their power to uphold the rights and freedoms of Americans as guaranteed by the Constitution. Instead, they are using their unlimited and unchecked power to merely become politicians in robes.
Ethics are at the very foundation of the United States Supreme Court, and Clarence Thomas has put them aside time and time again.
He has participated in cases where he was in a clear conflict of interest, his wife has overtly supported false election fraud claims and even participated in the insurrection on the U.S. Capitol, a symbol of our democracy. Now he has now been found to have essentially taken bribes from right-wing millionaires and clearly violated ethics laws.
Clarence Thomas has repeatedly undermined the integrity of our judicial system, reduced its credibility time and time again, and chosen personal interests over democracy.
[**So please join us in calling on Congress to hold Justice Clarence Thomas accountable. No one should be above the law.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/em230421_clarence-thomas/?source=em230421-1-t2&refcode2=4377.196590.V1LTPx&t=3&akid=4377%2E196590%2EV1LTPx)

Thank you for standing with us in this fight for democracy.
The team at the Long Run

clean_body: Friends - By now you know that Justice Clarence Thomas was exposed for accepting tens of millions of dollars in gifts, trips, vacations, and access to events by one of the largest Republican mega-donors and failing to disclose it under Ethics law. We should be outraged. Time and time again, Clarence Thomas has proven to be unfair and unfit to sit on our country’s highest court. From sexual assault allegations to his wife Ginny Thomas having partaken in the January 6th insurrection and spreading election fraud misinformation, we’ve seen him disrespect his role as a Supreme Court Justice and abuse his power. Simply put, Clarence Thomas is a threat to our democracy and Congress must act now to hold him accountable. It’s no secret that over the last few years, we have seen the extreme politicization of the Supreme Court. From the overturning of Roe v. Wade to the weakening of the EPA, conservative justices on the court are no longer using their power to uphold the rights and freedoms of Americans as guaranteed by the Constitution. Instead, they are using their unlimited and unchecked power to merely become politicians in robes. Ethics are at the very foundation of the United States Supreme Court, and Clarence Thomas has put them aside time and time again. He has participated in cases where he was in a clear conflict of interest, his wife has overtly supported false election fraud claims and even participated in the insurrection on the U.S. Capitol, a symbol of our democracy. Now he has now been found to have essentially taken bribes from right-wing millionaires and clearly violated ethics laws. Clarence Thomas has repeatedly undermined the integrity of our judicial system, reduced its credibility time and time again, and chosen personal interests over democracy. Thank you for standing with us in this fight for democracy. The team at the Long Run

subject: Elissa’s campaign, by the numbers

body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=131%2E135344%2ENe3O1H)
Friend --
We’ve sent a number of updates about Elissa’s campaign for Senate in Michigan and our fundraising goals for April. But campaigns can often be captured by numbers, so we thought we’d offer some baseline information based on her tough races in the past.
**$11.3 MILLION.** That's how much was spent, mostly by outside groups, in Elissa's last campaign for Congress.
**85,000.** The number of doors knocked in order to win Elissa’s last campaign. That number is going to multiply by a LOT in this Senate race.
**9.** That’s how many days we have left in April so we can hit our monthly goals and stay on track as a strong competitor in this race.
**$10.** That’s what we’re asking you to pitch in today to help Elissa reach our fundraising goal and ensure we have the resources we need as we build this campaign.
[**So, can you make your first donation to Elissa today? We need to continue putting up strong numbers every month, and showing our strength early on like this will be critical to keeping this seat blue.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-apr23.D7oXHw&refcode=em230421-1-60&t=2&akid=131%2E135344%2ENe3O1H)

## Olympia Watch
---
|
---
|
### SB 5599
---
| SB 5599 is a deeply concerning bill getting national attention right now, and rightly so. This bill allows shelters to hide runaway or homeless youth without parental permission. This effectively bypasses parental consent, separating loving parents from their children without even notifying the parent.

This bill removes a parent's ability to protect and make important decisions for their children. Moreover, the bill allows host homes to house youth without parental permission if the youth is seeking or receiving protected health care services, including gender reassignment services, further undermining parental authority. This bill diminishes the essential role that parents play in their children's lives and upbringing.
---
|
### SB 5770
---
| Introduced late in the session, SB 5770 aims to overturn a voter-approved law by increasing property taxes. Titled "Providing state and local property tax reform," this bill proposes changing the property tax growth factor for the state and local governments from 1% to 3% and adjusting the definition of inflation to grow faster by using the CPI instead of the IPD measure.

This proposed tax increase undermines the will of the voters and takes advantage of a loophole in the state constitution to avoid the 2/3 vote requirement for late-session bills. The session is scheduled to end on April 23, and taxpayers should remain vigilant as the debate unfolds.
---
|
### HB 1240
---
| HB 1240 is a misguided attempt to increase public safety by prohibiting the manufacture, importation, distribution, selling, and offering for sale of so-called "assault weapons." This legislation not only fails to address the root causes of gun violence but also infringes on the constitutional rights of law-abiding citizens. We must oppose this ineffective and unconstitutional rifle ban for the following reasons:
1. Ineffectiveness in Reducing Gun Violence: The majority of gun-related crimes are committed with illegally obtained firearms, and handguns are the weapon of choice in 98% of gun deaths. This rifle ban does not address these facts and, as a result, will not significantly impact gun violence rates. Additionally, previous bans on assault weapons, such as the federal ban that expired in 2004, have had no measurable impact on gun violence.
2. Unconstitutional Infringement on Second Amendment Rights: HB 1240's rifle ban targets some of the most commonly owned firearms used for self-defense, violating citizens' constitutional rights. This legislation is likely to be found unconstitutional under the Supreme Court's new history, text, and tradition test, resulting in costly legal battles for the state and taxpayers.
3. Discrimination Against Women and People with Disabilities: Modern sporting rifles, such as the AR-15, are the preferred choice for self-defense among women and some people with disabilities due to their adjustable stocks, low recoil, and availability of self-defense ammunition. By banning these firearms, HB 1240 unfairly discriminates against these vulnerable groups.

Instead of focusing on ineffective and unconstitutional bans, we should address the real problems contributing to gun violence. This includes implementing tougher sentencing guidelines, holding criminals accountable, and providing increased support to law enforcement agencies to prevent dangers before they occur. Reject HB 1240 and pursue meaningful solutions to reduce gun violence while respecting the rights of law-abiding citizens.
---
|
### Blake Fix
---
| Engrossed Second Substitute Senate Bill 5536 (ESSSB 5536) aims to address drug possession and substance use disorders in response to the February 2021 ruling in State v. Blake. However, this bill does not go far enough in its approach to criminalization, treatment, and overall effectiveness in supporting those struggling with addiction.

Rep. Gina Mosbrucker, R-Goldendale, offered an amendment that would have increased consequences to a gross misdemeanor classification, which would provide more time for addicts to detox and allow for plea bargaining to cater to the individual's needs. However, this amendment failed under the Democrat majority.

Adding to the opposition, local mayors, including several Snohomish County mayors and Spokane Mayor, are expressing concern over the House-amended bill. The combined dissent from both Republican lawmakers and local mayors underscores the need for a more comprehensive approach to effectively tackle drug possession and addiction issues in the state.
---
|
### SB 5082
---
| SB 5082 is the Democrat majority's way of forgetting about the voters, and removing their opinion from being heard on the ballot. This bill is currently sitting on the Governor's desk and could be signed at any time. It will remove advisory votes, which were added to law via Citizen Initiative in 2001. Advisory votes are important for public engagement and accountability, as they allow the voice of the public to be heard on tax increase legislation. Removing these votes weakens the voting process and undermines the will of the people.
---
|
### Capital Gains Tax Ruling
---
| The recent Washington State Supreme Court ruling on the capital gains tax has shown its true partisan nature by redefining a capital gains tax as an excise tax, ignoring all precedent, and blatantly disregarding the tax structures in all 49 other states and countries around the world. This clearly partisan ruling has opened the floodgates for Democrats to target specific industries and incomes with new taxes, without explicitly calling them income taxes.

In the wake of this ruling, Democrats have swiftly moved to propose SB 5767, the so-called "excess compensation tax." This bill aims to impose a 7.5% "excise tax" on hospital administrator jobs that Democrats arbitrarily deem overpaid. By pursuing such a tax, they are exploiting this ruling and setting a dangerous precedent for future taxes on other industries and incomes. This blatant abuse of our system of government and dramatic overreach by Democrats raises the question: **who will they target next? **
---

This bill diminishes the essential role that parents play in their children's lives and upbringing. | SB 5770 | Introduced late in the session, SB 5770 aims to overturn a voter-approved law by increasing property taxes. Titled "Providing state and local property tax reform," this bill proposes changing the property tax growth factor for the state and local governments from 1% to 3% and adjusting the definition of inflation to grow faster by using the CPI instead of the IPD measure. This proposed tax increase undermines the will of the voters and takes advantage of a loophole in the state constitution to avoid the 2/3 vote requirement for late-session bills. The session is scheduled to end on April 23, and taxpayers should remain vigilant as the debate unfolds. | HB 1240 | HB 1240 is a misguided attempt to increase public safety by prohibiting the manufacture, importation, distribution, selling, and offering for sale of so-called "assault weapons." This legislation not only fails to address the root causes of gun violence but also infringes on the constitutional rights of law-abiding citizens. We must oppose this ineffective and unconstitutional rifle ban for the following reasons: 1. Ineffectiveness in Reducing Gun Violence: The majority of gun-related crimes are committed with illegally obtained firearms, and handguns are the weapon of choice in 98% of gun deaths. This rifle ban does not address these facts and, as a result, will not significantly impact gun violence rates. Additionally, previous bans on assault weapons, such as the federal ban that expired in 2004, have had no measurable impact on gun violence. 2. Unconstitutional Infringement on Second Amendment Rights: HB 1240's rifle ban targets some of the most commonly owned firearms used for self-defense, violating citizens' constitutional rights. This legislation is likely to be found unconstitutional under the Supreme Court's new history, text, and tradition test, resulting in costly legal battles for the state and taxpayers. 3. Discrimination Against Women and People with Disabilities: Modern sporting rifles, such as the AR-15, are the preferred choice for self-defense among women and some people with disabilities due to their adjustable stocks, low recoil, and availability of self-defense ammunition. By banning these firearms, HB 1240 unfairly discriminates against these vulnerable groups. Instead of focusing on ineffective and unconstitutional bans, we should address the real problems contributing to gun violence. This includes implementing tougher sentencing guidelines, holding criminals accountable, and providing increased support to law enforcement agencies to prevent dangers before they occur. Reject HB 1240 and pursue meaningful solutions to reduce gun violence while respecting the rights of law-abiding citizens. | Blake Fix | Engrossed Second Substitute Senate Bill 5536 (ESSSB 5536) aims to address drug possession and substance use disorders in response to the February 2021 ruling in State v. Blake. However, this bill does not go far enough in its approach to criminalization, treatment, and overall effectiveness in supporting those struggling with addiction. Rep. Gina Mosbrucker, R-Goldendale, offered an amendment that would have increased consequences to a gross misdemeanor classification, which would provide more time for addicts to detox and allow for plea bargaining to cater to the individual's needs. However, this amendment failed under the Democrat majority. Adding to the opposition, local mayors, including several Snohomish County mayors and Spokane Mayor, are expressing concern over the House-amended bill. The combined dissent from both Republican lawmakers and local mayors underscores the need for a more comprehensive approach to effectively tackle drug possession and addiction issues in the state. | SB 5082 | SB 5082 is the Democrat majority's way of forgetting about the voters, and removing their opinion from being heard on the ballot. This bill is currently sitting on the Governor's desk and could be signed at any time. It will remove advisory votes, which were added to law via Citizen Initiative in 2001. Advisory votes are important for public engagement and accountability, as they allow the voice of the public to be heard on tax increase legislation. Removing these votes weakens the voting process and undermines the will of the people. | Capital Gains Tax Ruling | The recent Washington State Supreme Court ruling on the capital gains tax has shown its true partisan nature by redefining a capital gains tax as an excise tax, ignoring all precedent, and blatantly disregarding the tax structures in all 49 other states and countries around the world. This clearly partisan ruling has opened the floodgates for Democrats to target specific industries and incomes with new taxes, without explicitly calling them income taxes. In the wake of this ruling, Democrats have swiftly moved to propose SB 5767, the so-called "excess compensation tax." This bill aims to impose a 7.5% "excise tax" on hospital administrator jobs that Democrats arbitrarily deem overpaid. By pursuing such a tax, they are exploiting this ruling and setting a dangerous precedent for future taxes on other industries and incomes. This blatant abuse of our system of government and dramatic overreach by Democrats raises the question: who will they target next? | | Join the Team! | Become a Sustaining Member of the Washington State Republican Party and help us build a stronger, more vibrant conservative movement in our state. Your contribution is crucial in supporting our ongoing efforts to promote Republican values and candidates throughout Washington. When you sign up as a Sustaining Member, you'll receive a personalized membership card that signifies your commitment and support for the Republican Party in Washington State. This card represents your dedication to advancing our shared goals, and your role in shaping a brighter future for our communities. | | "Become a Sustaining Member Today!" | Your monthly contribution will help us bring the fight to the Democrats in key 2023 local races across our state and in 2024 fight to end the Democrat majority, Take back the 3rd Congressional District and Flip the 8th, and bring Republicans back into statewide offices! | | WSRP Storefront | | | In the News: | National Local WAGOP in the news | | "Contribute to our efforts to elect Republicans in 2023 and beyond!" | Contact: Benjamin Gonzalez Communications Director Washington State Republican Party (425) 460-0570 mailto:ben@wsrp.org | | | Copyright © 2023 Washington State Republican Party, All rights reserved. Your interest in the Washington State Republican Party, National Republican Committee or Washington state Republican Candidates Our mailing address is:** Washington State Republican Party11811 NE 1st St Suite 306Bellevue, WA 98005 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or . | | Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party. 11811 NE 1st St, Bellevue, WA 98005. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Sherrod Brown from Ohio. I’ve spent my life fighting for the Dignity of Work – and I mean all work. Whether you punch a time clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips, are raising children or caring for an aging parent, I’ll fight for you.

I’m running for reelection so I can keep fighting for workers and families in the Senate – but I need your help. As the only remaining statewide Democrat in Ohio, analysts at CNN say I’m one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot – and national Republicans are already launching attack ads against me.
**The battle for Senate control could all come down to Ohio – so please, I’m personally asking:[ Will you give $5 or more right now – split between my campaign and Patty Murray – to help defend this battleground seat and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62118011/402359944/348274074?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk12-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGQzNTIyMy02M2UwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FO5rHC0jKI8vp4qAgYwWbagFMSSxXEWzjeurZJS-0H8=)**
I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers and electricians. And I’ll be honest with you: The Ohio I live in now looks a lot different than the one I grew up in. I’m fighting in the Senate every day to bring those jobs back, to build our economy by investing in the middle class, and to ensure hard work pays off for every American.

But I’m facing my toughest race yet – in a state Donald Trump won by 8 points. Last year’s Ohio Senate race was one of the most costly and competitive in the nation, and NBC News reports that this one could be “even nastier and more expensive.”
**The long and short of it is, I can’t win – and Democrats simply can’t hold onto our narrow Senate majority – if we don’t have strong grassroots support from folks like you.

[That’s why I’m asking for your support today, Peter: Please, will you chip in $5 or more now – split between my campaign and](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62118012/402359945/348274074?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk12-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGQzNTIyMy02M2UwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FO5rHC0jKI8vp4qAgYwWbagFMSSxXEWzjeurZJS-0H8=)[ Patty Murray – so we can win in Ohio and defend the Senate? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62118014/402359947/348274074?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk12-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGQzNTIyMy02M2UwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FO5rHC0jKI8vp4qAgYwWbagFMSSxXEWzjeurZJS-0H8=)**
With gratitude,

Sherrod Brown

body:
Conservatives must show leadership by following through on their stated Commitment to America and bring a...| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a6e1750a271b4622958e908b8d7d8f3e&_e=Yfb6OKt2Mh9XgLzSw5b3xJhnDOo-CW8oomlVyySHLyZiNE7-QGO1OT-8U-nxOBitSMue4z3FdnF1r6pmXRscRwkhA98KBePoyqigH-V2wuNa7ktO7WMK7edL2gMbl9hZM6OqKJYHSXTYxtKmzxihH59motl9xZT5y9ixBxR3YMIB1C_6AvaIfA8YxBZgtkuoz24NjL-wHlfey_1HBco06-Qd1wfXCXZwxfABWQO-xTt2vdP1UbG9RuVtY3V1Pu9XSG2CwLZE3w_cUkgcaZ6NjiySo-qNcK_u6PzjH3Z0EBSqKBt7U8Zo0BiFEXoWtA1xuJI1rnmXf6IYwOjB8p8eRXRCdFJ2G3ntAxsBuXg_c_oKviQNxakF5Br57C8iaaVl)
---
| | Peter, with our southern border expecting yet another migrant surge in the coming weeks, **there is no time to spare. **
Despite the countless videos of migrants pouring across the border or the continuous stories of young Americans dying of fentanyl overdoses, **the Biden administration fails to take any responsibility for the crisis.**
---
[**SECURE THE BORDER: RUSH IN NOW >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a6e1750a271b4622958e908b8d7d8f3e&_e=Yfb6OKt2Mh9XgLzSw5b3xJhnDOo-CW8oomlVyySHLyZiNE7-QGO1OT-8U-nxOBitSMue4z3FdnF1r6pmXRscRwkhA98KBePoyqigH-V2wuNa7ktO7WMK7edL2gMbl9hZM6OqKJYHSXTYxtKmzxihH59motl9xZT5y9ixBxR3YMIB1C_6AvaIfA8YxBZgtkuoz24NjL-wHlfey_1HBco06-Qd1wfXCXZwxfABWQO-xTtVFFIlNp3E20Uk6Kk3YjL5OzpMHA4hihqrsM_c06jySB71FyiiGNftqEB99OHoQYWqBhGxWM9j8K3WjJedsSmPMQTEw3OHkinHp-R8hnHHA5TEramO4oGDSn0UjTh-pSkqxnl0yLrryfk4w1Xx4kXJ)
---
That’s why this week, conservatives must show leadership in following through on their stated Commitment to America and bring a robust border security package to the House floor that...**🔔 _Stops_ **Asylum Fraud**🔔 _Ends_** “catch and release”**🔔 _Finishes_** the Border Wall **🔔 _Increases_** Border Patrol resources**🔔 _Closes_** loopholes in the immigration system
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a6e1750a271b4622958e908b8d7d8f3e&_e=Yfb6OKt2Mh9XgLzSw5b3xJhnDOo-CW8oomlVyySHLyZiNE7-QGO1OT-8U-nxOBitSMue4z3FdnF1r6pmXRscRwkhA98KBePoyqigH-V2wuNa7ktO7WMK7edL2gMbl9hZM6OqKJYHSXTYxtKmzxihH59motl9xZT5y9ixBxR3YMIB1C_6AvaIfA8YxBZgtkuoz24NjL-wHlfey_1HBco06-Qd1wfXCXZwxfABWQO-xTtAfaxatU1ENytcXFpUV8cgbM7vxAkoMFd1wqNfGAjnszz5-HIIA0lKqu-2EjrVJidj6kgpklXgSBgS3veJQvxzKzl3TdU9NUo8_afUCfaCAFu-QwyLSljGaGiAwJnLv-J3aGWO4ynkcx-67N1p9i12)
