Despite the countless videos of migrants pouring across the border or the continuous stories of young Americans dying of fentanyl overdoses, the Biden administration fails to take any responsibility for the crisis. That’s why this week, conservatives must show leadership in following through on their stated Commitment to America and bring a robust border security package to the House floor that...🔔 Stops Asylum Fraud🔔 Ends “catch and release”🔔 Finishes the Border Wall 🔔 Increases Border Patrol resources🔔 Closes loopholes in the immigration system Heritage Action is actively working with our grassroots activists to ensure that Congress puts forth a bill that includes these key protections. But we need your support to keep grassroots efforts going. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: your early access link (31 hours only)
body:
| | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---
| | | | | | | | [DOUBLE YOUR GIFT FOR THE NEXT 31 HOURS ONLY](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1733132?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Friend, I had to personally reach out to you early, ahead of the Earth Day rush Saturday, and share this important update on our planet-saving work.
No matter what greedy corporations say, or how many millions of dollars they spend on PR and misinformation campaigns, Friends of the Earth is committed to fighting back. **Corporate pollution is a choice, and we CAN hold companies accountable for that choice. **
**Right now, mega-manufacturing plants are pumping out single-use plastics that end up in our oceans to the tune of two huge garbage trucks per minute. Corporations are aggressively working to expand mining, logging and drilling operations on our public lands. The resulting habitat loss threatens the survival of endangered species – who are now in more danger than EVER. Meanwhile, the climate crisis is worsening from out-of-control fossil fuel greed. **
**The fact is this: We don't have to live like this, and our only Earth doesn't have to die like this.** We have the power to stop catastrophic outcomes for our planet and all its inhabitants if we fight back together now. And what more powerful moment than Earth Day to take action?
**That’s why this is such heartening news: A generous group of donors is matching every gift for Earth Day up to our goal of $180,000 but only until midnight tomorrow. Because you've been such a committed supporter, we created a custom match link you can use to be the first to DOUBLE your Earth Day impact. So please hurry and make your gift for our planet now! Here’s your personal link: **
| | [EARLY MATCH ACCESS FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1733132?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
This goal means so much to our organization and the planet – and we chose you to be part of this select group for early match access because we know you recognize how high the stakes are. When you make your early-bird donation, you'll be ensuring we can mobilize on the ground, keep pressure on legislators and stop the climate crisis before it’s too late.
**Matches like this don’t come often, and the stakes for our only Earth have never been higher. **That’s why we must seize this opportunity for our planet, friend. With all our futures on the line, getting complacent or giving in to despair is simply not an option. So we’re counting on committed environmentalists like you to set the pace for the rest of our community.
**With time running out, we need to make this Earth Day really count. Please, make your membership gift and be part of the urgent solutions we need to break the grip of corporate greed and protect our planet while we still can. Your personalized Earth Day match access link is right here – donate now to have every dollar doubled:**
| | [EARLY MATCH ACCESS FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1733132?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Thank you,

Erich Pica
President
Friends of the Earth
|

body:
|
---

The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. **** _Statehouse Republicans Relentless Attack on Public Education Continues_ Republicans in the Statehouse are failing to address Indiana’s growing and persistent [teacher shortage](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62119582/402365487/1476643369?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjdkYTU3Zi02NmUwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nIuF1_ccF2BLqs_VOKUjnqTZ5HwXvC0h3DCVDuMWNMg=&emci=b1f79b33-48e0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=367da57f-66e0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535). clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party’s weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. ** Statehouse Republicans Relentless Attack on Public Education Continues Republicans in the Statehouse are failing to address Indiana’s growing and persistent . From threatening teachers with to and trying to increase private, this session has been a steady attack on educators and students in Indiana’s local public schools. Over time, many public school districts across the state have been forced into passing referendums to fund critical operations and increase teacher pay. Now, Republicans are pushing through a dangerous proposal to force these schools to share their with unaccountable charter schools. Democrats Raising Resources for This Year’s Municipal Elections This year, Hoosiers in cities and towns will go to the polls to elect mayors, city and town councils and other local elected officials. These local elections provide some of the best opportunities for Democrats to win office throughout our state and make change in their communities. In Carmel, mayoral candidate and City Councilman Miles Nelson $85,000 in the first three months of 2023. Four years ago, Miles was the first Democrat ever elected to Council in Carmel. In other parts of the state, Democrats are on the path to success as well. In Fort Wayne, incumbent mayor Tom Henry raised more than his Republican challengers combined and Democratic candidates from Michigan City to Evansville are ready to compete this fall. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. Legislation written by State Rep. Earl Harris Jr. (East Chicago) to automatically enroll eligible Hoosier students in the 21st Century Scholars program passed the House unanimously on Wednesday and is now going to Governor Holcomb to be signed into law. Rep. Harris on how the bill will help thousands more Hoosier students reach a college education: “This bill will help so many Indiana students achieve a higher education, and in turn, will boost our state economy and enhance the quality of life for Hoosiers by helping individuals break the chains of cyclical poverty.” Upcoming Candidate Trainings Monday, April 24, 1-2 p.m. ET: “How to Build Your Political Campaign Digital Plan”: Learn how building a digital campaign plan is crucial to your success in modern campaigns, and how to build an email campaign and track your efforts. Register by Tuesday, April 25, 1-2 p.m. ET: “Introduction to Social Media for Your Political Campaign”: Social media is a vital way of reaching younger voters, and keeping them engaged. Learn key tips at the training! Register by Save The Date: 2023 Hoosier Hospitality Dinner More details to come on this year’s Hoosier Hospitality Dinner — but for now mark your calendars for June 16 at the Indiana Convention Center! 2023 IDEA Convention: Book Your Room Today! INDems IN the News Indiana Capital Chronicle: Tribune-Star: KPVI: State Affairs: Indiana Capital Chronicle: WTHR: Accounting Today: Statehouse File: Lakeshore Public Media: WISH TV: WANE: Chesterton Tribune: WTHR: **********Opportunities with INDems To apply for a job with the Indiana Democratic Party, please visit or send a note to mailto:jobs@indems.org. body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8SPQu8C45CpmIArf9vx29fkZea0k_NHaktM7A4EhWfT-nq4OdnYjyLYy7awmrmJgEr8GGRD790hbbQFmHxOE9PKFDRsXFvCKFrJ31hxKPI3etK8c_TVA6CJq5T9_idkAaONQetpZsW3qaXbD4TQxuEu28012gHnudmTHy7_UHKsWies2j6KApOF3iAF2E12jf1rDG-5riuTzBCrBjHEpeqExPfZ6OJh78wsUrXWDqUAEmnTECcHl4_FU2cWoBQ3umg/3vj/5AXirU-4TKCHayPv7UDL3w/h0/bqDJiE7cgZSvpqZcJJPfEzzxa2zM7CRPYciADa4cTv0)

name: Bob Casey
subject: This is poised to be one of the most competitive races in the country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
Mitch McConnell and the GOP are already coming for this seat. I won’t be able to win this re-election fight alone.

| Hi Peter,

I have big news to share: **I’m running for re-election.**

It’s an honor to represent my fellow Pennsylvanians in the Senate, and it is their trust that drives me to get up every day and fight for Pennsylvania’s working families and communities.

**But know this: Mitch McConnell and the GOP are already coming for this seat. I won’t be able to win this re-election fight alone.**

[_**If you’re with me, will you split a donation between Susan Wild and our campaign today? This is poised to be one of the most competitive elections in the country, so your support will make a huge impact on the start of this race.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62121286/402371612/1712461634?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230421-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDdmOTc2YS02YWUwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bLl5R4OAP7U283T__f9wwAsGwk2MvF8Bku3Ylez7RfA=)

In 2022, Pennsylvania’s Senate race gave Democrats our slim, 51-seat majority. That means next year, our opponents are going to do everything they can to flip Pennsylvania red.

Republicans are already targeting this Senate seat and running attack ads. To defeat them, we’re going to earn support from Pennsylvanians from Erie to Scranton.

**Peter, I’m no stranger to hard fights.** I’ve been standing up for Pennsylvania’s working families and communities for my whole career, and I won’t stop now. There’s still more work to do to cut through the gridlock, take on the powerful special interests, and deliver real results for working families and children across our commonwealth.

But it’s going to take all of us.

[_**Become a Founding Donor and join our team by splitting a donation between our campaign and Susan Wild’s today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62121289/402371615/1712461634?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230421-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDdmOTc2YS02YWUwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bLl5R4OAP7U283T__f9wwAsGwk2MvF8Bku3Ylez7RfA=)

In a race as important as this one, people like you make all the difference.

Thank you,

Bob Casey

body:
Take the 2024 Republican Platform Survey >>

I need patriots I can trust, Friend.

My Senate Republican colleagues and I just left a BIG 2024 Election meeting, but we ran into a problem - we needed more up-to-date information to make better strategic decisions.

I'm entrusting YOU with completing the **[Official 2024 Republican Platform Survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3e55d51044fd45d29b569a518c467683&_e=HsvcbT5DXj7Dxa9fns949NxlSHy0CCGD-TqQNeQrygjw6Rr9HLUM0KUGWoHw9vmV7Pk3eRQ3HYaavBmngUgBmuc4MDhnarHiBH0vKjdGyn1KM85rW340jR42LM4aL6fDf2bzNa5Ur_rA1kRgsksAJtSvZp1-NmU_xy_TtvOrnmkCS76gSKb-sDeMI4A74GmUBaJ-Az6pah-eBlk5NJ81J8sP8mpOHame-Gy7ChFKkBgfwWkRsc48WvFeMIe3U0l2Ea0bzr7XImMK0A2RalOK7FGEfTfhnOa76FxQMBSXiBoJbONLBhlHUwVscInsluzgxo28KD95wTrktQzOoBg8dK97hyNecijkRuUJ9wec2HmadAYm0EOfCf2xVd034xg4oW2LtKtQ75-DPieAIxQHWGWWroPNR71Od5C0vxgztKlh_ABArN04XvnlaQvL3PpUsJPBftgr12-xRuhlcy1KVRputFiZJLJTKFuwy3v4egs%3D)** because of your excellent track record of providing valuable input for the Conservative movement.

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3e55d51044fd45d29b569a518c467683&_e=HsvcbT5DXj7Dxa9fns949NxlSHy0CCGD-TqQNeQrygjw6Rr9HLUM0KUGWoHw9vmV7Pk3eRQ3HYaavBmngUgBmuc4MDhnarHiBH0vKjdGyn1KM85rW340jR42LM4aL6fDf2bzNa5Ur_rA1kRgsksAJtSvZp1-NmU_xy_TtvOrnmkCS76gSKb-sDeMI4A74GmUBaJ-Az6pah-eBlk5NJ81J8sP8mpOHame-Gy7ChFKkBgfwWkRsc48WvFeMIe3U0l2Ea0bzr7XImMK0A2RalOK7FGEfTfhnOa76FxQMBSXiBoJbONLBhlHUwVscInsluzgxo28KD95wTrktQzOoBg8dK7a--2T61io18b0yl-GznvPGK_qJdJDhCnlqaDadPBS8ou8-N8nb2ASYFY7REIcm_zO9ZZKBwY1WANGg0a4BETsB5XFRGcnLBk1sld2lQ0c_MX4W1F0LqRe3lV-t1qoDXfgFYBaEaPbbh7qZRE7bqY%3D)

Their appearances at the convention serve as a reminder to Americans, once again, that the Republican Party puts the gun lobby ahead of the safety of our communities, schools, and children. Take a look at how GOP presidential hopefuls have already fallen short for Americans:

* Ban assault weapons;
* Require safe storage of firearms;
* Require background checks for all gun sales;
* Eliminate gun manufacturers’ immunity from liability.

clean_body: Read on for more updates on what President Biden and Democrats have been up to → | | | Happy Friday, Peter! We’re back with your weekly Team Joe updates. Up first, we have the 2024 Democratic National Convention. The DNC recently announced that the 2024 Democratic National Convention will be held in Chicago -- and we want to be sure you have the opportunity to be there! | | | Read on for more updates on what President Biden and Democrats have been up to → 💪 FIGHTING FOR REPRODUCTIVE RIGHTS President Biden, Vice President Harris, and Democrats nationwide are working hard to protect access to reproductive care and to ensure women can make their own decisions about their own bodies. Take a look: | | KEEPING OUR COUNTRY SAFE On the heels of several devastating mass shootings, many 2024 Republicans made another pilgrimage to the National Rifle Association Convention in Indianapolis last week. Their appearances at the convention serve as a reminder to Americans, once again, that the Republican Party puts the gun lobby ahead of the safety of our communities, schools, and children. Take a look at how GOP presidential hopefuls have already fallen short for Americans: President Biden has made his stance clear and is working hard to ensure the safety of our nation by calling on Congress to: Ban assault weapons; Require safe storage of firearms; Require background checks for all gun sales; Eliminate gun manufacturers’ immunity from liability. | | 🛍️ ADDING TO YOUR WARDROBE Have you gotten a chance to get these socks featuring President Biden’s iconic aviators? They’re the perfect addition to your wardrobe and make an excellent gift for friends and family. Check it out: | | ➡️ LOOKING AHEAD At the DNC, we don’t believe in off years. We’re planning ahead and making strategic investments with one simple goal in mind: Electing Democrats up and down the ballot every year, in every ZIP code. But it takes early support to make that happen, which is where YOU come in, Peter. This grassroots team has stepped up time and time again, helping Democrats take back the White House in 2020 and hold our Senate majority in 2022. Now we need your support again for 2023, 2024, and beyond. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Until next time, Team Joe Contributions to the DNC will be spent on DNC activities and programs as the DNC determines within its sole discretion and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate or purpose. | ---|--- | |

The radical-Left Democrats are continuing their _**relentless**_ assault on America – But throughout our first 100 days in the majority, I have _refused_ to back down, and I know **YOU** won't either.
---
**I have been working to STOP the _destruction_ of America – and thanks to your unwavering support,_ we’ve achieved some remarkable victories over our first 100 days._**
---
_**Since retaking power last year, our conservative House majority has:**_
---

* **Rescinded** the 87,000 IRS agents that the Democrats funded through the Inflation Reduction Act.

* **Blocked** Biden's Energy Secretary from selling out the U.S. energy sector to appease Communist China.

* **Boosted** domestic energy production and reversed Biden's cancelation of the Keystone Pipeline

* **Ended** oppressive COVID emergency declarations and vaccination mandates.

* **Protected** the rights of parents to know what their children are learning.

* **Exposed** radical Soros-funded prosecutors and their soft on crime policies.

---

name: Team Wiley
subject: Time flies!

Wiley has been in Congress for 100 days! How incredible is that? In these past 100 days, Wiley has continued to advocate for our district. name: Team IDCCA
subject: One week left to apply…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association
body:
Learn the skills you need to thrive in politics at the 2023 IDCCA Boot Camp!

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/2qgoAIRIR1-UQ-zTEUvvZQJALTNH4QmPktZtnCkCQs0=/yevduD5BUVD_VT5bgi_Hk8bOLmt-WSkGq-8Tnih66dc=)
Fellow Democrats, the deadline to apply for the IDCCA and National Democratic Training Committee's May 20th Boot Camp is just **ONE WEEK** away!

**[April 28th, the last day to apply, is just around the corner-- and the remaining spots could fill up any day now. If you're interested in learning the fundamental skills you need to succeed at any level of politics, you don't want to miss out on this opportunity! Apply ASAP to secure your spot now!](https://act.myngp.com/el/2qgoAIRIR1-UQ-zTEUvvZQJALTNH4QmPktZtnCkCQs0=/yevduD5BUVD_VT5bgi_Hk8bOLmt-WSkGq-8Tnih66dc=)**
[**APPLY NOW**](https://act.myngp.com/el/2qgoAIRIR1-UQ-zTEUvvZQJALTNH4QmPktZtnCkCQs0=/yevduD5BUVD_VT5bgi_Hk8bOLmt-WSkGq-8Tnih66dc=)
Our annual boot camp has grown to be one of the largest learning and networking opportunities for state Democrats, and for good reason. **Since we started it with the National Democratic Training Committee in 2017, our boot camp has:**

\- Engaged over 1,200 candidates, staffers, and Democratic Party leaders to participate.

\- Helped 150 alumni get elected into public office.

\- Trained over 300 new campaign staffers who have helped local candidates run for school board, County Board, and Countywide offices.

\- Provided the framework for Democratic Party leaders to continue to build sustainable infrastructure to help turn out Democratic voters on Election Day.

These numbers don't lie, fellow Democrats! Whether you are interested in running for office, working on a campaign, or joining up with your local Democratic Party, this training will teach you the skills you need to make a difference in your community.

**[Seats are still available, but they are going fast! Click now to apply before they are all filled up!->](https://act.myngp.com/el/2qgoAIRIR1-UQ-zTEUvvZQJALTNH4QmPktZtnCkCQs0=/yevduD5BUVD_VT5bgi_Hk8bOLmt-WSkGq-8Tnih66dc=)**
[**APPLY NOW**](https://act.myngp.com/el/2qgoAIRIR1-UQ-zTEUvvZQJALTNH4QmPktZtnCkCQs0=/yevduD5BUVD_VT5bgi_Hk8bOLmt-WSkGq-8Tnih66dc=) Thank you,

Team IDCCA

| | | | **GET TEXT UPDATES FROM THE IDCCA!**

| | Contributions or gifts to the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association are not tax deductible. Please note your contribution may be used in connection with a federal election. Federal law requires political committees use their "best efforts" to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. State law requires that we report the occupation and name of the employer of any individual who contributes over $500.

A copy of our reports are available for free online at FEC.gov. A copy of our report filed with the State Board of Elections is (or will be) available on the board's official website, www.elections.il.gov, or for purchase from the Illinois State Board of Elections, Springfield, IL

subject: Table with us on EARTH DAY in Middletown!
body:
Can you join our table for any part of this Earth Day event? | |
---
| | |
# GNHGP table at the
**[Middletown Earth Day Extravaganza](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=b2950b6f52&e=91a3f04de5)**
Saturday April 22, 12-3PM!
---
| | Tabling is how we grow the chapter - meet people - talk politics, share our values, our ideas, our policy positions, recruit members, recruit candidates, grow in strength, and ultimately make change. Please join our table to represent our party! Any questions? Call Justin @ 860-227-2258.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=be280b69ef&e=91a3f04de5)
---
|
---
|
#### **We are the Party of People, Planet, and Peace!**
---
| The need for an independent left party is clear. We are an ecosocialist peace party who fight for social, economic, and environmental justice. Come to our meetings and events to meet us and get involved!
---
| The Greater New Haven Green Party is a chapter
of the Green Party of Connecticut!

Find our chapter Bylaws [HERE](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=f7b7de22f6&e=91a3f04de5).
Read minutes of our past meetings [HERE](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=82d00c6315&e=91a3f04de5).
---
|
---
| | | Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/profile?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=18b5d036be&e=91a3f04de5&c=b1891497d9) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=18b5d036be&e=91a3f04de5&c=b1891497d9).

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: $30 million for NM-02
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62122014/402374430/1324874474?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230421cpf_gv_180da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjJiODI4ZC02ZGUwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4xjrOpDpsudAbW3dWPr8aNsPyDpCq6zMJ_7PiDPDuB4=)
---
Team, **Today, I’m thrilled to announce I’ve submitted proposals for more than $30 million in federal grants for community project funding across New Mexico’s 2nd District!** I’m requesting $31.4 million to fund 15 projects across NM-02, including improving access to clean drinking water, supporting law enforcement, and keeping New Mexicans safe during natural disasters. From Isleta Pueblo to Carlsbad to Columbus, I’m working to bring much-needed federal dollars to improve our communities. I believe our budget is a statement of our values, which is why I’m fighting for NM-02’s fair share to improve our infrastructure and more. **But do you want to know how much community project funding former far-right Rep. Yvette Herrell brought to NM-02 during her tenure? $0.** That’s not a typo. She proposed $0 in community project funding in her two years in Congress. _Does that sound like a representative who’s working for you?_ **[Herrell is trying to take this seat back from us next November with the help of Kevin McCarthy, Donald Trump, and dark money super-PACs. clean_body: | = Team, Today, I’m thrilled to announce I’ve submitted proposals for more than $30 million in federal grants for community project funding across New Mexico’s 2nd District! I’m requesting $31.4 million to fund 15 projects across NM-02, including improving access to clean drinking water, supporting law enforcement, and keeping New Mexicans safe during natural disasters. From Isleta Pueblo to Carlsbad to Columbus, I’m working to bring much-needed federal dollars to improve our communities. I believe our budget is a statement of our values, which is why I’m fighting for NM-02’s fair share to improve our infrastructure and more. But do you want to know how much community project funding former far-right Rep. Yvette Herrell brought to NM-02 during her tenure? $0. That’s not a typo. She proposed $0 in community project funding in her two years in Congress. Does that sound like a representative who’s working for you? = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you for empowering me to serve you and fight for what NM-02 deserves. — Gabe | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. Friend,
The real reason the Left wants to destroy me is simple:
_I am YOUR voice. And they can’t stand the PEOPLE having a voice in their own country._
_**That’s why Soros and his hand-picked prosecutors all across America aren’t just coming after me, they’re ruining life for hardworking Americans like YOU too!**_
They’ve allowed murderers, rapists, and thieves to get off scot-free, all while targeting, and in some cases, _**indicting**_ the brave police officers who work to keep us safe.
They’ve weaponized the justice system to attack their political opposition with fabricated crimes – and even ARREST yours truly – but they REFUSE to charge even the most heinous of REAL crimes.
And most recently, a Soros-backed District Attorney out of Missouri failed to even SHOW UP at a MURDER trial.
This is the sad country we now live in...
_After Soros spent $40 MILLION getting his puppet DAs elected, 1 out of every 5 Americans now falls under their radical representation – and he won’t stop there._
But it doesn’t have to be this way, Friend. YOU have a choice.
**With your help, we can continue to OUTRAISE the Soros Money Machine, WIN BACK the White House, and STOP him from turning our once great country into a backwards Third World nation.**

| | **So why would a company prioritize politics over its business?** Some of them _actually_ support it, **but many others fear the consequences. **
* Social credit scores
* Being denied future loans
* Lack of access to marketplaces

These are just a handful of reasons why corporate America is playing along. And the Biden Administration, China, and a host of other bad actors have staked everything to ensure this continues. Ultimately they want to force YOU to pay for their radical left-wing agenda via your purchases and retirement. **But we're not going to let them win. ** We are fighting back to ensure **wokeness doesn’t win** , but we need your help. **[We need to raise urgent funds to stop this dangerous ESG agenda in its tracks.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=237da349b37f40eb96330f25101a5280&_e=VJXSMC9DqELknV8Q-7huVZrSnDoWl6KS8mRMoBxf4MC2L5nW9z_G1twNzuTUvcMtszbzXo7Xfs2dMPuzHZC9WqCxr4RioxZYEZop7S7XSHegrzP-k42cgDs1z5fqP1me3a-X4azfldh0_xXdlzoR2okZHCaeb8SZaWMDgQGQaymy9iSnguMH8vHwGAq36c0xqVi_7ucEwQUAeH3X3NN3gofedNWXAoa6qwVqnlGD_rdekZPKbumFYivttkSHRokLTlFCYwRTrzfLo8p7M6W1MgtMSoXkL3EZjxJevmoZnz3GumQbC9xWNydxKKOaSun7Hq-HSIZ1MuJnB8ALRw0ntuZzBbI6Z0J98ZaHa3lIfWXxXK-94M4c-WIIisElAkEN2v77REtZaJhksXc0ta--724Pub_oOwsaFe0bqBeDQrk%3D "We need to raise urgent funds to stop this dangerous ESG agenda in its tracks.")**

| Peter,

The most commonly used abortion pill could be banned nationwide, all because of a ruling from one Trump-appointed judge with a radical agenda.

It’s been less than a year since the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade._ But GOP extremists have been hard at work passing increasingly extreme abortion bans, manipulating the courts and spreading misinformation about reproductive care. And Peter, they’re only just getting started.

Far-right radicals in Congress, in the courts and across our country are waging an all-out war against abortion access. **Before we know it, a nationwide abortion ban could be on the floor of the Senate._And I don’t want to think about what would happen if Mitch McConnell is in control of that chamber._**

**Let me be very clear here:** The fight to save our reproductive rights is the fight of our generation. And it’s one that we cannot, under any circumstances, afford to lose.

I’ve spent my years in office fighting tooth and nail against every single effort to roll back or chip away at our reproductive freedoms. You have my word that I will never, ever give up. But I cannot win this battle alone. I need you with me, Peter.

clean_body: | Peter, The most commonly used abortion pill could be banned nationwide, all because of a ruling from one Trump-appointed judge with a radical agenda. It’s been less than a year since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade. But GOP extremists have been hard at work passing increasingly extreme abortion bans, manipulating the courts and spreading misinformation about reproductive care. And Peter, they’re only just getting started. Far-right radicals in Congress, in the courts and across our country are waging an all-out war against abortion access. Before we know it, a nationwide abortion ban could be on the floor of the Senate.And I don’t want to think about what would happen if Mitch McConnell is in control of that chamber. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Kirsten Gillibrand and Upset the Setup will go through immediately: | = = = = = Let me be very clear here: The fight to save our reproductive rights is the fight of our generation. And it’s one that we cannot, under any circumstances, afford to lose. I’ve spent my years in office fighting tooth and nail against every single effort to roll back or chip away at our reproductive freedoms. You have my word that I will never, ever give up. But I cannot win this battle alone. I need you with me, Peter. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Kirsten Gillibrand and Upset the Setup will go through immediately: = = = = = With gratitude and love, Kirsten | | Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC (www.upsetsetup.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 600 Pennsylvania Ave. SE #15180, Washington, DC 20003 Upset The Setup is working everyday to elect young, diverse, progressive Democrats to critical local offices so we can build up our communities, increase opportunity, and eliminate poverty. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Early match opportunity ends in 30 hours!
body:
| | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---
| | | | | | | | [DOUBLE YOUR GIFT FOR THE NEXT 30 HOURS ONLY](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1733194?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Friend, I had to personally reach out to you early, ahead of the Earth Day rush Saturday, and share this important update on our planet-saving work.
No matter what greedy corporations say, or how many millions of dollars they spend on PR and misinformation campaigns, Friends of the Earth is committed to fighting back. **Corporate pollution is a choice, and we CAN hold companies accountable for that choice. **
**Right now, mega-manufacturing plants are pumping out single-use plastics that end up in our oceans to the tune of two huge garbage trucks per minute. Corporations are aggressively working to expand mining, logging and drilling operations on our public lands. The resulting habitat loss threatens the survival of endangered species – who are now in more danger than EVER. Meanwhile, the climate crisis is worsening from out-of-control fossil fuel greed. **
**The fact is this: We don't have to live like this, and our only Earth doesn't have to die like this.** We have the power to stop catastrophic outcomes for our planet and all its inhabitants if we fight back together now. And what more powerful moment than Earth Day to take action?
**That’s why this is such heartening news: A generous group of donors is matching every gift for Earth Day up to our goal of $180,000 but only until midnight tomorrow. Because you've been such a committed supporter, we created a custom match link you can use to be the first to DOUBLE your Earth Day impact. So please hurry and make your gift for our planet now! Here’s your personal link: **
| | [EARLY MATCH ACCESS FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1733194?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
This goal means so much to our organization and the planet – and we chose you to be part of this select group for early match access because we know you recognize how high the stakes are. When you make your early-bird donation, you'll be ensuring we can mobilize on the ground, keep pressure on legislators and stop the climate crisis before it’s too late.
**Matches like this don’t come often, and the stakes for our only Earth have never been higher. **That’s why we must seize this opportunity for our planet, friend. With all our futures on the line, getting complacent or giving in to despair is simply not an option. So we’re counting on committed environmentalists like you to set the pace for the rest of our community.
**With time running out, we need to make this Earth Day really count. Please, make your membership gift and be part of the urgent solutions we need to break the grip of corporate greed and protect our planet while we still can. Your personalized Earth Day match access link is right here – donate now to have every dollar doubled:**
| | [EARLY MATCH ACCESS FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1733194?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Thank you,

Erich Pica
President
Friends of the Earth
|

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | == Friend, I had to personally reach out to you early, ahead of the Earth Day rush Saturday, and share this important update on our planet-saving work. No matter what greedy corporations say, or how many millions of dollars they spend on PR and misinformation campaigns, Friends of the Earth is committed to fighting back. Corporate pollution is a choice, and we CAN hold companies accountable for that choice. Right now, mega-manufacturing plants are pumping out single-use plastics that end up in our oceans to the tune of two huge garbage trucks per minute. Corporations are aggressively working to expand mining, logging and drilling operations on our public lands. The resulting habitat loss threatens the survival of endangered species – who are now in more danger than EVER. Meanwhile, the climate crisis is worsening from out-of-control fossil fuel greed. The fact is this: We don't have to live like this, and our only Earth doesn't have to die like this. We have the power to stop catastrophic outcomes for our planet and all its inhabitants if we fight back together now. And what more powerful moment than Earth Day to take action? That’s why this is such heartening news: A generous group of donors is matching every gift for Earth Day up to our goal of $180,000 but only until midnight tomorrow. Because you've been such a committed supporter, we created a custom match link you can use to be the first to DOUBLE your Earth Day impact. So please hurry and make your gift for our planet now! Here’s your personal link: | | == This goal means so much to our organization and the planet – and we chose you to be part of this select group for early match access because we know you recognize how high the stakes are. When you make your early-bird donation, you'll be ensuring we can mobilize on the ground, keep pressure on legislators and stop the climate crisis before it’s too late. Matches like this don’t come often, and the stakes for our only Earth have never been higher. That’s why we must seize this opportunity for our planet, friend. With all our futures on the line, getting complacent or giving in to despair is simply not an option. So we’re counting on committed environmentalists like you to set the pace for the rest of our community. With time running out, we need to make this Earth Day really count. Please, make your membership gift and be part of the urgent solutions we need to break the grip of corporate greed and protect our planet while we still can. Your personalized Earth Day match access link is right here – donate now to have every dollar doubled: | | == Thank you, Erich Pica President Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I’ve stood up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2126%2E5257348%2EB14uWQ ]Adam Schiff for Senate

I’ve been fighting for working families, for our democracy, and for truth
and justice long before Donald Trump entered the political arena,
Derek.

It can be hard to remember a time before Trump dominated the news. Before
his MAGA agenda was the only playbook for Republican candidates. Before
the embarrassment and shame Trump brought to our country.

But just a few years ago, when our former president was a reality TV star,
not a politician, I was still standing up for our shared values against
Republicans’ out-of-touch policies and a harmful agenda led by folks like
Paul Ryan, John Boehner, and yes, Kevin McCarthy.

Like Republicans’ repeated attempts to repeal the Affordable Care Act. I
was there to vote against each and every effort to overturn the ACA.
Voting HELL NO.

Or their continued threats to make cuts to Social Security and Medicare.
They’re still trying to get away with this — and I’m ready to hold the
line against them.

Or their push for partisan investigations and conspiracy theories for
years. (Remember Benghazi?) On the House Intelligence Committee, I worked
to keep our country safe. Before Kevin McCarthy removed me from it for
holding Trump and his allies accountable.

Or their desire to unravel our democracy and take away reproductive
rights. That’s always been in the Republican playbook.

Whether it was an agenda led by Donald Trump or another Republican, I’ve
been on the frontlines of these fights in Congress for years — and I’ll
continue to take on these fights in the Senate. That’s what Californians
expect from their next Senator.

Because Derek, whether the former president continues to stay in
politics forever or not, these harmful ideas remain. They’re embedded deep
in the core philosophy of far too many Republican leaders in the Senate,
the House, and across our country.

Even Trump’s opponents in the Republican presidential primary cannot
separate their views from the former president’s. The hateful rhetoric,
the unwillingness to extend a helping hand to those in need, the
indebtedness to corporations and the ultra-rich.

We need proven fighters in the Senate, willing and able to stand up to
Republicans. Because you and I both know that regardless of whether Trump
is in office, the GOP is emboldened to act on a broad range of harmful
policies.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1230?c0=apr2023_abs_em.PnShD8&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC30_20230421_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2126%2E5257348%2EB14uWQ ]You’ve had my back when we’ve taken on these fights before, and I’m
hoping you’ll pitch in to my Senate campaign so I can keep up these big
fights. Please, chip in $5 or anything you can today.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1040?c0=apr2023_abs_em.pRaY65&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC30_20230421_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2126%2E5257348%2EB14uWQ ]EXPRESS DONATE $5

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=apr2023_abs_em.O2ILzB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC30_20230421_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=2126%2E5257348%2EB14uWQ ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=apr2023_abs_em.c2HEr4&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC30_20230421_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2126%2E5257348%2EB14uWQ ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=apr2023_abs_em.2RUxgc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC30_20230421_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=2126%2E5257348%2EB14uWQ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=apr2023_abs_em.i2ayRH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC30_20230421_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=2126%2E5257348%2EB14uWQ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em.eR9sXr&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC30_20230421_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=2126%2E5257348%2EB14uWQ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you, Derek. Together, we’re going to defend our country
from Republicans' horrific ideas.

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=apr2023_abs_em.eR9sXr&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC30_20230421_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=2126%2E5257348%2EB14uWQ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

name: Team TNDP
subject: No one should be sitting in jail for weed, Peter.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62123360/402379160/-775277641?refcode=AU_TNDP_EG_GEN_PET_NO_20230421_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzRiYjcxMy02ZmUwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NQtmYbBRzah6e4W9YD_jgDFQX7e_sGNb353NeSryH98=)
---
Peter, it’s past time we end our prohibition on marijuana. Weed arrests and convictions mirror the racial injustices of this country, and exacerbates the racial disparities present in our criminal justice system — despite similar rates of use between racial groups. **We shouldn’t be locking Tennesseans up for use of a substance that is legal for use in nearly 40 states.** We have to not just legalize and regulate marijuana, we must ensure that we do the work to repair the racial inequities the war on drugs created. That means expunging the records of anyone who was penalized for marijuana crimes in the past. [**Peter — If you’re with us and believe in the full legalization of marijuana, will you add your name right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62123376/402379175/-14091694?refcode=AU_TNDP_EG_GEN_PET_NO_20230421_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzRiYjcxMy02ZmUwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NQtmYbBRzah6e4W9YD_jgDFQX7e_sGNb353NeSryH98=&emci=d892c15d-6ce0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=134bb713-6fe0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6362892) | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62123378/402379178/-14091694?refcode=AU_TNDP_EG_GEN_PET_NO_20230421_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzRiYjcxMy02ZmUwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NQtmYbBRzah6e4W9YD_jgDFQX7e_sGNb353NeSryH98=&emci=d892c15d-6ce0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=134bb713-6fe0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6362892)
---
This corrupt GOP supermajority continues to block marijuana legislation left and right in order to fuel the war on drugs that harms Black and brown communities across this state, but we’re committed to electing Democrats that will fix the gaps in our system and relieve this unnecessary tax burden on our communities.
Thanks for your support in this fight,
Team TNDP
Tennessee Democratic Party
4900 Centennial Blvd
Suite 300
Nashville, TN 37209
United States **[tndp.org](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62123380/402379180/-1458193909?refcode=AU_TNDP_EG_GEN_PET_NO_20230421_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzRiYjcxMy02ZmUwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NQtmYbBRzah6e4W9YD_jgDFQX7e_sGNb353NeSryH98=&emci=d892c15d-6ce0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=134bb713-6fe0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6362892) | [info@tndp.org](mailto:info@tndp.org)** | CAROL V. name: Al Franken
subject: a big announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43790?t=6&akid=7213%2E878179%2E6Vf6F3) Hey, it’s Al Franken.

[**I’m writing because I want you to split $10 or whatever you can (or more than you can) between Voter Protection Project and my friend Josh Riley to help him win one of the most important races in the country in 2024.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43790?t=7&akid=7213%2E878179%2E6Vf6F3)

Here’s why I support Josh — and why you should too!

Josh knows policy issues backward and forward. Together Josh and I did good stuff when he was my counsel on the U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee – good stuff like protecting victims of domestic violence.

In the Violence Against Women Act, Josh and I wrote a provision that protected survivors of domestic violence from homelessness. **And Josh and I got that protection through a divided Senate, a Republican House, and signed into law.**

Republicans lie and say Josh was bad on crime, but here’s the truth. Josh and I advanced legislation that _funded the police!_ Providing bullet-proof vests for local and state police. And funding crisis intervention training to teach police officers how to de-escalate situations.

**_Together in the Senate, we also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad at hearings when we cross-examined them._**

Josh really, really cares about all the stuff I care about. And he is the hardest worker I know.

And finally, this tossup seat is considered one of the most competitive in the nation.

[**So, what do you say? Will you join me by splitting a contribution between Voter Protection Project and Josh’s campaign today?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43790?t=8&akid=7213%2E878179%2E6Vf6F3) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Josh Riley and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43791?t=9&akid=7213%2E878179%2E6Vf6F3)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43792?t=10&akid=7213%2E878179%2E6Vf6F3)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43793?t=11&akid=7213%2E878179%2E6Vf6F3)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43794?t=12&akid=7213%2E878179%2E6Vf6F3)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43790?t=13&akid=7213%2E878179%2E6Vf6F3)
This is important to me. And to our nation.

Thanks,

Al

**P.S.** I always add a P.S to these letters to make another ask. It’s a cheap tactic but for some reason it works! [**DONATE HERE.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/43790?t=14&akid=7213%2E878179%2E6Vf6F3)
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=7213%2E878179%2E6Vf6F3). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=7213%2E878179%2E6Vf6F3).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=7213%2E878179%2E6Vf6F3) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=7213%2E878179%2E6Vf6F3). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=7213%2E878179%2E6Vf6F3)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=7213%2E878179%2E6Vf6F3)

name: Redistricting Alert | NDRC
subject: POLITICO: Gerrymandering could “more than double” GOP’s House margin by 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
if you thought redistricting was over, think again
|
---

**Team, if you thought redistricting was over until the next census, think again.** According to _POLITICO_ , Republican plans for “ambitious gerrymandering” in key states could have a huge impact on the next election: **“Republicans could more than double their five-seat House majority through redistricting alone. That would give Speaker Kevin McCarthy a much-needed cushion in 2024.”
_– POLITICO_

[_Support the fight for fair maps in 2024: Donate to the NDRC >>_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62123725/402380621/2067580287?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230421_FR_4Jr_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY5YmM2NjY5LTcwZTAtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IYKnLtDs23FzqeDmPVihy929q3NosXciCIJ8heFoHW0=)** In states like Ohio, Republicans are fighting to defeat challenges to rigged maps. And in North Carolina, GOP lawmakers are asking the state’s highest court to roll back fair maps so the legislature can redraw them – even though the state constitution _explicitly_ prohibits mid-decade redistricting!

**It’s an unprecedented power grab, team. Will you pitch in now to help us fight back nationwide?** [**_Help stop GOP map manipulators nationwide: Donate to the NDRC >>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62123726/402380622/2067580287?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230421_FR_4Jr_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY5YmM2NjY5LTcwZTAtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IYKnLtDs23FzqeDmPVihy929q3NosXciCIJ8heFoHW0=) **Here’s the good news: The NDRC’s grassroots movement has a proven track record of defeating these kinds of attacks on our democracy.**

Earlier this month, fair maps advocates overcame millions in spending from right-wing donors and helped elect a fair-minded justice to Wisconsin’s state supreme court. And last November, our movement helped secure what the _New York Times_ called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.”

With more redistricting on the horizon, we have two options: **OPTION ONE:
We can do nothing and let the GOP roll back our progress.**

Years from now, we’ll look back on the 2022 election as the high watermark for fair maps, after which the GOP returned to unchecked gerrymandering.

**OPTION TWO:
We can continue fighting for _even fairer_ maps in 2024 and beyond!**

Years from now, we can look back and know we did everything we could to strengthen our democracy.

**With conservative lawmakers hell-bent on tearing down our fair maps progress, we simply cannot afford to grow complacent. So please: Will you help the NDRC keep fighting with a donation of any amount today?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: DLCC Special Elections Team
subject: 14 wins + 1 chamber flip + so much more work to do →
body:
The GOP is right on our heels, doing everything in their power to avenge their losses. | | |
---
| | State Democrats started 2023 off strong. Take a look at the progress we’ve accomplished together so far this year:
* Democrats secured 14 special election victories including in states like New Hampshire and Georgia
* We defended crucial legislative majorities in states like Connecticut and even flipped control of the Pennsylvania House from red to blue
* State Democrats have continued fighting to pass progressive legislation for working families, defending voting rights, abortion access, and so much more

[But the GOP is right on our heels doing everything they can to claw back power and solidify supermajorities in key states. Can you chip in $7 or more to fund state Democrats facing critical special elections nationwide? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zg_VLrMrMFvj2eg_NergVk0RMpp5VCBNbBXS7sUaF4OCXGKa_IbDsu5vJQmC-tIQR6C0TDIZtqsc8PuqCmD8IasYUwzk-eZ6xTE2zx9Bqv5IBOsVWu7Cmkcxgt2wDMiXLplZcPqgxJo7FXkeBhVwMECezwG1RiVO3bGqVeuBEzrYbpHAdftlnHAGbscHXY2Lf943PGNkcUKZtRgp2lAQlGcc7FoK_wZY4epDkkt4K0lzBUd3XwWTZJ6YfNodX9rHk8mlW2gaQEEKURpwAfNx6Zh7BuGIQPgT8T-lerLC1FdxIxUz89P_Bb6cfeTfBE6bGAD2gi-28wDzHb6d_tBHaK2ks0tR8W328p_MROZ1J9e9xbH2Nl1CgcuC4x6Qpu6J8RfYFbV6JezPUu5GgtcJTXK9Lb8GqBlmEgXpVEFsLs4w/3vj/eKS6kfz7SN-w1_CZJp5XPg/h0/kJ4zPkbGTYrUuDEhlUVRJXStUilvT4PxqpVpAc3ow2I) **Republican state legislators are out of control. name: The GIFFORDS Team
subject: [SIGN ON] Demand that Congress repeal the law exempting the gun industry from consumer safety laws
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The fact that SIG Sauer is not being held accountable for their faulty pistol could cost people their lives.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_gunconsumersafetypet_apr23/?source=em230421-1-15&refcode2=5309.3935704.QyC6Pb&akid=5309%2E3935704%2EQyC6Pb)
Friends -
_The Washington Post_ recently released a bombshell investigation where they found that the popular SIG Sauer P320 pistol injured more than 80 people—without owners even pulling the trigger.
_The Post_ conducted interviews and reviewed videos, police records, and court documents. Through their research, they found a “pattern of discharges that were alleged to have occurred during routine movements. These have included the holstering or unholstering of the P320, climbing out of vehicles and walking down stairs.”
But even though these faulty pistols are injuring people, there is a law in place that exempts the gun industry from regulation by the Consumer Product Safety Commission.
[**We must take action. Will you sign on to demand that Congress repeals the law exempting the gun industry from consumer safety laws?**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_gunconsumersafetypet_apr23/?source=em230421-1-15&refcode2=5309.3935704.QyC6Pb&akid=5309%2E3935704%2EQyC6Pb)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_gunconsumersafetypet_apr23/?source=em230421-1-15&refcode2=5309.3935704.QyC6Pb&akid=5309%2E3935704%2EQyC6Pb)**
Guns should not be able to fire themselves. Period. The fact that SIG Sauer is not being held accountable for their faulty product could cost people their lives.
The government has the power to recall defective cars, medicines, and furniture when they pose a threat. Bad actors in the gun industry shouldn’t be able to get away with marketing defective firearms just to line their pockets.
[**If you agree, please sign our petition today to demand that Congress takes action so that firearms can be regulated by the Consumer Product Safety Commission.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_gunconsumersafetypet_apr23/?source=em230421-1-15&refcode2=5309.3935704.QyC6Pb&akid=5309%2E3935704%2EQyC6Pb)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_gunconsumersafetypet_apr23/?source=em230421-1-15&refcode2=5309.3935704.QyC6Pb&akid=5309%2E3935704%2EQyC6Pb)**
Thank you for standing with us,
The team at GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=5309%2E3935704%2EQyC6Pb) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

Friends - The Washington Post recently released a bombshell investigation where they found that the popular SIG Sauer P320 pistol injured more than 80 people—without owners even pulling the trigger. The Post conducted interviews and reviewed videos, police records, and court documents. Through their research, they found a “pattern of discharges that were alleged to have occurred during routine movements. These have included the holstering or unholstering of the P320, climbing out of vehicles and walking down stairs.” But even though these faulty pistols are injuring people, there is a law in place that exempts the gun industry from regulation by the Consumer Product Safety Commission. Guns should not be able to fire themselves. Period. The fact that SIG Sauer is not being held accountable for their faulty product could cost people their lives. The government has the power to recall defective cars, medicines, and furniture when they pose a threat. Bad actors in the gun industry shouldn’t be able to get away with marketing defective firearms just to line their pockets. Thank you for standing with us, The team at GIFFORDS Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Can you tell me what’s on your mind?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=197%2E35263%2E2pNUGZ)
Peter, Representing Wisconsin in the U.S. Senate has been such an honor — and it’s a responsibility I don’t take lightly. I’m fighting my heart out to make progress on the issues that matter most to working families, and your input is essential. Regardless of our zip code or background, most of us are hoping for the same things in life: affordable health care, clean air and water, a good-paying job, and a better future for your family. As we build this reelection campaign, I want to make sure we prioritize the issues that are most important to you and your family, which is why I’m asking: [**Can you let me know what matters most to you and your family now by taking our official 2024 Priorities Launch Survey?**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/survey/2304_Launch_survey?refcode=AU_STB_EG_LAU_SUR_AC_20230421_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=197%2E35263%2E2pNUGZ) | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/survey/2304_Launch_survey?refcode=AU_STB_EG_LAU_SUR_AC_20230421_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=197%2E35263%2E2pNUGZ)
---
I’m working hard to ensure we’re addressing your top priorities, Peter. I’m hoping to see you on the campaign trail soon enough, but in the meanwhile, I appreciate you taking the time to let me know what’s on your mind.
Thank you!
— Tammy
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=197%2E35263%2E2pNUGZ) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=197%2E35263%2E2pNUGZ)**
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
---

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: The Rolling Stone Is After Me, Sheridan.Church & Sean Feucht... AGAIN!
body:
Christianity Is Under Attack Last night, Sheridan.Church hosted several friends of mine: Sean Feucht, Dr. Randy Caldwell and Clay Clark for a VERY su
| | |
---
## Christianity Is Under Attack
---
Last night, [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20604381.11831.1.cd69e31dad36712b3263e7dbea0190bc) hosted several friends of mine: **Sean Feucht** , **Dr. Randy Caldwell** and **Clay Clark** for a VERY successful event that was 100% SOLD OUT. **Sean Feucht** discussed the importance of Christians invading **every sphere of life** with the Kingdom of God. That prompted another article from the Rolling Stone about me, [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20604381.11832.1.ed58e06b1e13ce6a049e50441ab02a84) and **Sean Feucht** that has the Twitter "warriors" losing their mind and blowing up our church's phone. The constant attack upon authentic Christianity in our Nation is troubling. This is all the more reason that each of us have to engage to preserve our Christian Nation and make sure that **President Trump** is elected for a _third_ time in 2024. **President Trump has proven to be a friend of the Church in America.** I encourage you to register for the next [Pastor's For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20604381.11833.1.9c56ff9fd4f6af45ab895280a0958f5d) prayer call at [www.PastorsForTrump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20604381.11834.1.bb8c28b2c1b78e21b14914c83cf210d0) Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20604381.11835.1.885cb9b900cc14f72d53ee213e1eb049), GAB, [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20604381.11836.1.8c40d23e1dfef644e4b46f7f373a9c24), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20604381.11837.1.83194676aabe9f7f8cb1f304a0e93ca5), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20604381.11838.1.abb00b74b1327b51e14028a770f5460a), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20604381.11839.1.f747c03e01c2456757f0c2487a60bfdd), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20604381.11840.1.c7222c935d19efed8525329f6c7be01f)). [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20604381.11841.1.68c4ca840d7bd14e763ad600013b8c8a)
---

| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20604381.11842.1.3b4438cb53a76841344ff80e520a17b8)
---
## The Baptism Of The Holy Spirit
---
This WKND at [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20604381.11843.1.1a47688b6dc41dd840f229bc3dcf3164) OKC & Tulsa, I launched a _NEW_ series over **the Book of Acts**. I figured that I should just address the _controversial_ elephant in the room right from the start... **the Baptism of the Holy Spirit**. Unfortunately, there is a TON of confusion about who the Holy Spirit is and what the work of the Holy Spirit is in the life of a believer. I believe this message will bless you just as it did the [Sheridan](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20604381.11844.1.b88d6b1ad6b94769648df5461b399326) Family this WKND. Watch here: [The Book Of Acts Pt. 1 - Power](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20604381.11845.1.d52f90827f1e3f0cf0cdf15480089368)

## Message From Mike Lindell

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: What will you fight for this Earth Day?
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | We have good news and bad news. First, the bad news: We’re hurtling toward climate disaster, and corporations are taking every opportunity to dismantle hard-fought environmental protections, destroy our public lands and waters, and accelerate mass extinction... just so they can profit at our expense. The good news: We can fight this together, and what better time to do so than now, for Earth Day? Friends of the Earth has been working overtime to fight for people and our planet -- before it’s too late. But we can’t do it without you. To keep up the fight, we urgently need to raise $180,000 **by midnight tomorrow.** That’s why we need YOU to donate as generously as you can today. Can you help us meet our goal? **Please, Friend, make a special Earth Day donation of $27 or more by midnight tomorrow. Donate now and your gift will be matched dollar-for-dollar, doubling your impact!** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [$27 donation + $27 match = $54 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1733346?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [$50 donation + $50 match = $100 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1733347?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [$100 donation + $100 match = $200 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1733348?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Double another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1733349?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The facts are sobering. This past year has been one of the worst ever for scores of species -- including wild bees and gray wolves -- as well as for climate change.
The Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change just gave the world its strongest warning that there is absolutely no time left to delay action on climate change. If we don’t act now, more areas of the planet will become unlivable. Extreme weather events will become more common. And the degradation of our ice caps and forests could tip us into increasing rates of global warming.
In short, **we don’t have much time left before complete ecological disaster.**
That’s why we’ve ramped up our efforts this year. **We’re not only running our typical campaigns** \-- including shifting our food and energy systems, protecting our oceans and forests, and more -- **but we’re also rapidly responding to new daily threats as they arise.**
Over the course of our history as an organization, we’ve seen and accomplished a lot together. And more than ever, we need your support -- as does our planet.
**Friend, please donate $27 or more to Friends of the Earth by MIDNIGHT TOMORROW. **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | [$27 donation + $27 match = $54 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1733346?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [$50 donation + $50 match = $100 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1733347?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [$100 donation + $100 match = $200 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1733348?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Double another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1733349?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**With your support, we pick strategic targets and run winning campaigns.** We use all the tools in our toolbox, from _hard-hitting research_ that exposes corruption and blocks dangerous policies, to _corporate campaigning_ that disrupts polluters’ actions and holds them accountable.
And we’re not just focused on immediate needs or reacting to the bad news of the day. We’re organizing to build long-term political power, for a healthy, just, sustainable world. **We’re changing the systems at the root cause of environmental harm, not just addressing the symptoms.**
This transformative leadership is thanks to you. With your support, we’ve been able to boldly push for urgent change. For decades, we’ve been a fearless, tenacious watchdog for people and our planet, and our expertise is perfect for this moment. **But now we’re counting on your membership support so we can continue this important work, Friend.**
Right now, a generous group of donors will match your gift dollar-for-dollar up to $180,000, doubling your impact!
**Please give as generously as you can. Rush a donation to Friends of the Earth today.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | [$27 donation + $27 match = $54 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1733346?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [$50 donation + $50 match = $100 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1733347?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [$100 donation + $100 match = $200 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1733348?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Double another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1733349?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Regards,
Erich Pica,
President,
Friends of the Earth **
|

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Let me be clear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
| Peter,

The most commonly used abortion pill could be banned nationwide, all because of a ruling from one Trump-appointed judge with a radical agenda.

It’s been less than a year since the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_. But GOP extremists have been hard at work passing increasingly extreme abortion bans, manipulating the courts and spreading misinformation about reproductive care. And Peter, they’re only just getting started.

Far-right radicals in Congress, in the courts and across our country are waging an all-out war against abortion access. **Before we know it, a nationwide abortion ban could be on the floor of the Senate. _And I don’t want to think about what would happen if Mitch McConnell is in control of that chamber._**

| Abortion rights are under attack from coast to coast. A Trump-appointed judge in Texas ruled to block access to the leading abortion medication, Mifepristone, setting up a legal battle going all the way to the Supreme Court.

And in state legislatures across the nation, extreme Republicans are doing whatever they can to severely limit or totally ban our reproductive rights. Here in Kansas, Governor Kelly just vetoed an anti-choice bill passed by the legislature.

**Last year, Kansans spoke loudly with our votes to protect our freedoms — _and now’s the moment when we need to double down on the fight._**

**[Can I count on you to chip in before the Supreme Court weighs in on abortion rights for the first time since overturning Roe? Their ruling is expected to come down anytime now. clean_body: | Abortion rights are under attack from coast to coast. A Trump-appointed judge in Texas ruled to block access to the leading abortion medication, Mifepristone, setting up a legal battle going all the way to the Supreme Court. And in state legislatures across the nation, extreme Republicans are doing whatever they can to severely limit or totally ban our reproductive rights. Here in Kansas, Governor Kelly just vetoed an anti-choice bill passed by the legislature. Last year, Kansans spoke loudly with our votes to protect our freedoms — and now’s the moment when we need to double down on the fight. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = No one should be forced to let a politician or a judge make life-altering healthcare decisions for them. These last two years under Joe Biden have been **disastrous** for our country.
* Inflation is _rampant_.
* Our southern border is _wide open_.
* China is _on the rise and embarrassing us_ on the global stage.
* The left have wasted _trillions of dollars_.
* And the Washington bureaucracy is _worse than ever before_.

Biden’s devastating handling of the withdrawal from Afghanistan killed 13 of our brothers and sisters. His actions have not only weakened the U.S. but emboldened terrorists around the world who seek to strike back at America. [**We need experienced and proven leadership back in the White House. name: LucasKunce.com
subject: NEW: Senator Josh Hawley's Connections to the Abortion Pill Case
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
An explosive new report details Hawley’s direct ties to the Texas judge who ruled to ban abortion medication nationwide earlier this month
#
Peter — an explosive new report details Josh Hawley’s direct ties to Texas Judge Matthew Kacsmaryk, who decided a case this month on behalf of Hawley’s wife to ban the most commonly used abortion pill nationwide.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31532?refcode=em20230421-3026&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3026%2E614464%2E8tGnNr)
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31532?refcode=em20230421-3026&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3026%2E614464%2E8tGnNr)**
After Matthew Kacsmaryk’s 2017 nomination to be a federal judge in North Texas stalled in the Senate, he made a donation to Josh Hawley — current U.S. Senator and fellow member of the Federalist Society, a group of corporate activist lawyers with funders like Chevron, Google, and the Kochs.
**That donation put Kacsmaryk on Hawley’s radar.** So in 2019, Hawley pushed his donor’s confirmation through the Senate — even despite bipartisan opposition over Kacsmaryk’s Big Brother views on contraceptives and personal freedoms.
Then, in 2022, a lawsuit was filed in the northern Texas district court to ban an abortion pill millions have used safely.
**The suit was led by Hawley’s wife — and Hawley’s donor was the judge.**
But that’s not all.
Earlier this month, Kacsmaryk ruled in favor of the suit — calling for a near-immediate ban on the abortion drug mifepristone in all 50 states.
And NOW, Hawley is using his position as U.S. Senator to demand that the Supreme Court back _his donor’s ruling_ in _his wife’s lawsuit._
**These corrupt elites are obsessed with using their own power to control every aspect of our lives — our bodies, our families, our economic opportunities — and we can’t afford to let them keep getting away with it.**
**[It’s time to take back power for everyday people and fundamentally change who calls the shots in this country. So if you’re ready to end these attacks on abortion access, please rush a donation of absolutely any amount toward our grassroots campaign to defeat Josh Hawley and elect Lucas Kunce today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31532?refcode=em20230421-3026&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3026%2E614464%2E8tGnNr)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31533?refcode=em20230421-3026&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=3026%2E614464%2E8tGnNr) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31533?refcode=em20230421-3026&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=3026%2E614464%2E8tGnNr) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31533?refcode=em20230421-3026&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=3026%2E614464%2E8tGnNr) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31533?refcode=em20230421-3026&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=3026%2E614464%2E8tGnNr) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31533?refcode=em20230421-3026&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=3026%2E614464%2E8tGnNr) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31533?refcode=em20230421-3026&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=3026%2E614464%2E8tGnNr) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31532?refcode=em20230421-3026&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=3026%2E614464%2E8tGnNr)

clean_body: An explosive new report details Hawley’s direct ties to the Texas judge who ruled to ban abortion medication nationwide earlier this month Peter — an explosive new report details Josh Hawley’s direct ties to Texas Judge Matthew Kacsmaryk, who decided a case this month on behalf of Hawley’s wife to ban the most commonly used abortion pill nationwide. After Matthew Kacsmaryk’s 2017 nomination to be a federal judge in North Texas stalled in the Senate, he made a donation to Josh Hawley — current U.S. Senator and fellow member of the Federalist Society, a group of corporate activist lawyers with funders like Chevron, Google, and the Kochs. That donation put Kacsmaryk on Hawley’s radar. So in 2019, Hawley pushed his donor’s confirmation through the Senate — even despite bipartisan opposition over Kacsmaryk’s Big Brother views on contraceptives and personal freedoms. Then, in 2022, a lawsuit was filed in the northern Texas district court to ban an abortion pill millions have used safely. The suit was led by Hawley’s wife — and Hawley’s donor was the judge. But that’s not all. Earlier this month, Kacsmaryk ruled in favor of the suit — calling for a near-immediate ban on the abortion drug mifepristone in all 50 states. And NOW, Hawley is using his position as U.S. Senator to demand that the Supreme Court back his donor’s ruling in his wife’s lawsuit. These corrupt elites are obsessed with using their own power to control every aspect of our lives — our bodies, our families, our economic opportunities — and we can’t afford to let them keep getting away with it. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thanks for standing with us, Team Lucas | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

body:
No matter what the Court decides, the fight for abortion rights continues. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62124648/402383120/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230421_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2ZkMzFiZTgtNzNlMC1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5HtelUHbEC93Ewl7UBCxuTOV56EyKJojOz8scdobOkg=)

Peter, Once again, we find ourselves waiting on a decision from the Supreme Court about the state of our rights to make decisions about our own bodies. The Court’s newest stay expires at midnight, which means if they do nothing, mifepristone access will immediately be severely restricted across the country. Regardless of the outcome, anti-choice extremists will continue to wage war on our reproductive freedoms. So we need to be ready for the fights ahead. That’s why we’re hoping you’ll consider setting up a monthly contribution to HER Time today. Protecting our reproductive rights is not a one-time battle but an ongoing effort — and knowing we have your $3 or $10 coming through the door each month helps us better plan our long-term strategy.
