name: The New Pennsylvania Project
subject: Meet us at the Phillies Game!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter]
Good afternoon, friends, advocates and voters.
We hope this edition of the New Pennsylvania Project eBlast finds you well.
Please take a few moments to check out all the important news you can use, events happening in your neighborhood, career opportunities, and other updates.
Welcome New NPP Staff!
Graphic with header text:''MEET EVANS MOORE'' with a headshot and the following text: ''Regional Organizing Director for Allegheny County. Evans believes that our democracy is better served when all voices are heard and more people get civically involved. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/341873235_1174402549899952_7371828099933594995_n.jpg]
Meet Minister Evans Moore! Evans is the new Regional Organizing Director in Allegheny County for the New Pennsylvania Project. A lifelong resident of the City of Pittsburgh, Evans understands the importance of people participating in our political processes, especially voting. He is passionate about motivating and moving people into public policy discussions that impact our everyday lives. He has held many positions in the non-profit advocacy arena and joined NPP after serving as a Program Field Coordinator for the NAACP Legal Defense and Education Fund.
Having a deep commitment to social justice; he is guided by the notion that our democracy is better served when all voices are heard, and more people get civically involved. An avid Pittsburgh Steelers fan he resides in Pittsburgh with his wife, one of five children (four are adults), and his beloved American Bully.
News You Can Use
Pa. county sanctioned over copying 2020 voting machine data [https://apnews.com/article/pennsylvania-voting-machines-elections-38b52d6f54779b8c333491064787d4ad?oref=cspa_firstread_nl] (Associated Press)
A Pennsylvania Republican-majority county government where two commissioners secretly allowed a third party to copy voting-machine data last year to help former President Donald Trump overturn his 2020 reelection defeat received contempt sanctions Wednesday from the state’s highest court.
State politics are driving high schoolers' college decisions [https://www.axios.com/2023/04/20/college-seniors-students-liberal-conservative] (Axios)
Why it matters: Americans are choosing where to live and who to associate with based on politics, exacerbating polarization — and that process is beginning at a young age.
Top GOP Lawyer Decries Ease Of Campus Voting In Private Pitch To RNC [https://www.washingtonpost.com/nation/2023/04/20/cleta-mitchell-voting-college-students/] (Washington Post)
“A top Republican legal strategist told a roomful of GOP donors over the weekend that conservatives must band together to limit voting on college campuses, same-day voter registration and automatic mailing of ballots to registered voters, according to a copy of her presentation reviewed by The Washington Post.”
Chester County changes color of mail and absentee ballot envelopes to clarify process [https://whyy.org/articles/pennsylvania-primary-election-chester-county-mail-absentee-ballot-envelope-colors/] (WHYY)
Pa. primary election 2023: A basic guide to vetting candidates for school board, judge, and more [https://www.spotlightpa.org/news/2023/04/pa-primary-election-2023-candidates-running-mayor-council-judge-vetting-guide/] (Spotlight PA)
We're Hiring!
The New Pennsylvania Project is a voting rights organization with a primary focus of registering communities of color and the youth to vote. We are looking for passionate individuals to join our team and help defend democracy by expanding the electorate.
*
Director
of
Campaigns
and
Engagement
*
Director
of
Programs
*
Regional
Organizing
Directors
*
Community
Engagement
Associate
*
Fellows
(part-time)
To learn more about how to apply and review job descriptions with requirements and disclosed salary ranges, please click here [https://www.newpaproject.org/careers/] .
Upcoming Events
Flyer depicting event information for NPPEF's community gathering at broad street market in Harrisburg, PA. Event information transcribed below image. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/Harisburg.png]
Capital Region
Name: Community Gathering at Broad Street Market
Type: Community Engagement
Date: Saturday, April 22
Time: 12:00pm - 2:00pm
Location: Broad Street Market
1233 N 3rd St.
Harrisburg, PA
Flyer depicting event information for NPPEF's community unity event in Allentown, PA. Event information transcribed below image. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/Allentown.png]
Spanish Flyer depicting event information for NPPEF's community unity event in Allentown, PA. Event information transcribed below image. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/Allentown%20Spanish.png]
Allentown, Lehigh County
Name: Community Unity Event
Type: Community Event
Date: Friday, April 28
Time: 12:00pm - 4:00pm
Location: Operation Address The Homeless (OATH)
221 N 7th St.
Allentown, PA 18102
2023 Appellate Courts Candidates' Forum
When: Tuesday, May 9 6:00pm on Zoom
Pennsylvanians for Modern Courts will host a forum with candidates for Pennsylvania's appellate courts, including the Supreme Court, Superior Court, and Commonwealth Court. This event will provide viewers with an opportunity to get to know the candidates through a moderated forum. Attendees will have the opportunity to submit questions for the candidates.
Register here. [https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/WN_4F_dWUz5SMuCxyOC65xqPg#/registration]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/Screen%20Shot%202023-04-21%20at%2011.47.33%20AM.png]
Can you believe the New Pennsylvania Project is about to turn 2 years old!?!
What better way to celebrate all of the work NPP [https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/teamnpp?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZVmlbHsljAUg79bvj2QWI9uug3t2cy7ewsOygRFLc9KC6v3VFYKP1ZI42AwGfzc2GFvNFLKOmPMPj0pUq39nzxdbXtFaZQXyrfKSDm1QqGwmfRdUpmefq21WkdnNht6YOw&__tn__=*NK-R] has accomplished in two years than getting together and enjoying a baseball game!
Join us at Citizens Bank Park for the Philadelphia Phillies game on Monday, June 5th
- Tailgate party with game day ticket purchase starts at 4:00pm (parking lot TBD ahead of the game)
- Game starts at 6:40pm
Game tickets (including tailgate) are $20 each
Purchase tickets here
https://bit.ly/NPPBirthday?fbclid=IwAR2CUyVLC7IayzA-I6aOkv8pLsroBDv2VnWskfyrLVXIKbkGuSOQ1eOZ5QA [https://bit.ly/NPPBirthday?fbclid=IwAR2CUyVLC7IayzA-I6aOkv8pLsroBDv2VnWskfyrLVXIKbkGuSOQ1eOZ5QA]
Thank you for taking the time to stay informed. We'll be back in two weeks with the latest edition.
In solidarity,
#TeamNPP
Graphic depicting: 2023 Municipal Primary Important Dates. May 1- Last day to register to vote for the primary election. May 9 - Last day to apply for a mail ballot. May 16 - Voted mail ballots must be received by 8pm. May 16 - Election Day. Polls are open from 7am to 8pm. vote.pa.gov [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/Image_1.jpeg]
PA ELECTION DATES:
Municipal/Local/Judicial Primary: May 16, 2023
Last day to register to vote : May 1, 2023
Last day to request a mail-in or absentee ballot : May 9, 2023
Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023
Last day to register to vote : October 23, 2023
Last day to request a mail-in or absentee ballot : October 31, 2023
We're on a mission to register new voters in the Commonwealth and expand the electorate.
Help us prepare for the upcoming municipal, judicial, and local elections in 2023!
Invest in our democracy [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?emci=94765bbc-8d5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=1068162]
The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4), contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax-deductible.
https://www.facebook.com/NewPennsylvaniaProject [https://www.facebook.com/NewPennsylvaniaProject] https://twitter.com/NewPennsylvania [https://twitter.com/NewPennsylvania] https://www.linkedin.com/company/the-new-pennsylvania-project [https://www.linkedin.com/company/the-new-pennsylvania-project] https://instagram.com/newpennsylvania [https://instagram.com/newpennsylvania]
Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
New Pennsylvania Project
PO Box 443
West Chester, PA 19381
United States

[] [] Can you believe the New Pennsylvania Project is about to turn 2 years old!?! What better way to celebrate all of the work NPP [] has accomplished in two years than getting together and enjoying a baseball game! Join us at Citizens Bank Park for the Philadelphia Phillies game on Monday, June 5th - Tailgate party with game day ticket purchase starts at 4:00pm (parking lot TBD ahead of the game) - Game starts at 6:40pm Game tickets (including tailgate) are $20 each Purchase tickets here [] Thank you for taking the time to stay informed. We'll be back in two weeks with the latest edition. In solidarity, #TeamNPP Graphic depicting: 2023 Municipal Primary Important Dates. May 1- Last day to register to vote for the primary election. May 9 - Last day to apply for a mail ballot. May 16 - Voted mail ballots must be received by 8pm. May 16 - Election Day. Polls are open from 7am to 8pm. vote.pa.gov [] PA ELECTION DATES: Municipal/Local/Judicial Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to register to vote : May 1, 2023 Last day to request a mail-in or absentee ballot : May 9, 2023 Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to register to vote : October 23, 2023 Last day to request a mail-in or absentee ballot : October 31, 2023 We're on a mission to register new voters in the Commonwealth and expand the electorate. Help us prepare for the upcoming municipal, judicial, and local elections in 2023! Invest in our democracy [] The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4), contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax-deductible. | | **Debt Ceiling Drama Continues 💸**
---
[](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=6484325f282540dbb94c63884c655d5c&_e=TCkX-vcujVOgQ9HzEMrm8Evw2xNe8Ri0NkEW-XlWwtHluiuEiG2-UqNJeoQ1ygxNsUU1zMTE5bbiH0vG8N0LyorCzvUls7ea1um8SypIfASe6MQLSGQzBA7fjeOcsTqJX2HnvMFNsLuSokwNU11QOsndbmDIsUv8eS-EfanvrhPisLHpnQRc4gWHc1FfN5fOKZvk4rHQ8WLIllT59zmdA1_ZuFO3bFuQD4ckmThrMLJsXlL03730P02qv0xcW2buIsEf0y6gLF9efRkkNik81Fj1BqJyui5YFQb-dO1duLA4BHdMxCYQpTMklm6IKIEAE_vqAHVoXj3OfMUt-Pba5Q%3D%3D)

| | It feels a lot like déjà vu! The debt ceiling is a conversation we keep having over and over as my Democrat colleagues continue to spend money like drunken sailors. House Speaker Kevin McCarthy just [unveiled his plan](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=6484325f282540dbb94c63884c655d5c&_e=TCkX-vcujVOgQ9HzEMrm8IYGcCdk0tKc39uwf7Tphvcgk_Nnu0sg1jf_PORFuOnVCJzOwhFT7eUMHAmA7IuMqEaDEOIyB71GO_pwcDF4au681Kd7zndDyiIxnjCm-EvewAJ2i8UlTss-tZZcMwYbunhYZULGZRAjCcvFz6PR2vNf9ae_8Wl1hVDCVOgDIi1UafIIbdaLbgh-6MuAP-4-yWMYU1GtWOnEy5uVEBnRIhnFc6tGXW2xPF-Hfre23cm8G0D3axcapMBgAG5P20AsNdMZwRxFOOI6uyrFZFlxpOg%3D) to address the never-ending debacle, but here's the thing: It doesn’t go far enough. I echo the sentiments of many fellow Republicans when I say this madness ends here. I want to see some real restraints and fiscal cuts. Let’s do a little inventory check on the frivolous federal spending already in the works **AND** coming down the pipeline:
* We’ve got unspent COVID-19 relief funds sitting in state bank accounts.
* There are safety net programs that continue to fund able-bodied people who don’t even have kids. Consider the fact that [10% of food stamps](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=6484325f282540dbb94c63884c655d5c&_e=TCkX-vcujVOgQ9HzEMrm8Nj7-vWQwfJbykng8LEE-ezHOiDvGsYMCmkvMKRppXAmoj7Is41coHmOgiJDJ7MwmMOsylRjfxRACniAg6ixNfRt98O4CPEEO5fthgOKRHL3G5aBXq80MvExL9HxNcjVzI7ZhTZXx_UHdqHkePZAcvrZ26MrRY3WGU_badLBWv6bNxa7lcFqfYuJUGLDbR_uku9BOoT_BaW5WF1w8ydlYuCwsiC6wjlm6H4wG_mmRJNd3A1cTpJv5szhit30tWSMWl8-7L2Y80aWeiklRMXa16Tzo-htJ6rjK_hb_l1IzGqIIY24IvepbyvAHuUlyNzHLw%3D%3D) are used for soft drinks. What’s wrong with that picture?
* Next up, President Biden’s [student loan forgiveness plan](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=6484325f282540dbb94c63884c655d5c&_e=TCkX-vcujVOgQ9HzEMrm8FzNYUH4cHkbyHVA2RZDGo0jIKzaTlTZlLyoMiS0tEioZhkClAHRBaR4oda5XusB8GexW_3XK2rCMJlGKtP5jkbv2cfAQ_biHicMda3X8PTNQ2YAR1YYFcYc2ZvpRVizRDU6AjagVdK6E5o_k50xGTab00vzSccFPOaiJ9kQcFyXesrJ8ZR30JFLzZU0jhr6XN5IELDVL-RhI_WUSum8zHUFxq2RJUkHObTztoEqrSjfAj2vveOtH08INI5E7kjTyOUdqQPVKdMLOEENK24tPT10bbD5AepPW_DH8fXrA-DIjyv0FyCngXIeMmlNJh_l9JpGpS7sljqMkoW10MU3qxc%3D) will spend money like water to relieve grown adults of paying back money they chose to borrow.

I’m not trying to be a troublemaker. I just want America to get off this gravy train. I will continue to speak up and demand aggressive cuts. _Someone_ has to—or we’re headed for a debt-induced [catastrophe](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=6484325f282540dbb94c63884c655d5c&_e=TCkX-vcujVOgQ9HzEMrm8JKhjxJxFJd6lPIwCVs6-jOG0exGXGXOYbyZyICARpkbolqPJgcyBFJafrLSRd8hbaWlazwin5yxiGyX5cCNPP5hu0D6Zxe9unYfG6St98Y0R5wL2RltEnwN4NFliwkDFVq9Fb5DlE0qBm0Z54SMzC6LNWkKOtb12pj4jeCXnNWnfKkBUp1k2NB8GEIbbFI_rKKCxh-gEXgAEvPbs5Rq01WhxKUQmYELoJujR5OJbUnnk0RaDw8V0sFpRBdHuFR1vQ%3D%3D).

| | I recently had the opportunity to throw out the first pitch for South-Doyle High School in Knoxville, and I must say, I think I nailed it. I enjoy every chance I get to meet the fantastic young folks of Tennessee who will undoubtedly be our future leaders. I’d like to thank them for a wonderful afternoon out on the mound, especially because it was a good warm-up for the [Congressional Baseball Game](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=6484325f282540dbb94c63884c655d5c&_e=TCkX-vcujVOgQ9HzEMrm8H_UGgPGa0H4NNuqb_c1AY5wautnhm8mI4FOvWitSH9-XCQgRLeX-4h52Gslpasn14rdwnL2pvYAwFeSL1WlVMgMjOiTEJVT-OeeVBkmbbzFkFuZ-pm8_CNVxmE6uizFD7myg1J8YaLLlL8KQHXCjFscvpE7XhGwezcVW8pQNIW0Vwj4yfW7JygiN7UwwL3G3Sz-Uyf1h3ZSNN7HX2NObLs%3D). You can catch me bringing the heat with my fellow Republicans in June as we raise money for charity and crush our opponents on Team Democrat.

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..vhuDNORSzx12JxqWtwPGBWqHbrPlt_GKjIRXPH4huEw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=115473421)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ae1c1450-caad-4061-8597-29fe8ee1f6be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It's been said that "Democracy Dies in Darkness"...and the same can be said about the integrity of our elections in the United States.
Since the aftermath of the stolen 2020 Presidential election, Americans have become more alert to the growing threat of election fraud in the United States, a problem which both political party establishments are reluctant to address.
According to a [November 2022 poll conducted by The Trafalgar Group](https://substack.com/redirect/5dcf232d-f025-492a-a8d2-a9e4e0030428?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), 56.8 percent of American voters don't fully trust that America's elections are fair and accurate. This is an astounding number, because it means that majority of Americans have lost trust in the integrity of our elections.
The increasing distrust in elections can largely be attributed to mail in ballot fraud, and Big Tech election interference, issues that have been downplayed by many elections officials on a national level.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/89a5ec77-a47f-4186-8e90-aa12de649eeb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And now, ahead of the 2024 Presidential election, a group of some of the nation's most notorious election fraud deniers and election officials, including Secretaries of State, are set to have a secret Elections summit in Washington DC from May 8-May 9 called ["Summit on American Democracy". ](https://substack.com/redirect/c95e1825-2164-420a-90d0-ca4a79d25f83?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)One would think that Election officials who are concerned about Democracy would be transparent with their actions, and invite members of the public to attend their summit. But, this upcoming election summit is "invite only" and not open to the public. Additionally, in their effort to openly mock election integrity advocates who they have dismissed and defamed as "conspiracy theorists", the summit is being hosted at the "International Spy Museum" in Washington DC.
The Center for Election Innovation & Research (CEIR) is organizing and hosting the conference. CEIR was founded in 2016 by David Becker, who also founded the Election Official Legal Defense Network (EOLDN). Becker previously worked at [Pew Charitable Trusts](https://substack.com/redirect/cc0ad555-d17f-4114-bbee-3e8dace4a542?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), where he organized the creation of the Electronic Registration Information Center (ERIC). Prior to working at Pew, Becker was the Director of [People for the American Way](https://substack.com/redirect/a8aa6d48-230d-4e30-ba1a-a98a4639ebde?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (PFAW) and also worked in the [U.S. Department of Justice](https://substack.com/redirect/78e85187-ad55-4b8b-a99f-56f12c2690ab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as a litigator. However, in 2005, a formal [ethics complaint was filed against Becker](https://substack.com/redirect/f0348b5c-7e20-4437-96a9-f9fe82e6acc6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) when he was a trial lawyer in the Civil Rights Division of the DOJ. At the time, Brad Scholzman, was the acting head of the Department of Justice's Civil Rights division, and he said Becker did one of "the most unethical things I've ever seen" and called Becker "a hard-core leftist and a classic case of someone who should have been disbarred." Scholzman also added that Becker "Couldn't stand conservatives."
Electronic Registration Information Center (ERIC) is a multi-state partnership which claims to allow states to share voter registration data with each other. It is currently used by over 30 states within the United States, but its critics argue that it enables election fraud and violates data privacy.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3558d262-f0f0-45a7-acfb-2e0b5f59fa4e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[CEIR describes itself ](https://substack.com/redirect/127b7fae-cc3f-4612-a39a-1474c1e28eb7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)as a "nonpartisan nonprofit that conducts elections research and works with election officials from around the country and both sides of the aisle. to support elections that voters should--and do--trust.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1583aa1a-3a0a-423d-a785-18d6d9adb3b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
However, founded by Becker, a hard core Leftist activist, CEIR is documented as being a SOROS tied advocacy group that provides grants and conducts research to increase Democrat voter turnout in swing states. Becker created CEIR in 2016 in response to President Trump's election, which Becker claims was the result of "foreign interference". However,Becker and CEIR clearly have no issue with election interference, because in August 2020, less than three months before the Presidential election, CEIR accepted $69.5 million from Facebook founder and billionaire [Mark Zuckerberg](https://substack.com/redirect/52a31a3a-b774-4b4f-91dc-665c8923b146?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and his Chinese wife, [Priscilla Chan](https://substack.com/redirect/a880fb99-6a6f-487b-95ec-0790c220c5ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to create more mail in ballot drop boxes in key swing states under the guise of "COVID-19 safety precautions".
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..vhuDNORSzx12JxqWtwPGBWqHbrPlt_GKjIRXPH4huEw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=115473421)
David Becker wrote a book titled, "The Big Truth: Upholding Democracy in the Age of the Big Lie." His book paints all MAGA supporters who question the legitimacy of the 2020 election results as naive, brainwashed, or subject to an effective disinformation campaign. Mind you, Becker not only believes, but also perpetuated the lies that Russia interfered with the 2016 election, that Jan 6th was a "violent insurrection", and that the 2020 election was the most transparent and verifiable election in US history.
Becker's upcoming summit has an invite only hidden guest list, and a Speaker list and agenda that currently features six Secretary of States (NV RI, CO, GA,NM, NJ), Major Garrett, CBS New's Chief Washington correspondent, Sarah Longwell, Publisher of _The Bulwark,_ an American anti-Trump conservative news and opinion website, and Ben Ginsburg, the Co-Chair of the Election Official Legal Defense Network (EOLDN).
Of the election officials who are listed as speakers at the CEIR summit, some have received national exposure for their refusal to look thoroughly into reported voter fraud in the 2020 and 2022 elections, including Georgia Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger, Gabe Sterling, the chief operating officer of Georgia's Office of the Secretary of State, and Bill Gates, the County Supervisor in Maricopa County, Arizona.
These elected officials have been brought together and invited to speak by David Becker because of their use of ERIC, the program he created. ERIC is a voluntary contract membership between states and ERIC. States that use ERIC must pay up to $2 million of tax-payer- money annually. In March of 2023, [Becker resigned from ERIC](https://substack.com/redirect/a3fca44b-c481-4781-ba10-3679529a394f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) after three GOP states dropped ERIC due to Becker's radical Leftist associations and financial ties to George Soros and Mark Zuckerberg.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bffd1699-9870-4c5e-a88a-c30836980d76?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Instead of taking responsibility for being a partisan hack, Becker blamed his resignation from ERIC on "attacks from election deniers". Becker profusely denies his [Soros ties, but there are countless articles](https://substack.com/redirect/2c90f8e9-0c43-4b97-8f1a-78f12c9acd44?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) proving that his work was and still is funded by George Soros, and Facebook founder [Mark Zuckerberg.](https://substack.com/redirect/9b612a20-94c5-4e46-a72a-2576d66570bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Even though Becker denies his ties to Soros, in his book, he mentions that he worked at Pew Charitable Trusts, a part of Open Society Foundations, which is a grant making network founded and chaired by George Soros.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a90f759a-e8fb-480e-ad53-654ce01528b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
According to the CEIR[ website](https://substack.com/redirect/6d0231bd-00ef-45cc-a3b0-3fb4b951af93?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> _" ERIC is a tool that I [David Becker] helped create in 2012. It is a nonprofit, run by states that voluntarily choose to be members, that helps make them identify voters who have moved, voters who have died, and possible instances of illegal double voting. It also assists states in directing potentially eligible voters to secure and convenient voter registration, instead of less-secure and burdensome paper registration forms. I [David Becker] served on the ERIC board as a non-voting member for nearly its entire existence, until last week, when my term expired, and I informed ERIC that I would not accept renomination as a non-voting member of the board."_
After being exposed as a radical Left-wing activist who pretends to be non-partisan in an effort to interfere with the outcome of US elections in key swing states (with funding from Soros and Zuckerberg), it appears that Becker is using CEIR to continue his partisan election activism, but behind closed doors.

It should concern all American voters that elected officials, including Secretary of States are secretly convening in our nation's capital ahead of the 2024 Presidential election with a Leftist activist who resigned in disgrace and has a documented history of acting in an unethical and corrupt manner to push his Leftist political agenda.
While CEIR's website only features about eight speakers as of now, the agenda for the summit indicates that there are several panels and [additional speakers ](https://substack.com/redirect/642998fc-a6d1-4187-8bb4-638140a54f75?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)who have not been listed on the site. However, the event is invite only by design to conceal the contents of the summit from the public. The Election Official Legal Defense Network (EOLDN) is a project of CEIR, and is listed on CEIR's website. EOLDN says its purpose is to connect licensed, qualified, pro bono attorneys with election administrators who need advice or assistance. As a branch of CEIR, EOLDN advisory board members have also been invited to attend the secret election summit in DC.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fe38367c-8851-41fd-848d-c7f025c9bdcb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
EOLDN's advisory board consists of Supervisors of Elections, Secretaries of State, election clerks, and directors of elections from all across the country, but specifically in key swing election states.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/852f5c91-9a65-422d-9391-f9e6cc890625?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e5597c56-8196-40a3-8bbe-8c419e9c4fe4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2ba7510b-0a2c-4b27-ab41-a6060f3a5864?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/89881299-2b6f-4ae0-b7af-9f11a3f742ac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/092a61c6-0daf-40bf-8258-1a588a596330?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/91de59df-1ef0-4069-ba89-cd55d97555cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
To put into perspective why this closed-door secret summit is problematic, it serves to undermine not only the integrity of our elections through a lack of transparency, but it also undermines the judicial system. For example, Kari Lake, the Republican candidate for Governor of Arizona in 2022 is in the middle of an appeal regarding her lawsuit contesting the results of her election. Named in her lawsuit are several Arizona elections officials, including Bill Gates (Gates serves on the Maricopa County Election Board of Supervisors), who is listed as an attendee of the summit.
Elections officials are supposed to be non-partisan. However, on December 22, 2022, Gates [tweeted a picture of his statement](https://substack.com/redirect/dd165a39-36b6-4a6b-9a53-c7024ef908cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), celebrating a court ruling against Lake in her lawsuit against her Democrat opponent, Katie Hobbs. Partisan statements from elections officials are not only inappropriate, but they are unethical and further prove that election officials have partisan agendas.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/925c8dc0-74dc-48a1-94c7-19de6d914b81?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
According to EOLDN's website, Lisa M. Marra, the Deputy Director of Elections for Arizona's Secretary of State, and Stephen Richer, the Elections**** Recorder in Maricopa County, AZ are also EOLDN advisory board members who are likely to attend the secret upcoming CEIR summit . Maricopa County was the focus of national controversy surrounding election fraud in both 2020 and 2022. While running for Governor of Arizona, Lake's opponent, Democrat Katie Hobbs, was the Secretary of State of Arizona. In other words, Hobbs was able to oversee the outcome of her own election as Arizona's Secretary of State, the leading election overseer. Gates, Marra, and Richer all worked under Hobbs, and are advisory board members of EOLDN, a CEIR offshoot which provided them legal counsel to combat Lake's highly supported claims of voter fraud.
It is worth noting that in February 2023, Lisa Marra, the elections director of Cochise County, Arizona, resigned from her job after [two Republican county supervisors, Tom Crosby and Peggy Judd, filed a lawsuit against her](https://substack.com/redirect/6b5ca5e3-d5c0-4c7c-bf3d-7cd04dbd074b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to urge her to conduct a 100 percent hand count of the 2022 midterm election, which she refused to do. Marra's resignation came days before a scheduled public meeting in Arizona regarding voting machines, where members of the public and voter fraud experts were scheduled to speak and show evidence of election fraud in Arizona.
It is laughable that these election officials claim to be non-partisan when they are attending partisan election summits in secret. How can voters in the United States of America, especially in a state like Arizona, possibly have trust in, and feel comfortable about the security of their elections when their top state and county election officials are having secret, closed door meetings at a summit organized by David Becker, a known Leftist activist and Trump hater, who is financed by Leftist mega donors like George Soros and Mark Zuckerberg?
The answer is simple.
They can't!

Friend, The San Carlos Apache Tribe in Arizona have held ceremonies at Oak Flat for hundreds if not thousands of years. These ceremonies are still being held today by the Tribe and the area should be protected. **However, the Trump administration fast-tracked a mining operation that would destroy Oak Flat,** and President Biden’s Secretary of Agriculture is preparing to release the Final Environmental Impact Statement, which would be the last step in handing over this sacred land to a notorious foreign mining company. **While Secretary Vilsack is expected to release the Environmental Impact Statement at any time, this fight is not over!** [**Add your name to demand Secretary Vilsack protect Oak Flat for **San Carlos Apache Tribe Chairman Terry Rambler said** that _“obliterating Oak Flat for a copper mine will be a grave human rights violation against Indigenous people and an environmental catastrophe.”_
**The transfer of this Native land to Rio Tinto Resolution Copper Mining would destroy the entire area, deplete and poison already limited water supplies, and forever destroy the culture and religion of the San Carlos Apache people -- all for corporate greed to export copper to other countries.**

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Republicans are dead set on flipping Tammy’s seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P
body:
| | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, [please click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDC1zXjOgMKTq1qg9b7LMk8NY4biyiGBVJXIDelS7m60cKaXwQDfsi6wVlrlpGB5RcgfuIIHe6hd8iOGFvsd6XbH6bPGloasmPsNPOUCpYuDqjrfWXPulk7ACO8jglUSTg2QgyHHzijCNBLsi7Mh6LHw3ezm059YKcMMQiYmearLpHfew-7h8bYLWpVvynq-ebZJfh38OFQq0q10xGtjF4ZejR9o0ybx4p5JK02YFgDYKUM4WjnlyhPqnQXJo8EPJCcbmfSVFZLlb630iqCtEDa-WzTndwrV1zcZRUNlpgsfw/3vj/T-sHVzOgSBWwyOjCMjZ5gg/h0/-AIf6dr6lvQ_ln8VjkTjTMELZ90RR8eFcG8ziU7uBrA) And if you have a moment, please read our message below.
---
[ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yDlvnM2jBW9sbXZMScUxaDDAZib5N3I5cZ-7Y6cDGksPKXTlKvsGpCXSzqyy_eJwH5WRhl4jsOTFLOdM1474NNcth7_S9sR22NmZndwJR3bG1-NqVEgUrJmdn_bVl-Jrc1MOYbdkCwHgiIwVim6KJqiINczVSiQTHQr2ocD-WBnS_4iSzLo2xexG4PGBFjZSEjI2B6n2mw7GWZkAvrSfzcq_Sc2C7Bhq3xwpb6IhhRFcGy9p2LRNJEdPs81vW9FrgsE8Ou0G4_TAwXVkkDaCSXPFcElCynZ2tNtmFXcY28Z1EYxVNX6egux4Dqd5b_2jA3LKCMO74SbKN9R-RaWxYQ/3vj/T-sHVzOgSBWwyOjCMjZ5gg/h1/Du_x6Hx8H8BCgzp3dkWZb0tYe6o2lkpG52_u5YlOTDQ)
Hi there — Senator Tammy Baldwin here! [**_In a moment, I’m going to ask you to split a donation between my campaign for Senate in 2024 and Raul Ruiz. »_**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE3qXXBxga9GlnVdvLc2VObKlDQu_IWaZvFcuezDx4_1Gh2JnYkD3M4LQpsHNFCIJ2c-GDbJnjnrpxyVciX4nbb5_Trp0KwbaTGOpVFIIw_em-aH20g8WJ4u4qlK6_Yx1svF-OqPW9mfrw4XbX1HG1ADxpQe3VTmYMG0FxEx-T8jGgAvb3efydR1qrwqag3_GlCNZS9o7ial4UkeFMOT3tl91jU1C22F14SOrH7AauqxthjMb3OjTKyYK2-cqIPMx5-3O7OHrIxX5cfCCAykw1gv0Le_9jdFrhELm5O7CHDrJ-gPNYckdNW9UQJv9TlTDl3GUz-UnVWeKqS6kkS2hoVEPiBp-KUym5e5uAy6vAKqIbyR10mXB-fH7qNhk-q1VU7SESqeCY-wtExpVU9--giHQXv7iGWs0FX0wyJtYg2JHg/3vj/T-sHVzOgSBWwyOjCMjZ5gg/h2/uCZ62fp-ynjcqBJD8YXOK8YelENKy4tAkMaeHE4SxCc) But first, I hope you will give me a chance to explain the stakes of this race, and why your support is so important, especially right now.

Winning in Wisconsin isn’t easy.

As you may remember, our state gave Donald Trump the final electoral votes he needed to secure the presidency in 2016. He won by less than one point. Then in 2020, President Biden won our state by just 0.6%. And last November, Republican Senator Ron Johnson won by just 1%.

So it comes as no surprise that political pundits and pollsters are forecasting that our Senate race in 2024 will be one of the most competitive in the nation. **In fact,_The Hill_ has already named me one of the most vulnerable Senate incumbents in 2024.**

So as Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans begin plotting their path to flip the Senate majority, rest assured that my seat will be one of their top targets. And with the White House also on the ballot, you can bet dollars to doughnuts that the GOP and their mega-donors will spend whatever it takes to try and flip our state red.

We’ve got a tough fight ahead of us, and it will take a lot of time and resources to build the campaign we’ll need to win. I know this team has what it takes to beat right-wing mega-donors at their own game (_we’ve done it before!_) but it’s going to take all of us working together, which is why I’m asking:

[**_Can you split a donation of $5 or more between my reelection campaign and Raul Ruiz? clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Hi there — Senator Tammy Baldwin here! But first, I hope you will give me a chance to explain the stakes of this race, and why your support is so important, especially right now. Winning in Wisconsin isn’t easy. As you may remember, our state gave Donald Trump the final electoral votes he needed to secure the presidency in 2016. He won by less than one point. Then in 2020, President Biden won our state by just 0.6%. And last November, Republican Senator Ron Johnson won by just 1%. So it comes as no surprise that political pundits and pollsters are forecasting that our Senate race in 2024 will be one of the most competitive in the nation. In fact,The Hill has already named me one of the most vulnerable Senate incumbents in 2024. So as Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans begin plotting their path to flip the Senate majority, rest assured that my seat will be one of their top targets. And with the White House also on the ballot, you can bet dollars to doughnuts that the GOP and their mega-donors will spend whatever it takes to try and flip our state red. We’ve got a tough fight ahead of us, and it will take a lot of time and resources to build the campaign we’ll need to win. I know this team has what it takes to beat right-wing mega-donors at their own game (we’ve done it before!) but it’s going to take all of us working together, which is why I’m asking: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Raul Ruiz and Tammy Baldwin and will go through immediately: | Thank you so much for your continued support. Let’s do this! — Tammy | | Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P.O. Box 1566, Indio, CA 92202 Please, consider making a . name: Working Families Party
subject: Debt limit update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
We just learned a lot. | | | Peter — Ever since House Republicans took 15 ballots to elect Kevin McCarthy as their speaker in January, we’ve been waiting to see exactly what price they’d demand in return for _not_ blowing up the economy through defaulting on the federal debt. **Well, this week, we found out.** Kevin McCarthy just released a 320-page bill that even beltway media is calling “politically explosive” for Republicans.1 They are officially going after:
* **People who rely on Medicaid:** They want to add onerous work requirements and slash the safety net for families that need it the most,
* **People who rely on food assistance:** They want to make massive cuts and add more restrictions to people who rely on food assistance programs to feed their families,
* **Students and young people:** They want to block Biden’s student loan forgiveness plans entirely and repeal parts of the Inflation Reduction Act that made it the boldest climate legislation in decades,
* **And everyone else who isn’t ultra-wealthy:** They want to slash all funding levels for federal agencies — except for the Pentagon, of course — which would mean hundreds of thousands of families losing their childcare, education, and housing assistance.2

With a vote scheduled on McCarthy’s bill for next week, and the Republican threat to default looming just weeks away, we have to make sure that vulnerable incumbents feel the heat now. [**That’s why WFP and our members are holding Republicans’ feet to the fire in key districts — and putting in the work that we know is needed to take back the House in 2024 with a working families majority. Can you chip in with a grassroots contribution of $10 or more to help keep up this pressure?**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUHh6YyEXSTvqBQeSTZsznIBboTXlonoWOfxokA0XLWiE6a29a2HSC18RgYLH7B_te3Uci9za7hq_j7hnXm6NKSJKrFYT17gOOV2ivArDrQlR2eC8Mk_Ur616wi03W_W-hN4atPkXi57D7xhV7iz2_7LvFKaJ1RLBtWIbtfKwoN3xitSEeZOWpY00xvFa08rsMHGsV3gWZK4doVU6b_1cIltLGlwmDoul8SU25Mcff14RNwCP0krkmmLz5xeYlu4OfCnTJRTvaBi8YG8RU_miHvhAV6rlE0xZMWR78ah23yvY/3vj/hBie3n-gTuGNSOw6zPc0KA/h0/HelF-zCQOZhbKyrFZI5xsRZR6LiNqKAEog7Y1wpqA7M) [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUHh6YyEXSTvqBQeSTZsznIBboTXlonoWOfxokA0XLWiE6a29a2HSC18RgYLH7B_teAZcW3ZMT6qGD_aS2APOaZz7TCKFOin6lgFzpKrgcj9j04RkkAnJkvmstvSpkoj2QaE31uQ-yGEjG8xdlznjNgrjMj2ilDm5fP7-4ARWPeuhuNLoCfktWttkiQYDm3r1qEwqQ3Ege99AF--jAZyeK3v-bX7jO50T2AVLYB4FO_vSkb2fuamRdpS4nPyjrRcV33NCJ9pzmBv59pZRkqK2ewgA6epU--Ti5wR1w-TbpJrM/3vj/hBie3n-gTuGNSOw6zPc0KA/h1/6EiVldqunaqcapLu7FSNXOd7O3qAr1O9HtCpwM3UpDY) **[Chip in $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUHh6YyEXSTvqBQeSTZsznIBboTXlonoWOfxokA0XLWiE6a29a2HSC18RgYLH7B_tevsFu_6uY9V6RjrIxLAafM7jeuRB38fKlDn3ypoPXMgwFMkIDaUsBpHsXt1xC7gJpPp44L6cwwsFoGKsJcZoj6bgbhW71UDX4Fo3RD8BCYZBRTpDpdu2sxCZnG74bsDz271uR_fLA8WSocoQcTdl0kAIFFIUSO23CwWlPWOmtSFqhdNsBA12lcSt45umXb3Qh4m0P1xw5n8Cw8pbY9WfvCfmfGXvXski3nRP-Vg2MZcM/3vj/hBie3n-gTuGNSOw6zPc0KA/h2/b9xPp64B5Fs3KOPEcieZVkG-_yg5j2F6iwKsPWG7nEo)** We know the MAGA agenda of tax cuts for the wealthy and cuts to Social Security, Medicare, Medicaid, and food assistance for the rest of us is toxic. clean_body: We just learned a lot. | | | Peter — Ever since House Republicans took 15 ballots to elect Kevin McCarthy as their speaker in January, we’ve been waiting to see exactly what price they’d demand in return for not blowing up the economy through defaulting on the federal debt. Well, this week, we found out. Kevin McCarthy just released a 320-page bill that even beltway media is calling “politically explosive” for Republicans.1 They are officially going after: People who rely on Medicaid: They want to add onerous work requirements and slash the safety net for families that need it the most, People who rely on food assistance: They want to make massive cuts and add more restrictions to people who rely on food assistance programs to feed their families, Students and young people: They want to block Biden’s student loan forgiveness plans entirely and repeal parts of the Inflation Reduction Act that made it the boldest climate legislation in decades, And everyone else who isn’t ultra-wealthy: They want to slash all funding levels for federal agencies — except for the Pentagon, of course — which would mean hundreds of thousands of families losing their childcare, education, and housing assistance.2 With a vote scheduled on McCarthy’s bill for next week, and the Republican threat to default looming just weeks away, we have to make sure that vulnerable incumbents feel the heat now. We know the MAGA agenda of tax cuts for the wealthy and cuts to Social Security, Medicare, Medicaid, and food assistance for the rest of us is toxic. That's why WFP members have been this spring in battleground districts, pressing newly elected Republican members of Congress on these issues and winning local and national media coverage in the process. will help make sure that vulnerable House Republicans aren’t able to run away from this agenda in 2024. In solidarity, Team WFP Source: 1\. , Politico, April 19, 2023. 2\. , CNN , April 20, 2023. Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families, please .

subject: We're ramping things up *now*

body:
That’s why we’re building a team that can do the work to make it happen.
# [](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/39?t=1&akid=16%2E1163%2Eb9aa1P)
Every day, Team Lateefah is growing -- **and it's all thanks to our grassroots supporters.**
We're ramping up **_now_** as we head towards 2024. In order to get Lateefah to Washington, D.C. we need to map out ASAP how much we can spend on ads, field organizers, communications, and more -- the building blocks of a movement like ours.
One of the most impactful tasks we can accomplish is raising early funds so we can build a world-class team and fortify the connections with the CA-12 community we need well before Election Day. The fact is, that starts with emails like this.
**[The most powerful way you can support Lateefah right now and help send her to Congress is by making a donation-- even just $5 -- so we can build political power for our movement. Can you chip in?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230421-1&refcode=em20230421-1?refcode2=16_1163_b9aa1P&akid=16%2E1163%2Eb9aa1P)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230421-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230421-1&refcode2=16_1163_b9aa1P&akid=16%2E1163%2Eb9aa1P)**
We don't rely on corporate PACs to power this work. Lateefah is in this to serve the hardworking families of the East Bay, not special interests. That's the heart of this campaign, and that's the type of leadership we deserve in Washington.
**[If you agree, and if you can right now, please donate to help us send Lateefah to Congress.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230421-1&refcode=em20230421-1?refcode2=16_1163_b9aa1P&akid=16%2E1163%2Eb9aa1P)**
Thank you, thank you, thank you!!
Team Lateefah for Congress

subject: Re: Sinema spent over $100K on wine, jets, limos, luxury hotels

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: re: our debt in New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
New Hampshire is known for our close elections, and ahead of the election there was no indication that 2022 would be any different.
| | |
---
Look, New Hampshire is known for our close elections, and ahead of last year’s midterms, there was no indication that 2022 would be any different.

Polls tightened significantly in the final days, and political experts doubted whether we could win. The good news is that our campaign was victorious. The bad news is that, in order to win, we took on a bit of debt.

We’ve made progress retiring that debt, but we’ve still got a ways to go. **I’d really like to erase this deficit.**

You’re one of my most important supporters, so I am coming to you with this important ask: **[Please chip in $3 or as much as you can so that our (victorious!) campaign can eliminate our debt once and for all and I can continue to focus on serving Granite Staters in the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62127667/402394555/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2260-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGIxNzAxNi03ZmUwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nvlVwns5YKI-WuzqpvnLWOv3hdmvY2kbIB2WWpTZ-G8=) **

clean_body: New Hampshire is known for our close elections, and ahead of the election there was no indication that 2022 would be any different. | | | Look, New Hampshire is known for our close elections, and ahead of last year’s midterms, there was no indication that 2022 would be any different. Polls tightened significantly in the final days, and political experts doubted whether we could win. The good news is that our campaign was victorious. The bad news is that, in order to win, we took on a bit of debt. We’ve made progress retiring that debt, but we’ve still got a ways to go. I’d really like to erase this deficit. You’re one of my most important supporters, so I am coming to you with this important ask: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = I’m proud of the work that this team put in to hold on to New Hampshire’s Senate seat. | | Fellow conservative, I’m Maria Elvira Salazar, and I’m proudly serving the people of South Florida in Congress and working to bring Sunshine State freedom to the capitol in Washington.
**[As one of Congress’ biggest voices against socialism, I’m a top target for the Left in 2024, and I need your help to fight back and defend our Florida freedom in Florida and across this great nation.](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=78e19f21d3264aa4b1b6e5e6d84a01be&_e=-qiWShtcIRyrfCbp2i-httJ48mNFzrYSV3S4VLWOXEas_7YZ7tmPukLTb9-q8GGOt0WIkL2hPSuDa-jornWO4pFEDNF-FCaofU3yL1DdPuUQIh5xQ1AQxc2xvdxHaTTX9Cm9XWIlfl8GxHXmE04FF0mQWL0zSkDIH5Q6kijrrulTxbT_NLfLDh8xiSYFtlvk_HIIGzTcNzp7csF7uWP_wDh9WxAFFIHVWa2wajfHw3zp593rf1abxfQSRWcTV30m1RhZFnhDdhr_OBHF8aoqnZIOYw0VCCY-FEUHD4IsV-kMoOcOJ4VddzsJKCiGjF7Pe8cY6fB61HHe49AYBfjz5lrDJ0l9r93MbSdKA3etIRpbx8kOareEo4ZsJ5IRjl_fvxmk60RpKfINaO5xPfxugmmFVqxbI88G_xkW6uH_JlZhFHlPVypI1-CUb1hL1mkNUSA4I6_o4i4Z_VZF6XB3IQ%3D%3D)**
But first, let me tell you a little bit about myself.
I was born in Miami’s Little Havana neighborhood as the daughter of Cuban exiles. **My parents risked _everything_ to seek FREEDOM in America.**
Growing up, they told me about the horrors of socialism back home in Cuba - and instilled in me the importance of individual freedom and hard work.
I was blessed that my parents made it to our great nation, but I knew millions of people throughout the world are still living under tyranny, so I dedicated my life to exposing corrupt dictators.
As an Emmy-award-winning journalist, I took on Venezuela’s Nicolas Madura, Chile’s Augusto Pinochet, and Fidel Castro himself head-on.
**[But I never thought I’d see the same socialist agenda I was fighting make its way to the United States.](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=78e19f21d3264aa4b1b6e5e6d84a01be&_e=-qiWShtcIRyrfCbp2i-httJ48mNFzrYSV3S4VLWOXEas_7YZ7tmPukLTb9-q8GGOt0WIkL2hPSuDa-jornWO4pFEDNF-FCaofU3yL1DdPuUQIh5xQ1AQxc2xvdxHaTTX9Cm9XWIlfl8GxHXmE04FF0mQWL0zSkDIH5Q6kijrrulTxbT_NLfLDh8xiSYFtlvk_HIIGzTcNzp7csF7uWP_wDh9WxAFFIHVWa2wajfHw3zp593rf1abxfQSRWcTV30m1RhZFnhDdhr_OBHF8aoqnZIOYw0VCCY-FEUHD4IsV-kMoOcOJ4VddzsJKCiGjF7P66vC2VtN_j2EiN7ztAo2rNJ-KlyrILmOl9KdG9v5DZp16-ZrhuD8MNBbzsQe9KGLUAVIxeE7YJrX3FJDM4j8NKo7yWLKoKEAZTfB1UVg2KQkyEIeHJWicRSlzoBLODR-KzS21-2cebUeT85yyv5lvw%3D%3D)**
Now, we have members of Congress proudly proclaiming to be socialists and trying to crush your individual rights under their radical agenda - **[_and I won’t let them get away with it._](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=78e19f21d3264aa4b1b6e5e6d84a01be&_e=-qiWShtcIRyrfCbp2i-httJ48mNFzrYSV3S4VLWOXEas_7YZ7tmPukLTb9-q8GGOt0WIkL2hPSuDa-jornWO4pFEDNF-FCaofU3yL1DdPuUQIh5xQ1AQxc2xvdxHaTTX9Cm9XWIlfl8GxHXmE04FF0mQWL0zSkDIH5Q6kijrrulTxbT_NLfLDh8xiSYFtlvk_HIIGzTcNzp7csF7uWP_wDh9WxAFFIHVWa2wajfHw3zp593rf1abxfQSRWcTV30m1RhZFnhDdhr_OBHF8aoqnZIOYw0VCCY-FEUHD4IsV-kMoOcOJ4VddzsJKCiGjF7PF3SEuJkLLSPBTsO-ovIeZLn9k_YLsoZ3wXtoLeaOKEkIuC6tLI8d0ZQzB7rF-xZ7bhzqf_gS5YAay9rFTS2daQT2whcow6OiJuWxZKbkHtv8uBxwAa0tTY46JF8SzUHEFa5CuA9manph-gsAc7UIow%3D%3D)**
My parents didn’t risk their lives to come to America just for our great country to go down the same path as the Cuban regime they escaped, Fellow conservative.
**I need your help to take on the socialist Left and keep America free. I know how much you love America, and now, it’s time to put that patriotism into action.**
**[Join me today to defend American freedom and SQUASH socialism once and for all.](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=78e19f21d3264aa4b1b6e5e6d84a01be&_e=-qiWShtcIRyrfCbp2i-httJ48mNFzrYSV3S4VLWOXEas_7YZ7tmPukLTb9-q8GGOt0WIkL2hPSuDa-jornWO4pFEDNF-FCaofU3yL1DdPuUQIh5xQ1AQxc2xvdxHaTTX9Cm9XWIlfl8GxHXmE04FF0mQWL0zSkDIH5Q6kijrrulTxbT_NLfLDh8xiSYFtlvk_HIIGzTcNzp7csF7uWP_wDh9WxAFFIHVWa2wajfHw3zp593rf1abxfQSRWcTV30m1RhZFnhDdhr_OBHF8aoqnZIOYw0VCCY-FEUHD4IsV-kMoOcOJ4VddzsJKCiGjF7PbEf2__RHnxrigp1Ag-3wXPdIMixusRdtl-sFyRIv1w7TFNFIiQNEnUkE3Xg0enBbclWr4X8K7M6sTkwib2DLJdRKa3wx33UOrMs1u0cc5sVO-vkDX9HATMALtjOgNmY50Wc1GlTWL3sz63O6Xxq2LQ%3D%3D)**

I'm not about to let that happen — but I need your help.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62128351/402398178/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230407ACA_N_JW_FULL_6_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDEzYTg3Yy04MGUwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F9dWjQyM6YC1N0KcntbP8PPKPkZ0FPgBOMLmAGEJlp4=)

Friend,

Voting for a landmark climate bill last year remains one of my proudest achievements in Congress. House Republicans have made it clear since the day they took the majority that they want to roll this law back — and this week, they considered whether to make reduced climate funding part of their demands on the debt ceiling.

**Let me repeat: the GOP thinks it's acceptable to play games with the U.S. economy in order to undo environmental protections and please their pro-polluter donors.**

**[If you're fed up with this dangerous extremism, I need you to stand with me and make a grassroots donation today. Please help me secure my swing seat and continue the fight for responsible environmental policy →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62128352/402398179/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230421ENV_N_JW_7_NG_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDEzYTg3Yy04MGUwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F9dWjQyM6YC1N0KcntbP8PPKPkZ0FPgBOMLmAGEJlp4=) ** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62128353/402398180/-772585877?express_lane=true&refcode=EM_FR_230421ENV_N_JW_7_NG_N_EB10&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDEzYTg3Yy04MGUwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F9dWjQyM6YC1N0KcntbP8PPKPkZ0FPgBOMLmAGEJlp4=)**

I'm a mother of two, and I owe it to my kids to protect our planet for them and for future generations. We can spare no effort when it comes to making the world a cleaner and more livable place.

We must continue to reduce dangerous emissions, invest further in clean and renewable energy, and further expand public transit. For my entire political career, I've fought for these policies — and I'm not about to let MAGA Republicans turn back the critical progress we made last year.

But I'm going to be facing another difficult re-election. Republicans are eager to target VA-10 again after coming within seven points here in 2022 – and they're itching to replace me with someone who will be a rubber stamp for a pro-polluter agenda that harms the health and wellbeing of families across America.

**[So I'm asking for your help to keep fighting for our values and our planet. Please, chip in $10 or more to my campaign →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62128359/402398186/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230421ENV_N_JW_7_NG_N_L2&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDEzYTg3Yy04MGUwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F9dWjQyM6YC1N0KcntbP8PPKPkZ0FPgBOMLmAGEJlp4=) **

Thank you,

Jennifer

**Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America.** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62128360/402398187/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230421ENV_N_JW_7_NG_NBiobox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDEzYTg3Yy04MGUwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F9dWjQyM6YC1N0KcntbP8PPKPkZ0FPgBOMLmAGEJlp4=)****

[I’m writing because I want you to split $10 or whatever you can (or more than you can) between Democrats Serve and my friend Josh Riley to help him win one of the most important races in the country in 2024.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62128425/402398511/2143308424?amount=10&source=DS_EM_FR_90DO_230421_1_1&refcode2=129e7e2b-81e0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&contactdata=54y+RYsxmoOjPDPFuD44tJehiClMKTKOUwss0Ca4uGg5eNfFtGyk1iPyedOloT5Psf3KI16aXc2wTKnReQUgGc1M3s7C3/1MEPe98RwGjN6TuFHOlbAI40GnNUsTaFksny9bijl0oGoL8i/vgUY58nRIHHdpqtzxqnBROrzbPHE=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjEyOWU3ZTJiLTgxZTAtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pEb6Rbz70Q0r478fTUZbXqZlwuzynz6hyUwzZCEDanQ=)

Here’s why I support Josh — and why you should too!

Josh knows policy issues backward and forward. Together Josh and I did good stuff when he was my counsel on the U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee – good stuff like protecting victims of domestic violence.

In the Violence Against Women Act, Josh and I wrote a provision that protected survivors of domestic violence from homelessness. **And Josh and I got that protection through a divided Senate, a Republican House, and signed into law.**

Republicans lie and say Josh was bad on crime, but here’s the truth. Josh and I advanced legislation that funded the police! Providing bullet-proof vests for local and state police. And funding crisis intervention training to teach police officers how to de-escalate situations.

**_Together in the Senate, we also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad at hearings when we cross-examined them._**

Josh really, really cares about all the stuff I care about. And he is the hardest worker I know.

And finally, this tossup seat is considered one of the most competitive in the nation.

[So, what do you say? clean_body: | = = Hey, it’s Al Franken. = Here’s why I support Josh — and why you should too! Josh knows policy issues backward and forward. Together Josh and I did good stuff when he was my counsel on the U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee – good stuff like protecting victims of domestic violence. In the Violence Against Women Act, Josh and I wrote a provision that protected survivors of domestic violence from homelessness. And Josh and I got that protection through a divided Senate, a Republican House, and signed into law. Republicans lie and say Josh was bad on crime, but here’s the truth. Josh and I advanced legislation that funded the police! Providing bullet-proof vests for local and state police. And funding crisis intervention training to teach police officers how to de-escalate situations. Together in the Senate, we also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad at hearings when we cross-examined them. Josh really, really cares about all the stuff I care about. And he is the hardest worker I know. And finally, this tossup seat is considered one of the most competitive in the nation. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Democrats Serve and Josh Riley will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = This is important to me. name: Michael Bennet
subject: Senate Republicans are trying, once again, to restrict abortion access.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
It's appalling. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62128461/402398566/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzllN2UyYi04MWUwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iagMLyZ82RB_JQrk1RuoPTiAjv8t9-1XFxZqTlHS1kE=)
Folks — Republicans are continuing their radical agenda to make abortion illegal in our country. This time, targeting our veterans. On Wednesday, I spoke on the Senate Floor in opposition to Republican efforts to further limit abortion access for veterans — even in the case of rape or incest. Millions of veterans now live in states where abortion has been partially or completely banned. The VA allows for these veterans and their families to receive reproductive care in the case of rape, incest, and when the mother's life is at risk. Senate Republicans are attempting to reverse this rule. Republicans' efforts to restrict reproductive health care are widely unpopular. That's another reason why I recently introduced the EACH Act, a bill that would end the Hyde Amendment, lifting restrictions to reproductive health care that impacts millions of Americans — especially those struggling to make ends meet, people of color, young people, and immigrants. [**If you agree that we should protect the reproductive rights of our veterans and women nationwide, add your name and become a citizen co-sponsor of the EACH Act today:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62128462/402398567/2137337587?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzllN2UyYi04MWUwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iagMLyZ82RB_JQrk1RuoPTiAjv8t9-1XFxZqTlHS1kE=&emci=d020020f-99df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=139e7e2b-81e0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1295540) | **[Add Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62128463/402398568/2137337587?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzllN2UyYi04MWUwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iagMLyZ82RB_JQrk1RuoPTiAjv8t9-1XFxZqTlHS1kE=&emci=d020020f-99df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=139e7e2b-81e0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1295540)**
---
These harmful policies make it harder, if not impossible, for patients, including our veterans, to get access to an abortion. And recent data shows that 62 percent of voters support lifting federal abortion coverage restrictions.
**That’s why I am working hard to pass the EACH Act in Congress and protect reproductive rights for ALL Americans. **
[**Friend****, if you agree that every woman should have access to safe and legal abortion, become a citizen co-sponsor of the EACH Act today >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62128464/402398569/2137337587?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzllN2UyYi04MWUwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iagMLyZ82RB_JQrk1RuoPTiAjv8t9-1XFxZqTlHS1kE=&emci=d020020f-99df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=139e7e2b-81e0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1295540)

clean_body: It's appalling. | = Folks — Republicans are continuing their radical agenda to make abortion illegal in our country. This time, targeting our veterans. On Wednesday, I spoke on the Senate Floor in opposition to Republican efforts to further limit abortion access for veterans — even in the case of rape or incest. Millions of veterans now live in states where abortion has been partially or completely banned. The VA allows for these veterans and their families to receive reproductive care in the case of rape, incest, and when the mother's life is at risk. Senate Republicans are attempting to reverse this rule. Republicans' efforts to restrict reproductive health care are widely unpopular. That's another reason why I recently introduced the EACH Act, a bill that would end the Hyde Amendment, lifting restrictions to reproductive health care that impacts millions of Americans — especially those struggling to make ends meet, people of color, young people, and immigrants. | These harmful policies make it harder, if not impossible, for patients, including our veterans, to get access to an abortion. And recent data shows that 62 percent of voters support lifting federal abortion coverage restrictions. That’s why I am working hard to pass the EACH Act in Congress and protect reproductive rights for ALL Americans. Thank you for your support, team, Michael Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Peter Welch
subject: This is why we elect Democrats
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
The concrete impacts

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=1260%2E61531%2EUHZkVE)
Hi There,
It seems nowadays that we’re in one neverending election cycle. It can be easy to forget sometimes why elections matter and the concrete impact they have.
When Democrats win, they fight for working families and protect our fundamental rights.
* Democrat Governor Tim Walz enacted universal free breakfast and lunch for all students at participating schools in Minnesota.
* After winning a Democratic trifecta in Michigan, Governor Gretchen Whitmer repealed the state’s abortion ban that had been on the books for over 90 years.
* Democrat Governor Andy Beshear vetoed anti-trans legislation in Kentucky.

When Republicans win, they work to restrict the rights of vulnerable communities.
* The GOP-dominated legislature in Kentucky overrode Governor Beshear’s veto and banned gender-affirming care.
* The Republican-controlled House in Tennessee expelled two Black Democrats for simply joining a peaceful demonstration in the wake of the recent school shooting in Nashville.
* Florida Governor Ron DeSantis signed a law banning abortion at 6 weeks–before many people even know they’re pregnant.

Every election matters and has a real impact on the lives of folks around the country. That’s why we have to keep doing the work, electing Democrats, and fighting for what’s right.
Thanks,
Peter

---

---

clean_body: I wanted to record a video to say thank you for everything. | | | Friend, Despite a Soros-funded prosecutor ARRESTING me... Despite ABC News CENSORING our text donation code... And despite all of the slanderous and vicious attacks from the Fake News... ...our campaign OFFICIALLY raised over $15,000,000 since I was indicted. Let that serve as a powerful lesson to all of our many rabid opponents that NOTHING – absolutely NOTHING – can stop the greatest political movement in history. While I am going to call the donor who officially put us over the $15 million mark, I also decided to record a short video from Mar-a-Lago to say THANK YOU to ALL of the great patriots who belong to our resilient movement. And even if you haven’t donated because Biden is ravaging our economy right now, I want you to know that I still appreciate all of your support and prayers. Together, our movement will save America and we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! | Thank you, | Donald J. **¡VIVA FIESTA! Fiesta 2023 is officially underway in San Antonio! **

Peter, Fiesta is one of my favorite times of the year. It’s an opportunity to celebrate our culture, our diversity, and our community together—all the things that make Texas so great.

**As Fiesta kicks off, we’re launching our "Viva La Fiesta, Viva La Migración 2023" Fiesta sticker!** It features an image of the monarch butterfly, which migrates across the Texas-Mexico border every year, and has done so since long before either of our countries existed. This is a symbol of the dignity and resilience of immigrants, who contribute so much to our state and nation’s heritage.

We must actually address the humanitarian crisis in the Western hemisphere, create legal pathways to immigrate, and not cave into the anti-immigrant rhetoric from the far-right about our border with Mexico. **I hope this sticker serves as a positive reminder of our collective fight for immigrant rights. **

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: What we have on file for you, Peter:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Figuring out the next steps in advancing our bold progressive agenda.
#
**Peter, we wanted to check in and share a quick update with you.**
This past week has been a whirlwind for our progressive movement. Pramila took on the gun lobby and urged Congress to pass an assault weapons ban. She defended our reproductive freedom by calling on the courts to stop the abortion pill ban. And she called out corruption on Tax Day, demanding the ultra-rich pay their fair share.
Still, Pramila’s work is far from over. As we figure out the next steps in advancing our bold progressive agenda, we also have to review our finances.
**We searched your record and this is what we found on file for you:**
**Peter's 2023 Supporter Record**
**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**2023 Donor?:** No — not yet!**
****2023 Total:** $0
**Suggested donation: $27**

_(FYI: If you donated recently, in the mail, or with a different email address, your record might not yet reflect your contribution. Thank you for your support!)_
[**Peter, every single dollar we raise adds up — and every single one is an investment in Pramila’s future. We’re so thankful for your support so far, and we have to ask: can you chip in for the first time in 2023?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41682?refcode=em20230421-2401&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2401%2E420207%2EvH4vgg)
**[Contribute $27 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41685?refcode=em20230421-2401&t=21&akid=2401%2E420207%2EvH4vgg)**
As things in Congress ramp up, it’s our job to make sure we’re on track to meet our fundraising goals so Pramila stays strong. **Our grassroots movement always comes through for Pramila** , and we know this time is no different.
Donations from emails like these keep our operations running, prepare us for busier times ahead on the campaign trail, and allow us to invest in organizing work year-round. **That’s why we’re coming to our most engaged supporters first — that means you, Peter!**
[**Pramila takes her work seriously, and so do we — we want to make sure she’s prepared for all the fights ahead. Can we count on your donation of $27 or more today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41682?refcode=em20230421-2401&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2401%2E420207%2EvH4vgg)
Thanks for your support today,
— Jayapal HQ

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230421-2401-footer&t=23&refcode2=2401_420207_vH4vgg&akid=2401%2E420207%2EvH4vgg)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2401%2E420207%2EvH4vgg)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rep.=20Jake=20LaTurner?=
subject: important weekly update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
Holding Joe Biden Accountable. Protecting Women's Sports. Reining In Reckless Spending. | |
---
| | | [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=f24226b3aa&e=1050d051da)
---
| Friend,

It's Jake LaTurner here. I want to give you a quick update on what I worked on in Washington this week. (It will only take 2 minutes to read)

This week on Capitol Hill, I was focused on holding Joe Biden accountable for his failed withdrawal from Afghanistan, ensuring women and girls aren't forced to compete against biological males in sports, getting Washington's fiscal house in order, and defending our law enforcement officers.

Thanks to all your help, we are **FINALLY** getting America back on track. I am so grateful for your continued trust and support.

Yours in the fight,
Jake
---
|
---
| **HOLDING JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE FOR AFGHANISTAN**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=8a671e5fdd&e=1050d051da)
---
| [**CLICK HERE TO WATCH THE FULL INTERVIEW**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=77acdd4d81&e=1050d051da)
---
| Joe Biden's botched withdrawal from Afghanistan was a complete and total disaster.

The Biden administration's failed leadership and poor decision-making resulted in the death of 13 brave US servicemembers, billions of dollars of military equipment left to the Taliban, and American citizens abandoned behind enemy lines.

_**Instead of taking responsibility, Joe Biden blamed President Trump!**_

This week the Oversight Committee held a hearing to uncover the truth about America's withdrawal from Afghanistan and hold liberal bureaucrats accountable. [**[LISTEN TO WHAT I HAD TO SAY ON FOX NEWS]**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=19f8761a4c&e=1050d051da)

---
|
---
| **PROTECTING WOMEN'S SPORTS**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=dd552ada13&e=1050d051da)
---
| **It’s simple: Men do not belong in women’s sports.**

As a father of two young girls, I want them to have the opportunity to compete on a level playing field in sports. _Democrats disagree._

Joe Biden, AOC, and Hakeem Jeffries want to force girls to compete against biological males in athletics. This is wrong and unfair.

I was **PROUD** to vote for legislation this week that prevents biological males from competing in school athletic programs for women and girls.
---
|
---

| America's is nearly **$32,000,000,000,000** in debt. That's **$250,000 PER TAXPAYER.**

Joe Biden has spent **$10 TRILLION** since taking office—the most ever by a President. Two short years ago, Congress passed the largest debt ceiling increase in American history and Democrats have already maxed out the federal government's credit card again. _**Something needs to change. **_

House Republicans put out a plan this week to rein in federal spending. Here's what it includes:
* Cap federal spending
* Block Biden's student loan bailout
* Maximize American energy production
* Strengthen work requirements for SNAP and Medicaid
* Defund 87,000 IRS agents
* Reclaim unspent federal COVID funds

I joined Maria Bartiromo this week on Fox Business to talk about my commitment to bringing fiscal responsibility back to the halls of Congress. [**[WATCH THE INTERVIEW HERE]**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=90192ae09e&e=1050d051da)

I joined Pete Mundo on KCMO Talk Radio to discuss how I'm fighting to hold Joe Biden and House Democrats accountable for taking America down the path toward socialism. [**[CLICK HERE TO LISTEN TO THE INTERVIEW]**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=2ab51df4aa&e=1050d051da)

| I can't believe I'm saying this but it's true. House Democrats, led by Hakeem Jeffries, are even **MORE EXTREME** than Joe Biden.

**This week 189 Democrats voted to give more power to anti-police activists, allow law enforcement officers to be targeted by protestors, and strip officers of their rights.**

This is **NOT** how I was raised to treat our brave men and women in **BLUE** who put their lives on the line every day to protect our communities. House Republicans voted this week to **BLOCK** these anti-police policies.

✅ Defund Joe Biden’s IRS army

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: DeSantis is drowning his state with neglect, but Maxwell Frost won’t give up on Florida!
body:
Even Sen. Rubio is tired of Ron DeSantis
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T06cef2e6-e168-40d8-a5fe-b5f7b3b7fcb4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **It's been quite an awful week for awful, sloppy autocrat Ron DeSantis. ** **_While Ft. Lauderdale was under water--due to policies worsened by his willful ignorance on climate change--gas lines in numerous areas of the Sunshine State began to form that looked like something out of the oil crisis in the 1970s._**_ Even right-wing soulmate Marco Rubio is complaining and calling for action._ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta6ddf866-ae63-463f-b5da-7083622a5be4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Meanwhile, permitless-carry shootings are also occurring at a frightening pace and DeSantis is ignoring it all because he's a power-craving ghoul who won't leave his book tour to launch a presidential bid._**_ DeSantis did fly back in the dead of night when he hoped nobody was looking, however, to sign a cruel and dangerous abortion ban._** **__On the latter point, we got the perfect contrast to DeSantis. In response to his evil act signing the abortion ban, Florida Congressman, Maxwell Frost, got up and gave both an inspiring and blistering response.__** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta4479960-1153-47c6-a372-a89f8e131d88/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Frost's only 26, the youngest Congress member. He's the future; part Latino, part Lebanese, part Black, wholly passionate equality and opportunity for all. Frost is what gives the GOP cold sweats in the dark of night: They know from the midterms & WI Supreme Court race they can't beat him--or those like him--in a fair fight._ [**_We need Frost and many more like him to run for public office. To be the face of opposition to greedy, gross DeSantis-ites. For his incredible speech--and for our future--will you give Rep. Maxwell Frost $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T35f4ed8f-0f23-4b88-a403-f7d3c54d1192/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for ensuring our future is democratic. And Democratic._ Cliff
