| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T615c967e-23e9-4392-b9b4-c733db9c1c6d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | | | | | | | Peter, It's been quite an awful week for awful, sloppy autocrat Ron DeSantis. While Ft. Lauderdale was under water--due to policies worsened by his willful ignorance on climate change--gas lines in numerous areas of the Sunshine State began to form that looked like something out of the oil crisis in the 1970s. Even right-wing soulmate Marco Rubio is complaining and calling for action. Meanwhile, permitless-carry shootings are also occurring at a frightening pace and DeSantis is ignoring it all because he's a power-craving ghoul who won't leave his book tour to launch a presidential bid. DeSantis did fly back in the dead of night when he hoped nobody was looking, however, to sign a cruel and dangerous abortion ban. On the latter point, we got the perfect contrast to DeSantis. In response to his evil act signing the abortion ban, Florida Congressman, Maxwell Frost, got up and gave both an inspiring and blistering response. Frost's only 26, the youngest Congress member. He's the future; part Latino, part Lebanese, part Black, wholly passionate equality and opportunity for all. Frost is what gives the GOP cold sweats in the dark of night: They know from the midterms & WI Supreme Court race they can't beat him--or those like him--in a fair fight. Thank you for ensuring our future is democratic. And Democratic. Cliff | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

We'll be honest, friend, we're concerned.
**First,** _Politico_ reported that our Democratic Senate majority could hinge on winning in Ohio.
**Then, **multiple outlets, from _FiveThirtyEight_ to _CNN_ ranked Sherrod as one of the most vulnerable incumbents on the ballot.
**Now, experts at _NBC News_ say this race is sure to be one of the "nastiest and most expensive in the country" – right as we're falling short of our critical 48-hour fundraising goal!**
**A country club Republican just joined this race and our crucial deadline is fast approaching fast, so we're counting on your help to close the gap and protect Sherrod's must-win seat before it's too late. Friend, we can prove the pundits wrong, win in Ohio, and defend the Senate – but only with your grassroots support:**
**[So please, will you chip in $5 or more right now? Thanks for being a part of our grassroots team,

Sherrod Brown HQ
**Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Sherrod Brown: **Friend – thank you for being a part of our grassroots movement and for sharing our commitment to the Dignity of Work.

Fighting for workers means building an economy that prioritizes the needs of workers over tax breaks for billionaires and corporations. No matter who you are or what kind of work you do, I promise to fight for you. But I need your help: Experts say I'm one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection and Senate control could come down to Ohio. The only way we can defend this critical seat is with grassroots contributions from supporters like you.

name: Katie Porter for California
subject: Workers > Corporations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=21611%2E3422442%2EDJn_cu)
Derek,
Last weekend, Katie joined the Teamsters and UPS workers fighting for a fair contract. Katie will always stand in solidarity with workers who deserve to share in the profits they create.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230421-1?refcode=EMAG21_1_UNI_20230421_V1_F&refcode2=21611_3422442_DJn_cu&akid=21611%2E3422442%2EDJn_cu)
Our economy should work for working people, not just big corporations. UPS made a record $13 billion last year, and instead of investing that back into their company, they spent $5 billion on stock buybacks to line their own pockets. Meanwhile, UPS workers were being forced to work a sixth day each week and struggling to make ends meet.
When corporations pull this type of bullshit, Katie will always be the first to call it out. As a consumer protection attorney, she’s spent her career standing up to the most powerful companies.
Katie doesn’t take a cent from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists—she doesn’t want their money. She’s in this fight for Californians.
[**Can you chip in a donation of $5 or whatever you can afford so we can send Katie to the Senate to fight for families and workers?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230421-1?refcode=EMAG21_1_UNI_20230421_V1_F&refcode2=21611_3422442_DJn_cu&akid=21611%2E3422442%2EDJn_cu)

In solidarity,
Katie Porter for California

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAG21_1_UNI_20230421_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=21611_3422442_DJn_cu&akid=21611%2E3422442%2EDJn_cu)**

name: Jon Tester
subject: I hate to bother you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
The GOP has already launched early attacks against me so this is the worst time to fall behind.

| Peter —

I hate to bother you, but this is really important.

My finance team just called to update me on where things stand with our critical goal coming up.

**Here’s the bad news: they told me we’re still about $25,000 short. Early deadlines like this can make or break a campaign, so it’s critical we report the strongest numbers possible.**

The GOP has already launched early attacks against me so this is the worst time to fall behind.

Asking for money is my least favorite part of the job, but we’ve got to close the gap.

[_**I’ll get to the point: Can you split $10 (or more!) between my campaign and Fight for Progress to help us get back on track before our April deadline? My finance team just called to update me on where things stand with our critical goal coming up. Here’s the bad news: they told me we’re still about $25,000 short. Early deadlines like this can make or break a campaign, so it’s critical we report the strongest numbers possible. The GOP has already launched early attacks against me so this is the worst time to fall behind. Don Lemon was WRONG on this.

Peter,

Things got a little heated on CNN.

While debating post Civil War history, Don Lemon preposterously claimed that "black people still aren't allowed to enjoy their freedoms."

**That's an insult to the progress we've made over the last 160 years.** His comments embody what's wrong with the dialogue about race in America. I told him so without apology.

My exchange with Don Lemon and CNN that has sparked controversy and anger from some in the mainstream media.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1e580a26dc734db2a4201fa574957b75&_e=6cvMvEhKzj6HuBNDaopjvyquDlx2PByQkD2OInr0lIBv0HvEDBQFX1j4AqZTooF0y4fR01LdzC2wh4NmNdBqNVoRCmXIhge4yIZL46evpWSryQ0munNqXsJAP2BRkDzQiPpc7C6JiSboY9rcXWV3-kZwwbdDZPM8bKatJ9yWO4x65CYv9p3RDGWNyj_9ixQZg4iEEVBR_ugNr6fahmkSK7ueJKDhQZiGlDVIvXesD1XadgczPCYVfnszPv71bnR9vv_TUINqTz24GNlHDEcyXmqrEwB2lWLwVAG6pshtVssnzUSgUrkwaybyNiE0Exyr_hWtGTEWJY0G6A4BMw2m7wkSZBP71abyDqCATmPQshDOyyWkOtHcOg_y1LVUPhEJ)
I spoke passionately about the importance of the Second Amendment and the need for civil discourse in our country. I stand by my words, but of course, some in the media have chosen to twist them and attack me.

**I refuse to back down, Peter.** I believe that we need to have honest, open discussions about the issues that matter most to Americans. That's why I am running for office. That's why I am working every day to make sure I have a prime spot on the debate stage in August.

In order to continue my campaign and fight for the values and principles that set this country into motion, I need your support. I can't do it alone. **[Any amount will bring us closer to our unique donor goal. I need your help to continue spreading my message of freedom and progress.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1e580a26dc734db2a4201fa574957b75&_e=6cvMvEhKzj6HuBNDaopjvyquDlx2PByQkD2OInr0lIBv0HvEDBQFX1j4AqZTooF0y4fR01LdzC2wh4NmNdBqNVoRCmXIhge4yIZL46evpWSryQ0munNqXsJAP2BRkDzQiPpc7C6JiSboY9rcXWV3-kZwwbdDZPM8bKatJ9yWO4x65CYv9p3RDGWNyj_9ixQZg4iEEVBR_ugNr6fahmkSK7ueJKDhQZiGlDVIvXesD1UBb3aImqMLE4BsseYy2Ty8O20ylXG7Skvol-fg67g48Fq96HEUApmfuZTdWRR-QTG1lQPTDqhRN914abk9Z4qMj-W9NXRON4hHfy1tQ2iEoTXLj7NcKW3SdBPIyU66D4NtSbpesX_hqcYQlgZJp0S6)**

**[Please consider making a small donation to my campaign today. Your contribution will help me continue my fight to revive the values that this nation was founded on: free speech. The rule of law. Excellence over grievance.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1e580a26dc734db2a4201fa574957b75&_e=6cvMvEhKzj6HuBNDaopjvyquDlx2PByQkD2OInr0lIBv0HvEDBQFX1j4AqZTooF0y4fR01LdzC2wh4NmNdBqNVoRCmXIhge4yIZL46evpWSryQ0munNqXsJAP2BRkDzQiPpc7C6JiSboY9rcXWV3-kZwwbdDZPM8bKatJ9yWO4x65CYv9p3RDGWNyj_9ixQZg4iEEVBR_ugNr6fahmkSK7ueJKDhQZiGlDVIvXesD1V7zfmuKk4QOgS59FO9NVxwMVUtB7fT4wHpY7KdQ_M0KUGNqd9ZaLn6asrFINAAHEx35STNiZ5i1dRrjQd_fTNJJ6fNEaUt_v3SX7jsypYV90vJne0aqVvPF0GBlAoXacp_KkIsHfp-7TwgzfQ6O_uN)**

Thank you for your support. Together, we can make a difference.

Sincerely,

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1e580a26dc734db2a4201fa574957b75&_e=6cvMvEhKzj6HuBNDaopjvyquDlx2PByQkD2OInr0lIBv0HvEDBQFX1j4AqZTooF0y4fR01LdzC2wh4NmNdBqNVoRCmXIhge4yIZL46evpWSryQ0munNqXsJAP2BRkDzQiPpc7C6JiSboY9rcXWV3-kZwwbdDZPM8bKatJ9yWO4x65CYv9p3RDGWNyj_9ixQZg4iEEVBR_ugNr6fahmkSK7ueJKDhQZiGlDVIvXesD1UdNc86GZTTZs8SO5K0qkYTLRWWuzrNGspLGrgF-Iz6VTiaX2QKtsUBvYNBgIApgK2N2amoMVuN6JyWQvO2vdi4EeROj-Nm8xHmHg6f2KEdURT7YEqLMXv0ViGwdrO82IgGlSM-EgUyoqUUPZ4yHy_4)
Vivek Ramaswamy

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Don Lemon was WRONG on this. | | Peter, Things got a little heated on CNN. While debating post Civil War history, Don Lemon preposterously claimed that "black people still aren't allowed to enjoy their freedoms." That's an insult to the progress we've made over the last 160 years. His comments embody what's wrong with the dialogue about race in America. I told him so without apology. My exchange with Don Lemon and CNN that has sparked controversy and anger from some in the mainstream media. I spoke passionately about the importance of the Second Amendment and the need for civil discourse in our country. I stand by my words, but of course, some in the media have chosen to twist them and attack me. I refuse to back down, Peter. I believe that we need to have honest, open discussions about the issues that matter most to Americans. That's why I am running for office. That's why I am working every day to make sure I have a prime spot on the debate stage in August. In order to continue my campaign and fight for the values and principles that set this country into motion, I need your support. I can't do it alone. Thank you for your support. Together, we can make a difference. Sincerely, Vivek Ramaswamy P.S. I am committed to bringing fresh radical ideas to the table that will help put America back on track. But I can't do it without your support. | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

name: Geoff Simpson
subject: What it takes to recruit a candidate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Hi Peter, it's
Geoff here, Campaigns Director at Justice Democrats.

Last cycle, we spoke with 3,990 local leaders about our races and vetted
1,653 potential candidates to ensure we backed the best possible leaders.

We're now targeting in on a group of five incumbents, all of whom are
corporate Democrats supported by corporate PACs, and are out of touch with
their districts and falling short of standing up for the progressive
values we believe in like Medicare for All and a Green New Deal.

But in complete transparency, we’re currently in a tough spot for our
fundraising and if we don’t turn things around soon our team is going to
be looking at where to make cuts in our budget.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134036?refcode=em20230421-28594&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=28594%2E1203867%2Egx1Jl7 ]Will you rush a $3 contribution right now to ensure we
have the resources to carry out our plans to challenge corporate-backed
incumbents this 2024 cycle? Taking on the establishment takes major
resources and we need every JD supporter to chip in.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134036?refcode=em20230421-28594&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=28594%2E1203867%2Egx1Jl7 ]Contribute $3

I deeply appreciate everything you’re doing to support our work to recruit
and elect more progressive leaders like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez.

Thank you so much,

Geoffrey Simpson
Campaigns Director

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1021&akid=28594%2E1203867%2Egx1Jl7 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1022&akid=28594%2E1203867%2Egx1Jl7 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230421-28594-footer&t=1023&refcode2=28594_1203867_gx1Jl7&akid=28594%2E1203867%2Egx1Jl7

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=28594%2E1203867%2Egx1Jl7

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932

| Peter,

We know the 2024 election seems far off, so we wanted to give you an insider’s look at what we’re up to and why your early investment in our campaign matters.

Every cycle, VA-07 shapes up to be one of the closest races in the country. And Abigail’s wins in 2018, 2020, and 2022 were made possible by the intense work our team and our supporters have done from day one.

We reach out to voters to talk about the important work Abigail is leading in Congress – from banning Members of Congress from trading stock to looking out for our community’s farmers. We build our campaign team early so we’re ready to hit the ground running before the cycle is in full swing. And we invest in advertising to protect Abigail and speak truth to Republican attacks.

The only reason we’re able to begin these important preparations is [_**because of early investment from supporters like you. subject: 10 Days Left for Early Bird Pricing
body:
Register to reserve your spot at this year's Mackinac Republican Leadership Conference today! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bbfaca5ef404/10-days-left-for-early-bird-pricing?e=a2af77507c)
---
| |
---
| |
Dear [Name], I hope this email finds you well. A few days ago we announced the 35th Biennial Mackinac Republican Leadership Conference. I would like to personally invite you to join us for this historic event. For only 10 more days, we are offering early bird registration pricing for the conference at a discounted rate of $125. This is a fantastic opportunity for you to reserve your spot and take advantage of this limited-time offer. Don't miss out on this chance to be a part of an inspiring event that is sure to fire up Michigan as we look ahead to the 2024 election cycle. This year's conference will be packed with national speakers who will inspire you and provide insights into the future of our party and our country. I am very excited to announce that this year's conference theme is "The Party of the Constitution." It is a reminder of our values and our commitment to upholding the principles that have made America great. To register for the conference, please visit [https://migop.org/mackinac#Registration](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=6e09474f8d&e=a2af77507c). I encourage you to register soon to get the early bird pricing and reserve your spot at this exciting event. Through our website, you can also reserve your room at the beautiful and historic Grand Hotel to be at the center of all the action. Thank you for your continued support. I look forward to seeing you at the conference. In Liberty, Kristina Karamo Chairwoman, Michigan Republican Party

name: Dan Goldman
subject: Jim Jordan + MTG
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, This week was filled with yet more politicized hearings featuring Jim Jordan and Marjorie Taylor Greene, who together have taken over control of House Republicans. On Monday, I joined the Judiciary Committee for Jim Jordan’s “field hearing” in my district. As expected, this sham hearing was nothing more than a thinly-veiled political stunt to attack Manhattan DA Alvin Bragg and New York City at the behest of Donald Trump in an effort to provide taxpayer-funded legal defense services. On Wednesday, DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas appeared before the Homeland Security Committee ostensibly to discuss the Department’s budget requests. But the Republicans were solely interested in personally insulting and attacking Secretary Mayorkas, culminating in Marjorie Taylor Greene calling him a “liar,” which prompted me to get her removed from the hearing. **[These partisan “hearings” are just the latest example of Republicans weaponizing Congress for political gain, and we’re doing everything we can to push back. Please consider chipping in to help us do that.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62132650/402407116/-1870433910?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230421_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzZmYTFhYi04YmUwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A9CmNI-SSNb3BqnSXqjmEDjz1-MrWEqrVirradcknIA=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62132651/402407117/-1870433910?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230421_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzZmYTFhYi04YmUwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A9CmNI-SSNb3BqnSXqjmEDjz1-MrWEqrVirradcknIA=)

---

**The Judiciary Committee “Field Hearing”**
Since Donald Trump signaled he would get indicted, Jim Jordan has led an all-out attack on Manhattan DA Bragg reportedly at the direction of Donald Trump.
Yet the Republicans never once mentioned Donald Trump’s name and instead pretended to care about crime in New York City (which is going down).
So why didn’t they mention Trump if the hearing was so obviously part of their taxpayer-funded effort to help his legal defense team?
The answer is a somewhat technical legal reason. **It is a gross abuse of power — and illegal — for Congress to use its official authority for political reasons, such as to support Donald Trump, a private citizen.**
So if Trump did in fact direct MAGA Republicans to initiate this investigation to help his legal defense — as multiple reports indicate — then this investigation is illegal and must cease immediately.
Jim Jordan is now scrambling to manufacture a legitimate, after-the-fact explanation to support his investigation.
But Donald Trump wasn’t the only elephant in the room. So was gun violence, which was not mentioned by any Republicans either.
The biggest source of violent crime in Manhattan — and across the country — is from guns. This should be no surprise to Republicans, who continue to block common-sense gun safety legislation while more and more mass shootings continue to violently rip apart communities and cause horrific, preventable tragedies.
**For my part, I spent my limited time highlighting the Republicans’ antisemitic attacks using George Soros, including this sign that was waiting for all of us when we entered the building on Monday, which even a Jewish Republican witness acknowledged was 100% antisemitic.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62132664/402407128/-1870433910?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230421_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzZmYTFhYi04YmUwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A9CmNI-SSNb3BqnSXqjmEDjz1-MrWEqrVirradcknIA=)
Peter, I’m not explaining all of this as a “gotcha” to Republicans, but it is the reality we deal with in a Republican-controlled House. At the end of the day, the only thing this hearing amounted to is a damn shame.
I want to have real discussions about criminal justice reform and pass laws to improve public safety. I want to end the gun violence epidemic that is now the leading cause of death for American children. But we lack honest brokers on the other side, and as a result, more lives will be lost.
**I’m willing to sit down with anyone who wants to discuss these issues seriously and thoughtfully. But if Republicans continue to weaponize Congress for cheap political stunts like this one, we won’t accomplish anything.**

* * *

**Homeland Security Hearing**
You may have seen that Marjorie Taylor Greene was removed from the budget hearing with Homeland Security Secretary Mayorkas after I pointed out that her violation of House rules resulted in her being unable to speak anymore in the hearing.
This kind of behavior is embarrassing and disqualifying for a member of Congress. But of course, Kevin McCarthy only secured the speakership by conceding to MTG’s demands — so she won’t be going anywhere under his watch.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62132667/402407129/-1870433910?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230421_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzZmYTFhYi04YmUwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A9CmNI-SSNb3BqnSXqjmEDjz1-MrWEqrVirradcknIA=)
But she was not the only one hurling ad hominem insults at Secretary Mayorkas. Numerous Republicans had no interest in asking questions but instead spent their time attacking him and trying to lay the foundation for his impeachment.
**Well, I have a little experience with impeachment, and I can assure that there is absolutely no basis to even mention the idea of impeachment in connection with Secretary Mayorkas** , who is doing a valiant job with a broken immigration system that needs congressional action to correct.
**[Peter, your support will help me continue resisting Republican attacks so we can flip the House. If you’re able, please add a donation of any amount today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62132669/402407131/-1870433910?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230421_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzZmYTFhYi04YmUwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A9CmNI-SSNb3BqnSXqjmEDjz1-MrWEqrVirradcknIA=)**
With appreciation,
Dan
Dan Goldman for New York

clean_body: | Peter, This week was filled with yet more politicized hearings featuring Jim Jordan and Marjorie Taylor Greene, who together have taken over control of House Republicans. On Monday, I joined the Judiciary Committee for Jim Jordan’s “field hearing” in my district. As expected, this sham hearing was nothing more than a thinly-veiled political stunt to attack Manhattan DA Alvin Bragg and New York City at the behest of Donald Trump in an effort to provide taxpayer-funded legal defense services. On Wednesday, DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas appeared before the Homeland Security Committee ostensibly to discuss the Department’s budget requests. But the Republicans were solely interested in personally insulting and attacking Secretary Mayorkas, culminating in Marjorie Taylor Greene calling him a “liar,” which prompted me to get her removed from the hearing. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = The Judiciary Committee “Field Hearing” Since Donald Trump signaled he would get indicted, Jim Jordan has led an all-out attack on Manhattan DA Bragg reportedly at the direction of Donald Trump. Yet the Republicans never once mentioned Donald Trump’s name and instead pretended to care about crime in New York City (which is going down). So why didn’t they mention Trump if the hearing was so obviously part of their taxpayer-funded effort to help his legal defense team? The answer is a somewhat technical legal reason. It is a gross abuse of power — and illegal — for Congress to use its official authority for political reasons, such as to support Donald Trump, a private citizen. So if Trump did in fact direct MAGA Republicans to initiate this investigation to help his legal defense — as multiple reports indicate — then this investigation is illegal and must cease immediately. Jim Jordan is now scrambling to manufacture a legitimate, after-the-fact explanation to support his investigation. But Donald Trump wasn’t the only elephant in the room. So was gun violence, which was not mentioned by any Republicans either. The biggest source of violent crime in Manhattan — and across the country — is from guns. This should be no surprise to Republicans, who continue to block common-sense gun safety legislation while more and more mass shootings continue to violently rip apart communities and cause horrific, preventable tragedies. For my part, I spent my limited time highlighting the Republicans’ antisemitic attacks using George Soros, including this sign that was waiting for all of us when we entered the building on Monday, which even a Jewish Republican witness acknowledged was 100% antisemitic. = Peter, I’m not explaining all of this as a “gotcha” to Republicans, but it is the reality we deal with in a Republican-controlled House. At the end of the day, the only thing this hearing amounted to is a damn shame. I want to have real discussions about criminal justice reform and pass laws to improve public safety. I want to end the gun violence epidemic that is now the leading cause of death for American children. But we lack honest brokers on the other side, and as a result, more lives will be lost. I’m willing to sit down with anyone who wants to discuss these issues seriously and thoughtfully. But if Republicans continue to weaponize Congress for cheap political stunts like this one, we won’t accomplish anything. Homeland Security Hearing You may have seen that Marjorie Taylor Greene was removed from the budget hearing with Homeland Security Secretary Mayorkas after I pointed out that her violation of House rules resulted in her being unable to speak anymore in the hearing. This kind of behavior is embarrassing and disqualifying for a member of Congress. But of course, Kevin McCarthy only secured the speakership by conceding to MTG’s demands — so she won’t be going anywhere under his watch. = But she was not the only one hurling ad hominem insults at Secretary Mayorkas. Numerous Republicans had no interest in asking questions but instead spent their time attacking him and trying to lay the foundation for his impeachment. Well, I have a little experience with impeachment, and I can assure that there is absolutely no basis to even mention the idea of impeachment in connection with Secretary Mayorkas , who is doing a valiant job with a broken immigration system that needs congressional action to correct. = With appreciation, Dan Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

name: Robert Garcia
subject: Trans kids deserve to live authentically and participate with other kids who they identify with.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62133283/402407733/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWYyZTg2MS04Y2UwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mGxp46RkQrb1T7-kne7MKApR4Z_zd_6OzWjBOLZmEzA=)
Hi friend —
Yesterday, House Republicans passed a bill to bar trans women and girls from competing on female sports teams in school.
This ban is a clear violation of Title IX. Knowing very well that this bill has no chance of being passed in the Senate or being signed by President Biden, Kevin McCarthy still chose to bring this bill to the House floor for a vote, just to make a political statement.
And that political statement is one of discrimination. These kids are being bullied.
These kinds of bills fuel hatred against transgender children in schools around the country — further putting a community of already vulnerable children at more risk of bullying, depression, and suicide. Trans kids and youth deserve to live authentically and participate with other kids who they identify with.
The truth is, extremists in the House are hell-bent on attacking trans kids for their own political gain. They are trying to put on a facade that they want to be “pro-women," but they don’t give a damn about women or girls. If they did care, they would ban assault weapons, invest in gun violence prevention, and protect access to safe abortions — actions that would actually protect women and girls from danger.
In Congress, I have already made the safety and rights of LGBTQ+ people around the world a personal priority through my bill, _The International Human Rights Defense Act_. And I promise I’ll continue to do everything in my power to push back against these gross discriminatory assaults against trans Americans.
There’s no doubt I’m making enemies for myself with the extreme far-right. So I need to be ready for whatever smears and attacks they throw at me.
[**If you support my work in Congress, please make a contribution to my campaign to continue fueling our movement and to help Democrats regain the House majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62133284/402407734/28553130?refcode2=51f2e861-8ce0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&refcode=em230421-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWYyZTg2MS04Y2UwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mGxp46RkQrb1T7-kne7MKApR4Z_zd_6OzWjBOLZmEzA=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62133285/402407735/28553130?refcode2=51f2e861-8ce0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&refcode=em230421-1-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWYyZTg2MS04Y2UwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mGxp46RkQrb1T7-kne7MKApR4Z_zd_6OzWjBOLZmEzA=)**
Every donation is an act of hope and defiance. It says you stand with the LGBTQ+ community and puts us that much closer to stopping these hateful attacks against trans Americans.
Thank you for being a part of this team.
\- Robert Garcia

In Congress, I have already made the safety and rights of LGBTQ+ people around the world a personal priority through my bill, The International Human Rights Defense Act. And I promise I’ll continue to do everything in my power to push back against these gross discriminatory assaults against trans Americans. There’s no doubt I’m making enemies for myself with the extreme far-right. So I need to be ready for whatever smears and attacks they throw at me. = = Every donation is an act of hope and defiance. It says you stand with the LGBTQ+ community and puts us that much closer to stopping these hateful attacks against trans Americans. Thank you for being a part of this team. \- Robert Garcia * Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress Robert Garcia for Congress 65 Pine Ave #348 Long Beach, CA 90802 United States This email was sent to . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click to unsubscribe.

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Here is what the Earth Day buzz is about
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | Friend, do you think greedy corporations should be allowed to DESTROY our food system and planet for profit? We don't either. But right now, **the pesticide industry's profit-hungry tactics are putting our precious bees at EXTREME RISK. Skyrocketing bee deaths could soon threaten our food supply, which means some of our most nutritious foods could soon be scarce and expensive. MILLIONS of families could be priced out of essential foods -- unless we fight back now!** **And to make matters worse, pesticide companies and Big Ag are STILL contaminating our environment with chemicals that are TOXIC to bees.** These neurotoxic pesticides -- called neonics -- cause major neurological damage to our tiny pollinators. Even in small doses, neonics severely damage bees' ability to communicate, reproduce, fight pests and disease, and forage for food. **In higher doses, bees just don't stand a chance! **
[](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1733446?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) Neonics are the most widely used insecticides in the world. **But here's the bombshell truth: Studies show little to NO BENEFIT to crop yields for neonic seed coatings on soybeans -- one of their biggest uses! **What's more, neonics can damage soil health, worsen harmful pest problems and contribute to MASSIVE bee die-offs. Ecological methods like organic farming can save precious bees and protect our food security.**But the pesticide industry is doing everything it can to BLOCK bee-saving policies and sway public opinion AGAINST these crucial alternatives.** We need your urgent help to fight back! **Right now, a group of generous donors is matching all gifts up to our $180,000 Earth Day goal, so we can protect precious bees, stop the pesticide corporations from contaminating our ecosystem for profit and protect our planet for generations to come. But this rare match EXPIRES AT MIDNIGHT TOMORROW, and we're falling behind on our critical goal! ** **We need 28 more gifts from supporters in your area to stay on track for our Earth Day goal. So please: ** [**Will you make a membership gift of $27 or more now -- while $27 becomes $54! -- to help Friends of the Earth protect precious pollinators, hold Big Polluters accountable, and achieve a healthy, sustainable future for our planet?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1733447?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [$27 donation + $27 match = $54 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1733448?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

body:
“Acknowledging mental illness doesn’t make you weak, it makes you human.”

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62135379/402409164/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzQ4ZjQ5OS04ZWUwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r2qj_olbvbKirX6Ue_utrHexFgFn10MGda9pwzaP-zU=&emci=aeeb45b4-a2df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=9748f499-8ee0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) | _"__Acknowledging mental illness doesn’t make you weak, it makes you human. When we speak openly about it, we give others permission and courage to also speak openly and to promote healing. ”_ **_-Becca Balint, The Hill_** Peter, Becca just introduced a powerful piece of mental health legislation – her first bill as a member of Congress. **At a time when mental health challenges for kids and teens are at an all-time high, she is putting forward innovative, data-driven solutions to help empower young people to tackle issues related to mental health in their friend groups, communities, and schools.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62135380/402409165/851750597?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzQ4ZjQ5OS04ZWUwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r2qj_olbvbKirX6Ue_utrHexFgFn10MGda9pwzaP-zU=&emci=aeeb45b4-a2df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=9748f499-8ee0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) [_**Take a moment to read Becca’s latest op-ed in _The Hill_ explaining her personal experience with mental health challenges, the details of this bill, and how we can give young Americans the tools they need to navigate through the ongoing mental health crisis.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62135381/402409166/851750597?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzQ4ZjQ5OS04ZWUwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r2qj_olbvbKirX6Ue_utrHexFgFn10MGda9pwzaP-zU=&emci=aeeb45b4-a2df-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=9748f499-8ee0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) One of Becca’s promises on the campaign trail was to change the conversation around mental health in Congress. This legislation proves that Becca is ready to make-good on that promise. \- Team Becca

name: Team Cori
subject: Then and now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
The urgent need for Court reform extends well beyond Clarence Thomas.
#
Peter,
Justice Thomas shouldn't hold public office, given his history of sexual harrassment and abuse. Even further, he has disgraced the integrity of the Supreme Court with his complete disregard for ethical standards.
That's why this week, Cori became the first member of the House Judiciary Committee to call for Clarence Thomas' impeachment.
And right now, there's a movement rising to kick him off the Supreme Court and bring much-needed changes to restore trust in an already illegitimate Court.
[](https://act.coribush.org/go/1822?t=1&akid=2559%2E1082990%2E9qdm39)
[**To keep up our work to hold Clarence Thomas accountable and continue to push for Court reform, we need you with us. Will you chip in $5 to power our work?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230421.vE54tv&refcode=em20230421-2559&t=2&akid=2559%2E1082990%2E9qdm39)
**The urgent need for Court reform extends well beyond Clarence Thomas.**
In order to protect our democracy. To safeguard our most basic rights and freedoms. To advance true justice for all. **We must reform the Supreme Court.**
**No one is above the law** and as such anyone who so egregiously violates the law must be held accountable including Justice Thomas. Our progressive movement will continue to push for court and criminal justice reform that will instill credibility in an illegitimate institution.
[**Can you chip in today to power our fight for a fair and ethical Supreme Court?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230421.vE54tv&refcode=em20230421-2559&t=3&akid=2559%2E1082990%2E9qdm39)
**[Chip In](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230421.vE54tv&amount=5&refcode=em20230421-2559&t=22&akid=2559%2E1082990%2E9qdm39)**
In solidarity,
Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230421?refcode=em20230421-2559-footer&t=23&refcode2=2559_1082990_9qdm39&akid=2559%2E1082990%2E9qdm39) **

subject: What is the Green New Deal?

body:
[1]Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

[ https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/13647?t=1001&akid=4206%2E2526796%2EusRN9J ]This Earth Day, Get to know the Green New Deal [ https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/13647?t=1002&akid=4206%2E2526796%2EusRN9J ]Alexandria just
reintroduced the Green New Deal resolution in Congress! The Green New Deal is
our solution for addressing climate change and increasing economic security for
working families and other communities that have been left behind. Our focused
is on ending our reliance on fossil fiels and eliminating carbon emissions while
creating at least 10 million high-wage, union jobs. [ https://youtu.be/3xtf9QE-lME?t=90 ]A resolution, not a bill
[ https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/13647?t=1003&akid=4206%2E2526796%2EusRN9J ]The GND has 5 main goals: Achieve net-zero greenhouse gas emissions, create
millions of high wage jobs and ensure prosperity and ecomomic security, invest
in the American infrastructure and industry to meet the needs of the 21st
century, ensure clean air and water, healthy food, access to nature, and a
sustainable environment for all, create just and equitable social and economic
systems that care for our frontline and vulnerable communities. [ https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/18127?t=1004&akid=4206%2E2526796%2EusRN9J ]When the GND
was first introduced four years ago, it was called 'unrealistic.' But since
then, we've made a lot of progress: Last year, Congress made the biggest federal
investment ever – $369 billion — to fight climate change through the Inflation
Reduction Act. AOC and Senator Markey developed a Green New Deal Implementation
Guide to help show communities and organizers how to get federan money for GND
investments. We secured another $100 million for 60 different local Green New
Deal projects, stretching from Hawaii to Vermont. Our allies in Congress
introduced 12 companion bills that apply the GND principles of jobs, justice,
and climate to everything from agriculture to electric vehicles. Last Congress,
more than half of Democrats sponsored a GND bill. [ https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/13647?t=1005&akid=4206%2E2526796%2EusRN9J ]In NY-14, this includes
funding for the Coastal Preservation Network to stabilize waterfront access
platforms on Flushing Bay, and funding for SUNY Martime College's job training
programs in offshore wind. [ https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/13647?t=1006&akid=4206%2E2526796%2EusRN9J ]In NY-14, this includes funding for the Coastal
Preservation Network to stabilize waterfront access platforms on Flushing Bay,
and funding for SUNY Martime College's job training programs in offshore wind
[ https://youtu.be/3qu6aC2PkAk?t=99 ]Video of AOC explaining the Green New Deal resolution. [ https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/13647?t=1007&akid=4206%2E2526796%2EusRN9J ]We each play a
role. [ https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/13647?t=1008&akid=4206%2E2526796%2EusRN9J ]Visit https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/13647?t=1009&akid=4206%2E2526796%2EusRN9J [ https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/13647?t=1010&akid=4206%2E2526796%2EusRN9J ]Individually,
these project are great for each community, and when you look at them as a
whole, you begin to see the foundations for a federal Green New Deal.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Thank you for reading.

[ https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230421.K6_pcm&refcode=em20230421-4206-P_ENG_EXP_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1011&akid=4206%2E2526796%2EusRN9J ]Chip in to help us build the movement for a Green New Deal →

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ocasiocortez.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-old/?akid=4206%2E2526796%2EusRN9J

PAID FOR BY ALEXANDRIA OCASIO-CORTEZ FOR CONGRESS

name: Julia DeGraw
subject: Fwd: Friend - we need the Right to Repair
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters
body:
| | | Hi Peter, The Right to Repair bill is part of the Zero Waste Package, one of our 2023 Priorities for a Healthy Oregon, and it’s scheduled for a vote in the Senate on Monday. **[Please write to your state senator today asking them to support the Right to Repair bill.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62136464/402409715/-30466268?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdjZWVjODg1LThmZTAtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=D3coi81OfUTznJ_00KNEngYXn2YroDl76jB_g-jnRw4=&emci=8e6a5c9f-81e0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=7ceec885-8fe0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** With the Right to Repair, all Oregonians would be able to access repair services without having to ship out their electronics to the select few authorized repair providers, who are mostly in urban areas. Having more repair providers can save us money on repairs, allow us to use our devices for longer, and reduce the amount of electronic waste we produce. **[Will you write to your state senator today urging them to vote YES on SB 542?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62136465/402409716/-30466268?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdjZWVjODg1LThmZTAtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=D3coi81OfUTznJ_00KNEngYXn2YroDl76jB_g-jnRw4=&emci=8e6a5c9f-81e0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=7ceec885-8fe0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** Sincerely, Julia DeGraw
Coalition Director, OLCV [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62136467/402409717/2045316182?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdjZWVjODg1LThmZTAtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=D3coi81OfUTznJ_00KNEngYXn2YroDl76jB_g-jnRw4=&emci=8e6a5c9f-81e0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=7ceec885-8fe0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) Hello Peter, The Senate will soon be voting on one of the bills in our Zero Waste Package priority, the Right to Repair bill (SB 542). If the bill passes, companies would be required to make the tools needed to repair our stuff available without having to become an authorized repair provider. This means that **we would be given more options for repairing our devices, which can reduce waste and save money. ** **[Will you write to your state senator today urging them to vote YES on SB 542?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62136468/402409718/-30466268?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdjZWVjODg1LThmZTAtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=D3coi81OfUTznJ_00KNEngYXn2YroDl76jB_g-jnRw4=&emci=8e6a5c9f-81e0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=7ceec885-8fe0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** Have you ever purchased a new phone or electronic device because your old one isn’t functioning as well and it would cost around the same to repair, if not more? You’re not alone, and it’s designed to be this way. The makers of our devices are in the business of selling us their new stuff every year, and they make it difficult for us to repair our devices after we purchase them. Some companies design products without the parts necessary to fix a component, or they make repairs exclusive so that only they can do the repairs—all so they can make a profit and create a monopoly on repairs. The result? Replacing our devices nonstop and a ton of electronic waste. In our state, an estimated 4,800 cellphones are disposed of every day on average. Cellphones thrown away and other electronic waste is difficult to recycle, toxic to human health and the environment, and contains non-renewable rare earth minerals that are mined at an unsustainable rate. As such, electronic waste is the fastest growing waste stream in the world. As this waste breaks down, heavy metals can contaminate the soil and groundwater. And when the electronic waste gets incinerated at a landfill, it can release harmful substances into the air, which may create health problems for essential workers and surrounding communities. But with the Right to Repair, we can change this. **Passing SB 542 gives us the freedom to repair our stuff wherever so that we can get more use out of our electronic devices and reduce electronic waste.** **[Please write to your state senator today asking them to support the Right to Repair bill.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62136469/402409719/-30466268?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdjZWVjODg1LThmZTAtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=D3coi81OfUTznJ_00KNEngYXn2YroDl76jB_g-jnRw4=&emci=8e6a5c9f-81e0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=7ceec885-8fe0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** Thank you for taking action, Julia DeGraw
Coalition Director, OLCV | |
---|---|---

name: CaucusRoom
subject: Biden Will Punish People with Good Credit
body:
What You Need to Know Today No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-quimtt-trhiujldw-yh/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quimtt-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Friday! **
[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quimtt-trhiujldw-y/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quimtt-trhiujldw-j/) **This is Election Interference!** [**A former CIA official testified that then-Biden campaign senior advisor, now-Secretary of State Antony Blinken "played a role in the inception" of the public statement signed by current and past intelligence officials**](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quimtt-trhiujldw-t/) that claimed the Hunter Biden laptop was part of Russian disinformation. **Into to Socialism** A new Biden administration rule set to take effect on May 1st **[will force good credit home buyers to pay more for their mortgage to subsidize loans for high-risk borrowers.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quimtt-trhiujldw-i/)** **Bloated Budget** Remember that fat IRS budget of $80 Billion? **[Now they are asking for $1.8 Billion more.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quimtt-trhiujldw-d/)** **Bragg Can't Block** A federal judge ruled that House Judiciary Committee Republicans**[can question a former Manhattan prosecutor about the criminal case against former President Trump](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quimtt-trhiujldw-h/), **saying Manhattan District Attorney Alvin Bragg does not have a legal basis to block the congressional subpoena. **Protecting Women's Sports** The House**[passed legislation aimed at preventing biological males from competing as transgender athletes in girls' and women's sports](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quimtt-trhiujldw-k/) **at schools across the country. What do you think the chances are that **[this reporter gets fired](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quimtt-trhiujldw-u/)** for supporting the legislation?

**Anheuser-Busch in Hot Water** Allegations have emerged that Bud Light's parent company, Anheuser-Busch, **[discriminated against men, whites, and Asian-Americans in its employment practices](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quimtt-trhiujldw-o/).** **Weighty Problem** WOW! This week's **[collapse](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quimtt-trhiujldw-x/)** of a parking garage **[has raised concerns about electric cars that no one has considered.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quimtt-trhiujldw-m/)** **Up in Smoke** Elon Musk's **[SpaceX's $3 Billion Starship exploded](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quimtt-trhiujldw-c/)** into a ball of fire on 4/20 during its second failed orbital launch in a week. **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quimtt-trhiujldw-q/)!**
* **[Six](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quimtt-trhiujldw-a/)** more months.
* Weekend **[pass](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quimtt-trhiujldw-f/)**.
* I identify as **[skinny](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quimtt-trhiujldw-z/).**

**[We are looking for your feedback](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-quimtt-trhiujldw-v/)** to understand your first impression of our messaging. | [ ](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=f6885d62c6b642efb059661981567b85&_e=Xj_i80cmzvuwx1fQPc5UdBW-3bHE9Xqaf_qW022ixygLJhTi72SjBWrBVhxPlnsP4Ys_-CiMwyiDpG0YQEHjWWT6VDYWKCeqpdGFdwSeW8D-JETqKpbyZF7WaB3f0wnAlLso23XHlU0PvlMXMUTzKrm9e74Dj_S25Ap-KAh1yX5ssjRXhrbGdMyTdX3RvudxHGSnXKIyJvxCkVNFUfueUx_NN8AtcITUqc3b55xH_8gs9lno1FPYa1h8vwSv2vyp_MeSrr3r4XM8tXUzjEOtftGxCjx8alDP2jchy4OpPqG5JNjHwEEj6e1gZq9j5lQDiJ_egRNCbu2oqx3kmWSz78zQW1stVylBND_eNx-57X9tOD-qH-dRTxZFW3QuFoAv51_wm5nFsta-ypyWoJNy23HGBjjLRivEfWNMQ9B7nw-Pzr3812KRuXty_AAGKCBQvWCBNAQivKEZAIz8Lp_V1At_PeXcA5hDyPDzkzMI2IsvLct-ilRe2COMhETc-Ojkx668wsHK9mn2269WHonQYzKfQzLljrf-eXN0DBTxmtE%3D)

** "Democracy is worth dying for, because it's the most deeply honorable form of government ever devised by man."

-Ronald Reagan **
Friend,

Many don't remember the grandeur and prosperity this nation enjoyed under President Reagan.

**Now that we have the privilege of hindsight, it 's sad to see how far this country has fallen. [We need to look back on the past and try to understand how we can do better in the present.](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=466e7d13494a4a118257c46c5d91d8cf&_e=3--QTCfeOGFyqbz_T9NPlUSXB7N_AXBJ3taf2_z1ZSpDd9kcVas-1DkavMhdJDchz-hVHmTb_GdMFzTmACwALw9By_49wH9wP-vDMH9twEdxhtMCO5tGpVQjKPtNONX18lUq9BWf-oVovzj7qwrTG52ScQKwJ0SPshYMibemEoH3QNDQtXccDoUury7HIB5_l1D4C_OYZ9SBxnsU44mYI4k0f1c-lFGuQY1G-_NIu5RRhrue-cVCa2LdeHxTWzUF47WxSm6eF0Onb9ypq5Ulsa60a1J3PjrDOCgkObNpr09V8st_tjIVycn457YoXX-qIp9JAxsrOfZQdR8Ehfb-9Q0PdUtF3QpN2AVZk0q4kLgxStgQbvM7Yleu_ZsEb7EVafoLhaWMsiYO4sexqtxYThKPGSLaLHUpl9JIb8zsATPDUwLckC99REvRleWwu_AgP0BLPYMTk3jooL_cDDStIgXRc7EGkudXQ4RK1lTMh2iqKHO-JzXarl59qFX-Q5v3) **

There's no question about it -- our Democracy isn't something to be taken for granted, it's an institution we have to respect, and uphold by any means necessary. Every single day, radicals marginalize common-sense-minded conservatives, undermine the rule of law and threaten the cause of freedom.

**It 's time for us to make our stand** -- we will let the whole country know that in these trying times, we won't lose our heads. [**Together, we will thrive in adversity and restore this nation to greatness.**](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=466e7d13494a4a118257c46c5d91d8cf&_e=3--QTCfeOGFyqbz_T9NPlUSXB7N_AXBJ3taf2_z1ZSpDd9kcVas-1DkavMhdJDchz-hVHmTb_GdMFzTmACwALw9By_49wH9wP-vDMH9twEdxhtMCO5tGpVQjKPtNONX18lUq9BWf-oVovzj7qwrTG52ScQKwJ0SPshYMibemEoH3QNDQtXccDoUury7HIB5_l1D4C_OYZ9SBxnsU44mYI4k0f1c-lFGuQY1G-_NIu5RRhrue-cVCa2LdeHxTWzUF47WxSm6eF0Onb9ypq5Ulsa60a1J3PjrDOCgkObNpr09V8st_tjIVycn457YoXX-qIp9JAxsrOfZQdR8Ehfb-9Q0PdUtF3QpN2AVZk0q4kLgV6M80-Lnx2GOIL4u9W-qnkNSyFP3MJt3OQyWd2mJ545FGgJSjDwTQY0O8ZIMsMJYLEs65cF8ZzGvXGhq0YcZzDAwgUz4UX6DRbLKeZiiZ8x1GCK_gqHSTP2MJcFaWgnW5LO2ApBWjBIn4hJ8e_2iU)

clean_body: How far have we fallen? | "Democracy is worth dying for, because it's the most deeply honorable form of government ever devised by man." -Ronald Reagan Friend, Many don't remember the grandeur and prosperity this nation enjoyed under President Reagan. Now that we have the privilege of hindsight, it 's sad to see how far this country has fallen. There's no question about it -- our Democracy isn't something to be taken for granted, it's an institution we have to respect, and uphold by any means necessary. Every single day, radicals marginalize common-sense-minded conservatives, undermine the rule of law and threaten the cause of freedom. It 's time for us to make our stand -- we will let the whole country know that in these trying times, we won't lose our heads. | Best, Matt Dolan PAID FOR BY DOLAN FOR OHIO Not authorized by any other candidate.

body:
Peter, it’s time for us to stop putting guns before the well-being of our youth.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62136889/402410541/1508534521?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDFhNWZkOS04ZmUwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G60ef1k3F8mOnwUPH9biD1UiVwQe9qiSybtJYb_cvJ4=&emci=5bd0ff15-7ee0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f01a5fd9-8fe0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=799895)

| Peter,

Our youth are being stripped of their freedom to live without fear.

This week, 16-year-old Ralph Yarl was shot after ringing the wrong doorbell on his way to pick up his younger siblings.

Just days later, 20-year-old Karen Gills was shot and killed for pulling into the wrong driveway.

The string of shootings in the last week highlights two gut-wrenching realities in our country: the persistent racial biases against Black youth and our nation's obsession with guns.

And it's all being led by Republican fear-mongering and extremist pro-gun agenda.

**It's time for us to stop putting guns before the well-being of our youth. The time for common sense gun control is now.**

[_**Please join me in demanding common sense gun legislation by adding your name below.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62136891/402410543/-1807791496?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDFhNWZkOS04ZmUwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G60ef1k3F8mOnwUPH9biD1UiVwQe9qiSybtJYb_cvJ4=&emci=5bd0ff15-7ee0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f01a5fd9-8fe0-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=799895)

name: Stop Gun Violence PAC
subject: Our youth deserves a future free of gun violence.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stop Gun Violence PAC
body:
I hope you will stand with us as we work to fight back against the gun lobby and end our nation’s gun violence epidemic once and for all.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62136979/402410681/2040588333?refcode=BLU-SGV-20230421-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWIxYTVmZDktOGZlMC1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nGnabobqVek-Exer-p--6vMiEdXpA1ElJ_gi8EbbSX8=)
---
| Peter,

Republican “guns everywhere” policies and decades of fear-mongering are costing our youth their freedom and safety.

**This week, 16-year-old Ralph Yarl was shot after ringing the wrong doorbell. He sought help at three different households before collapsing.

Days later, 20-year-old Kaylin Gills was shot and killed after turning in to the wrong driveway.

And in the same week, Heather Roth and Payton Washington, both 18, were shot in Texas after getting into the wrong car.**

The Republican Party’s pro-gun agenda is prioritizing a deranged “guns everywhere” worldview over the rights of our kids. We can’t deprive the next generation of the right to live without fear.

**This has to stop.**

We founded Stop Gun Violence PAC to end the cycle of violence by supporting advocates who aren’t afraid to stand up to the NRA. We believe we can put an end to extremist gun culture and end gun violence.

We hope you will stand with us as we work to fight back against the gun lobby and end our nation’s gun violence epidemic once and for all.

Change starts with us.

Stop Gun Violence PAC
---

| | Hey there! It’s Emily from the Fair Fight Action team. As the Development Director, my job is to track our fundraising every day of the year so we can plan our investments and fund our programs to protect the freedom to vote. That means I get to see the small-dollar contributions we receive from emails like this one translate into tangible resources like volunteer training and voter education materials. But the not-so-fun part of my job is letting the team know when we’re tracking behind on our goals. **Most organizations won’t be this transparent with you, but we want to give you a behind-the-scenes look into our fundraising this month.** Those peaks in the bar graph are what we needed to raise every day in April in order to hit our goal. Unfortunately, we’ve been coming up short. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62137593/402411337/1086838932?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230421_f_behind_v1s3_f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGQyMTg0OC05MGUwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6_Kp8bz0CvNNxyFHnAHmKn1SEWGEGMCYOOexy65P7uk=) | [**DONATE TO GET US BACK ON TRACK**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62137596/402411338/1086838932?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230421_f_behind_v1s3_f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGQyMTg0OC05MGUwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6_Kp8bz0CvNNxyFHnAHmKn1SEWGEGMCYOOexy65P7uk=)
---
Now’s our moment to lay the groundwork to protect the freedom to vote in the next election cycle. Extremists have already introduced over 370 voter suppression bills in 47 states this year — and we need to make sure we have the resources now to fight back and ensure that these insidious efforts don’t impact the 2024 elections.
If we fall behind on this April goal, we might not be able to secure all the resources we need for the busy summer organizing months ahead — like volunteer training supplies, educational materials to combat voting disinformation, and online ads to raise awareness about everyone’s rights as a voter.
[**_We have 9 days left in April to get as close to our goal as possible and provide the resources we need to lay that groundwork. Will you rush a donation right away?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62137600/402411339/1086838932?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230421_f_behind_v1s3_f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGQyMTg0OC05MGUwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6_Kp8bz0CvNNxyFHnAHmKn1SEWGEGMCYOOexy65P7uk=)
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62137602/402411340/1086838932?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230421_f_behind_v1s3_f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGQyMTg0OC05MGUwLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6_Kp8bz0CvNNxyFHnAHmKn1SEWGEGMCYOOexy65P7uk=)
---
I definitely understand when supporters need to take a break from giving. We’re so thankful for everyone in this community, no matter how much or how often you give. And if you are in a place to make a contribution today — it will go a long, long way.
Thanks so much for all you do!
Emily
\--
Emily Laskar
Director of Development, Fair Fight Action

**Trump ally and Florida Congressman Matt Gaetz is hellbent on raising the eligibility age for receiving Social Security benefits, and he's not the only one.** GOP leaders have been threatening cuts to Social Security for YEARS.

American Bridge is dedicated to holding Republicans accountable. We won't let them get away with taking away essential programs from hardworking Americans while they lower taxes on their ultra-wealthy donors.

# ABOUT "THE LEAGUE"
---
The League was formed to bring back the law - both in the inalienable rights of defense and in enforcing the laws at all levels of government, protecting the good and removing the bad from our great society. The League represents sportsmen, hunters, law enforcement, and others who in the past have been the mainstay of our society. The League stands for the defense of our Constitutional Rights, our inalienable rights protected by the First Amendment, Second Amendment and the eight other amendments in our Bill of Rights.

A retired 14-year veteran of the Lynbrook Police Department in New York, Jim Fotis was injured in the line of duty and is the highest decorated officer in the Department's history. Now, Jim is dedicating his life to advocating for law enforcement and American values.

name: Zoe Lofgren
subject: For the first time in a long time...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LOFGREN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Friends: It’s Friday so I’ll be brief.

By now you know that Sam Liccardo is taking steps to run against me in this next election. For the first time in a long time, I have to really focus on raising funds for my own race.

It's not what I want to be doing right now — and I hate asking for help for myself — but there's no getting around it right now. We are quickly coming up against the month-end reporting deadline and still are a ways from where we need to be to stay on track.

If you can contribute anything today or this weekend to help, it'll go a long way to get us that much closer. I'd be very grateful — and I promise to put it to good use. Here is the link if you choose to help: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zl-fr-2304 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zl-fr-2304] .

Thanks for all you're doing.

Zoe
Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation, she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help. Click here to donate to Zoe’s campaign → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zlem?refcode=emfooter&amount=10&recurring=auto] PAID FOR BY LOFGREN FOR CONGRESS

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Earth Day: Early Custom Match Link for, Friend
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | | | [DOUBLE YOUR GIFT FOR THE NEXT 25 HOURS ONLY](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1733597?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Friend, Earth Day is tomorrow, but I wanted to let you know of this **special opportunity** so you can be one of the first to make the most of this important moment.
Big Oil and Big Polluters are destroying vulnerable species, our health, and our planet all for the sake of their own private profit, **some even launching disinformation campaigns to make us believe that it’s not a big deal.** But you and I are no fools, Friend -- we know what they are doing is extremely harmful, and if we don’t act now, it could be too late.
Iconic American species like gray wolves and grizzly bears are being slaughtered by trophy hunters, and oil, gas, and logging companies are attacking their ESA protections so they can devastate the wilderness they depend on. We are heading towards an “insect apocalypse,” with over 40% of pollinators in danger of disappearing off the face of the Earth, and over 700 bee species nearing extinction. And the last 73 Southern Resident orcas -- the only endangered killer whales in the U.S. -- are grieving and starving, one oil spill away from going extinct forever. And the planet is hurtling toward catastrophe -- but we have the power to stop it, together.
Friends of the Earth is part of the world's largest grassroots environmental network -- and the Earth has never needed a friend like you or us more. And what better day than Earth Day to fight back for our planet than by making a membership gift that will have twice the impact?
That's why this is such incredible news: A generous group of donors is matching every gift for Earth Day, up to our goal of $180,000. Because you've been such an essential supporter, **we created a custom match link you can use to be the FIRST to double your Earth Day impact** \-- so hurry and give now! Here's your link:
| [EARLY MATCH ACCESS FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1733597?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
This goal means so much to our organization and the planet -- and we chose you to be part of this select group for early match access because we know you recognize how high the stakes are. When you make your early bird donation, you'll be ensuring we can mobilize on the ground, keep pressure on legislators, and stop this climate crisis from getting worse.
Matches like this don't come often, and the stakes for our only Earth have never been higher. So we cannot get complacent -- and we know you won't let that happen. **But there are only a few hours until we open this match up to the rest of our community,** and we're counting on you to set the pace for them.
Tomorrow is huge for us -- which means it's huge for our planet. Please, be part of the solution that helps us end this crisis and save our Earth! Your personalized Earth Day match preview link is right here -- donate now to have every dollar doubled:
| [EARLY MATCH ACCESS FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1733597?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | [$27 donation + $27 match = $54 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1733598?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [$50 donation + $50 match = $100 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1733599?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [$100 donation + $100 match = $200 impact](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1733600?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
| | [Double another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1733601?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

Erich Pica,
