name: Mark Takano
subject: re: H.R. 734 (you need to know about this bill)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
How do Republican bigots sleep at night?

| Peter, this is urgent, and you need to pay attention. **House Republicans just passed H.R. 734, which is specifically targeting vulnerable transgender youth and banning them from participating in school sports.** I am continuously disgusted by the MAGA GOP's never-ending hateful actions. But this is a new low... taking aim at children?

Let me repeat that: This bill targets children.

So earlier this week, I proudly took the lead in speaking up against this atrocious legislation. And as I spoke, there was a sign behind me that read: | “53% of trans kids considered suicide last year. **I want them to LIVE”** — Utah Gov. Spencer Cox (R)
---
With trans kids being bullied in schools, assaulted in streets, and targeted in legislatures, it’s no wonder that so many trans youth and adults struggle with mental health. And Peter, it really is that simple.

But still, House Republicans are going out of the way to ADD to this harm by pushing forward this bigoted legislation.

Why?

Because _House Republicans have NO solutions_ to REAL problems that affect everyday working Americans. So, they attack marginalized and vulnerable communities to appeal to their most extremist bases.

**I know the GOP's playbook personally, Peter... I saw my Republican opponent in 1994 stoop as low as possible when he outed me as gay, against my will, to voters just before the election.**

But I didn't give up the fight then, and I'm not going to give up the fight for our childrens' rights now either.

[**Peter, I stand with trans youth and will fight back against these hateful attacks at every turn – will you chip in $7 to join my fight? clean_body: How do Republican bigots sleep at night? | Peter, this is urgent, and you need to pay attention. House Republicans just passed H.R. 734, which is specifically targeting vulnerable transgender youth and banning them from participating in school sports. I am continuously disgusted by the MAGA GOP's never-ending hateful actions. But this is a new low... taking aim at children? Let me repeat that: This bill targets children. So earlier this week, I proudly took the lead in speaking up against this atrocious legislation. And as I spoke, there was a sign behind me that read: | “53% of trans kids considered suicide last year. I want them to LIVE” — Utah Gov. Spencer Cox (R) With trans kids being bullied in schools, assaulted in streets, and targeted in legislatures, it’s no wonder that so many trans youth and adults struggle with mental health. And Peter, it really is that simple. But still, House Republicans are going out of the way to ADD to this harm by pushing forward this bigoted legislation. Why? Because House Republicans have NO solutions to REAL problems that affect everyday working Americans. So, they attack marginalized and vulnerable communities to appeal to their most extremist bases. I know the GOP's playbook personally, Peter... I saw my Republican opponent in 1994 stoop as low as possible when he outed me as gay, against my will, to voters just before the election. But I didn't give up the fight then, and I'm not going to give up the fight for our childrens' rights now either. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = As a gay man, the first gay person of color in Congress, and co-Chair of the LGBT Equality Caucus, my heart breaks for the trans youth who will suffer because of this bigoted bill. | Greetings! Dan Rowe with the Jane Fonda Climate PAC team here.

[_**First, can you please consider contributing $10 to support the Jane Fonda Climate PAC in our mission to elect leaders committed to combatting the climate crisis at its roots – fossil fuels?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62139534/402416751/931978131?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230421-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZiOTk0MzQzLTk5ZTAtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hzCTH1ucYJAn0dOCBp-re60Rpzr8CF_uEVS33jDyjiE=)

Despite growing awareness of climate change and increasing demands for action, many elected officials continue to prioritize the interests of the fossil fuel industry over the health of our planet. The science is clear: we must phase out fossil fuels, halt new extraction projects, and disentangle our political system from the industry's influence.

The Jane Fonda Climate PAC is dedicated to electing leaders who will take bold action against the fossil fuel industry and their allies in office, prioritizing a sustainable future over short-term profits. Your support has already helped us elect 43 climate champions across all levels of government since the launch of the PAC.

As we head into our next round of endorsements for 2023, and as the 2024 elections approach, we must continue to fight against right-wing extremism, while being willing to hold leaders from all parties accountable when it comes to climate action.

[_**Your $10 contribution will enable us to elect even more climate champions this year, and send a resounding message to anyone considering running for office that the time to stand up to the fossil fuel industry is here.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62139536/402416753/931978131?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230421-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZiOTk0MzQzLTk5ZTAtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hzCTH1ucYJAn0dOCBp-re60Rpzr8CF_uEVS33jDyjiE=)

clean_body: As Earth Day approaches, I wanted to share an important message from me and the Jane PAC team. | = | Greetings! Dan Rowe with the Jane Fonda Climate PAC team here. As Earth Day approaches, I wanted to share an important message from me and the Jane PAC team. = | = Despite growing awareness of climate change and increasing demands for action, many elected officials continue to prioritize the interests of the fossil fuel industry over the health of our planet. The science is clear: we must phase out fossil fuels, halt new extraction projects, and disentangle our political system from the industry's influence. The Jane Fonda Climate PAC is dedicated to electing leaders who will take bold action against the fossil fuel industry and their allies in office, prioritizing a sustainable future over short-term profits. Your support has already helped us elect 43 climate champions across all levels of government since the launch of the PAC. As we head into our next round of endorsements for 2023, and as the 2024 elections approach, we must continue to fight against right-wing extremism, while being willing to hold leaders from all parties accountable when it comes to climate action. = | = Every dollar you invest brings us closer to realizing our vision of a planet free from the devastating impacts of fossil fuels. Thank you for your ongoing support. Warm regards, Dan Rowe Digital Director, Jane Fonda Climate PAC | | = Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. | | **President Obama is using his voice to amplify the critical importance of state legislatures:** [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zg_VLrMrMFvj2eg_NergVk0RMpp5VCBNbBXS7sUaF4OHAX3AKZuYoaiDZff0K3BBFDvQuc1Hfs4fe5fkspEmKF1D6JoPIK___y_3AD6Ew1AO4Z14QVr0KiECqXrGDvN4ebitPIVuftHkoS48vWOWZvIveJ6X14WX936wwclpMgBiTNjTWhAOXN-aOqIl-HQxtUpAvePa5Z0Ul3u7XLREWTOYz32c1hU55kAIVVyP0WHfW50QutunpqkynH5VDm4RvQyl1UDyex9gZW5gd3jjL0GNXk65W_O8RtHXxtITSa9gD8NGa2U0npxNgBkQJ8BPgK8EXz8HHtsAR2ICNPkbZKILEN9UsTLT_becYJrBpy5l1MHOrQzJ-3caQSKhQGy28FApJrQIrXI1hTbaFvTY37yyUKZogLDBk_zhnNOmumSw/3vj/PDtzXlj6TEuFdGHD-wZGsA/h0/FxABU1dX6GnCAlY_IEOHYYi3T-Imq95rqhAKaObLRNs) And no one would be better than President Obama – he served THREE terms in the Illinois State Senate! Here’s exactly why he’s so right: **While legislation stalls on the federal level, state legislators are making key decisions about access to abortion, public education, health care services, and even decisions about the roads you drive on.** Where Republicans have stripped their constituents of these rights, state Democrats have protected the right to choose, expanded early and absentee voting, and much, much more. **Simply put, state Democrats are the last line of defense against GOP extremism.** But with eight must-win special elections quickly approaching, we need every Democrat reading this to listen to President Obama and step up. _Friend, we’ve made historic investments in our people and created jobs across our state._

We’re making it easier to start and run a business while strengthening our economy for all Mississippians.

**Mississippi is open for business and we’re going to keep the momentum going - but we can’t do it alone. **

**Right now, Democrats are sending in their operatives to try and take over our state, and if we’re going to keep Mississippi on the path to prosperity, we MUST stop them.**

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: We don’t have to live like this. Fight back for our planet with EARLY ACCESS to our Earth Day match!
body:
| | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---
| | | | | | | | [DOUBLE YOUR GIFT FOR THE NEXT 25 HOURS ONLY](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1733605?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Friend, I had to personally reach out to you early, ahead of the Earth Day rush Saturday, and share this important update on our planet-saving work.
No matter what greedy corporations say, or how many millions of dollars they spend on PR and misinformation campaigns, Friends of the Earth is committed to fighting back. **Corporate pollution is a choice, and we CAN hold companies accountable for that choice. **
**Right now, mega-manufacturing plants are pumping out single-use plastics that end up in our oceans to the tune of two huge garbage trucks per minute. Corporations are aggressively working to expand mining, logging and drilling operations on our public lands. The resulting habitat loss threatens the survival of endangered species – who are now in more danger than EVER. Meanwhile, the climate crisis is worsening from out-of-control fossil fuel greed. **
**The fact is this: We don't have to live like this, and our only Earth doesn't have to die like this.** We have the power to stop catastrophic outcomes for our planet and all its inhabitants if we fight back together now. And what more powerful moment than Earth Day to take action?
**That’s why this is such heartening news: A generous group of donors is matching every gift for Earth Day up to our goal of $180,000 but only until midnight tomorrow. Because you've been such a committed supporter, we created a custom match link you can use to be the first to DOUBLE your Earth Day impact. So please hurry and make your gift for our planet now! Here’s your personal link: **
| | [EARLY MATCH ACCESS FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1733605?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
This goal means so much to our organization and the planet – and we chose you to be part of this select group for early match access because we know you recognize how high the stakes are. When you make your early-bird donation, you'll be ensuring we can mobilize on the ground, keep pressure on legislators and stop the climate crisis before it’s too late.
**Matches like this don’t come often, and the stakes for our only Earth have never been higher. **That’s why we must seize this opportunity for our planet, friend. With all our futures on the line, getting complacent or giving in to despair is simply not an option. So we’re counting on committed environmentalists like you to set the pace for the rest of our community.
**With time running out, we need to make this Earth Day really count. Please, make your membership gift and be part of the urgent solutions we need to break the grip of corporate greed and protect our planet while we still can. Your personalized Earth Day match access link is right here – donate now to have every dollar doubled:**
| | [EARLY MATCH ACCESS FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1733605?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Thank you,

Erich Pica
President
Friends of the Earth
|

Breaking news, Peter: Moments ago, the Supreme Court ruled that the abortion pill mifepristone would remain widely available as the lawsuit works its way through the appeals court. This is a win, but let’s be clear: this is a **temporary** win. Mifepristone remains accessible *_for now*._ As we’ve seen over the past year, ever since Roe v. Wade was overturned, anti-choice extremists have been laser-focused on banning abortion nationwide. The conservatives won’t rest, so neither will we.
